fields.title: Jeju Island Surf School
fields.address: 192 Jungmungwangwang-ro, 특별자치도, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 이지혜
google_reviews.text:
강사님이 친절하고, 안전하게 강습 진행해주셨어요!
제주도 서핑 로컬 문화에 대해서도 들을 수 있었고, 사장님이 1세대 로컬 서퍼여서 더 믿음이 갔어요!

google_reviews.author: 신현석
google_reviews.text: 잼있어요 ㅋㅋ

google_reviews.author: 야옹이
google_reviews.text:
ㅎ
좋아요

google_reviews.author: haku
google_reviews.text: 중문에 있는 제주 서핑 스쿨에서 정말 멋진 경험을 했어요! 강사님들이 친절하고 전문적이셔서 초보자도 쉽게 서핑을 배울 수 있었어요. 해변도 아름다웠고, 분위기도 정말 좋았어요. 강력 추천합니다!

google_reviews.author: Volker Leukhardt
google_reviews.text:
여기서 정말 멋진 서핑을 즐겼어요! 너무 재밌었고 사람들도 정말 친절했어요. 🤙
강습을 받거나 보드와 웨트슈트를 대여하고 싶다면 인스타그램으로 연락해 보세요.

google_reviews_en.author: haku
google_reviews_en.text: I had an amazing experience at Jeju Surf School in Jungmun! The instructors were friendly and professional, making it easy to learn surfing even as a beginner. The beach was beautiful, and the overall vibe was fantastic. Highly recommended!

google_reviews_en.author: Volker Leukhardt
google_reviews_en.text:
Had a really great surf session here! Super fun and very nice people. 🤙
Reach out to them on Instagram if you’re looking for a lesson or simply rent a board and a wetsuit

google_reviews_en.author: 이지혜
google_reviews_en.text:
The instructor was kind and conducted the lesson safely!

I was also able to learn about the local surfing culture in Jeju, and I trusted the place even more because the owner is a first-generation local surfer!

google_reviews_en.author: 신현석
google_reviews_en.text: It's fun lol

google_reviews_en.author: 야옹이
google_reviews_en.text:
Haha

Like

fields.title: Jungmun Surfing School
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Seogwipo, 특별자치도, KR jeju 색달동 중문관광로 94 중문서핑스쿨&샵

google_reviews.author: 고경준
google_reviews.text: 서핑용품도 다양하고 서핑배우기는 최고였어요~~ 서핑끝나고 제공하는 음료도 맛있었습니다~! 아이스티 꿀맛~~!!!^^

google_reviews.author: Will Griner
google_reviews.text: 이곳 정말 최고예요! 서핑 강습을 받았는데 강사님도 너무 친절하시고 정말 잘 가르쳐주셨어요. 가게에서 일하시는 분도 정말 친절하시고요. 직원분들 모두 친절하고 상냥해서, 좋은 분들이시고 자기 일에 열정을 가지고 계신다는 걸 느낄 수 있었어요. 이 곳에 대해 칭찬할 점이 정말 많아요. 이틀 후에 서핑보드를 빌리러 다시 갔는데 제 이름을 기억하고 계셔서 기분이 정말 좋았어요.

google_reviews.author: Arthur Duarte
google_reviews.text:
중문해수욕장에서 정말 즐거운 시간을 보냈어요. 특히 이 학원에서 서핑보드를 빌린 후 정말 좋았어요. 서비스도 아주 좋았고, 샤워 시설도 있고 해변까지 교통편도 좋았어요.
중문 서핑을 마법처럼 즐길 수 있게 해 주셔서 감사합니다.

google_reviews.author: Michael Ong
google_reviews.text: Great to stop by the store, very friendly owners!

google_reviews_en.author: Will Griner
google_reviews_en.text: this place is great! I had a surfing lesson, the instructor was very friendly and overall a good teacher. The lady who works in the shop is also very nice and friendly. Overall, the staff is very friendly and kind, you can tell that they are good people and are passionate about what they do. I have many good things to say about this place. I even came back two days later to rent a surfboard, and they remember my name, which made me feel very good.

google_reviews_en.author: Arthur Duarte
google_reviews_en.text:
I had a great time in Jungmun beach, specially after renting the surfboards with this school. They have a very good service, also showers and transport to the beach.
Thanks for make Jungmun surf magical to us

google_reviews_en.author: Michael Ong
google_reviews_en.text: Great to stop by the store, very friendly owners!

google_reviews_en.author: 고경준
google_reviews_en.text: They had a variety of surfing gear and learning how to surf was the best~~ The drinks they provided after surfing were also delicious~! The iced tea was delicious~~!!!^^

google_reviews.author: 윤만듀
google_reviews.text: 서핑샾서 설명듣고 중문 해수욕장에서 서핑하는곳이에요 해수욕장 근처 자연환경도 너무 멋있고 서핑하기좋아요

google_reviews.author: 이완협
google_reviews.text: 너무 재미있었어요! 파도 큰날인데도 강사님들이 신경많이 써주셔서 파도도 많이 탈 수 있었고, 자세라거나 멘탈이라거나 이런부분들도 피드백을 잘해주셔서 파도 큰데도 라이딩 할 수 있게 도와주셨고, 자유서핑때도 중간중간 코칭해주셔서 혼자서도 탈 수 있었어요!! 너울이라고 깜장 리트리버 댕댕이도 있는데 너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅠㅠㅠ

google_reviews.author: 난나
google_reviews.text:
일일 3시간 강습비 6만원 웻수트 대여 1만원입니다
오늘 첫번째 시도
파도가 많지않아 제대로 타보지 못한
몸만 힘들고 지친 하루이지만

언젠가는 꼭 잘 타보리라
강습쌤들 열심히 잘가르쳐 주십니다

google_reviews.author: Jimin Jeong
google_reviews.text:
서핑 배우고싶으면 꼭 추천하고 싶은곳이에요. 강사님들도 다 너무 좋은 분들이어서 더 기분이 좋았어요. 특히 올라프 선생님 힘드셨을텐데 끝까지 기분 좋게 도와주셔서 감사합니다. 사진들도 너무 예쁘게 찍어주셨어요. 얼음병에 콜라, 마스크팩까지 너무 센스있었구요. 감사합니다!

Would 100% recommend this place to learn surfing in Jeju :) An amazing experience worth every penny!

google_reviews.author: 임창석
google_reviews.text:
강사분들이 모두 친절하시고 샤워시설도 잘 되어 있어요. 재
방문의사 있습니다.

google_reviews_en.author: Vera Verhoef
google_reviews_en.text:
Unfortunately the male owner was not friendly to us when we rented a surfboard, didn't greet us in the first place. The surfboards have some holes in it and are really heavy, which is probably a sign of waterlogged softtops. Wetsuit + board rental is 40.000 won per person for 3 hours. If you finish early, they make you feel really bad and almost refuse to pick you up from the beach. But the hot shower after the surfsession was nice.

All in all, expected more kindness for such an expensive surf rental.

google_reviews_en.author: Miguel Sanchez Martinez
google_reviews_en.text:
Awesome experience with this school!
Very professional from the beginning.
Great course and tips on beginner surfing.
They took their time to explain everything in English even though I was the only foreigner.
They also provide great professional pictures for free (!)
Would definitely take more lessons with them if I didn't have to leave the island..

google_reviews_en.author: Emer Miedema
google_reviews_en.text:
Bad experience.
Don’t go here if you are looking for good surf vibes.
They don’t talk/interact and the guy is super arrogant.

You can only rent for 3 hours no shorter time, and it’s quite expensive for a broken board.
De boards are in an extremely poor state.

google_reviews_en.author: 윤만듀
google_reviews_en.text: This is where you surf at Jungmun Beach after getting instructions at a surf shop. The natural environment near the beach is amazing, and it is great for surfing.

google_reviews_en.author: 이완협
google_reviews_en.text: It was so much fun! Even though the waves were big, the instructors paid close attention to us, so I was able to ride a lot. They gave great feedback on things like posture and mindset, helping me to ride even in the big waves. They also coached me from time to time during free surfing, so I was able to ride on my own!! There's also a black retriever dog named Neoul, and he's so cute ㅠㅠㅠㅠ

fields.title: 김서프 제주(KIMSURF JEJU)
fields.address: 2864-41 Saekdal-dong, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Younggyu Kim
google_reviews.text:
이 곳에서 서핑 강습을 배웠는데
강사님들이 하나하나 케어해주시는 느낌이 너무 좋았습니다. 그리거 강습 듣는데 계속 웃다 왔네요.
완전 좋은 추억으로 남았습니다.
또 갈거같아요!
서핑은 김서프에요!! 강추

google_reviews.author: 백가을
google_reviews.text:
선생님 엄청친절 합니다! 재밌는쌤이시고
잘가르쳐주셔욥 2시간동안 수업하고 1시간은
자유시간 이고 총3시간입니답!!

google_reviews.author: TV주만지
google_reviews.text:
제주도서핑은 역시 김서프가 최고인듯!!!!
다들 너무 친절하고 강사님들 수준도 완전 수준급 이에요 ㅠ 김서프 만수무강❤️

google_reviews.author: Hyeonjin An
google_reviews.text: 서핑 재밌게 잘 배웠어요! 강사님들이 친절해요

google_reviews.author: Jumin Son
google_reviews.text: 재밌고 친절하고 좋았어요 🤙🏽

google_reviews_en.author: Mason Rudolph
google_reviews_en.text: We loved our surfing lessons with Kimsurf! Highly recommended for new surfers like us. They helped and encouraged us while surfing and politely corrected what we were doing anytime we messed up. Very much worth the price for all you get out of it.

google_reviews_en.author: Chloe K.
google_reviews_en.text: I rented a surfboard & wetsuit for 3 hours. I believe it was around 39,000 KRW which seemed very reasonable. You can take a hot outdoor shower after.

google_reviews_en.author: Leonie Lenz
google_reviews_en.text: Had an amazing time! They offer English-speaking courses, are so welcoming, and the beach is gorgeous! Can only recommend :)

google_reviews_en.author: Timothy Desmond
google_reviews_en.text:
I recently took a lesson here and I was very pleased with my experience.

First, Language: I only speak English and I didn't expect anyone to be able to speak English but sure enough my instructor was good enough at English to explain things to me.  It was a nice surprise since I just figured I'd use my eyes to copy what everyone else was doing.

Due to my lack of Korean I went to the surf house instead of the beach for my lesson and one of the employees was nice enough to drive me to the beach to get to my class on time.  I really appreciated that.

The facility: They have a surf school with showers and all their gear , but the actual lessons take place on the beach, which is just a few minutes away.  Their showers were clean and the beach was very nice.

The instructors: I talked to multiple instructors and they were all super nice.  I can't understand Korean (yet) but my girlfriend said that our female instructor was "hilarious and really knowledgeable." She did a great job of teaching us the basics and we were both able to stand up on a wave within a few tries.  I felt very comfortable the entire time with our instructor, she was great.

The rentals: we rented wetsuits and soft-top longboard, both were in great condition.

We got lucky and had some great waves and weather when we were there.  If I am ever going to surf again in Jeju I will go back to Kimsurf.

Oh I almost forgot,  the lesson came with a photographer! They had someone taking photos the entire time during the lesson so that you can get pictures of you surfing when it's all over.  That's a really cool souvenir/ memory that's included.

google_reviews_en.author: Younggyu Kim
google_reviews_en.text:
I took a surfing lesson here.
I loved how the instructors cared for me individually. I was constantly smiling during the lesson.
It was a wonderful memory.
I'll definitely go again!
For surfing, go to Kim Surf!! Highly recommended.

fields.title: Jeju Island Surfing Surf & Joy
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Cheju, 특별자치도 Seonsa-ro 8-gil, 12 1층

google_reviews.author: Nayeon Kim
google_reviews.text:
강사님이 친절하게 잘 알려줘요:)
잘 못해도 격려와 응원을 아끼지 않아주셔서 즐겁게 배울수 있었어요.
바다도 너무 깊거나 돌이 많지도 않고 모래도 고와서 발다칠 일도 없어서 다행이었어요😊

google_reviews.author: Ga Ga
google_reviews.text:
4월인데 슈트입으니까 하나도 안 추웠어요!
설명도 체계적으로 해주셔서 서핑 어려웠는데 재미 붙이고 할 수 있었습니다 ㅎㅅㅎ
리뷰이벤트로 술 한 잔 받을 수 있어서 생맥 마셨는데 진짜 맛있고 대화도 재미있었어요!!
서핑 하실 분들 삼양 서프앤조이 추천드려요~~
흐리거나 비오는 날 하기 딱 좋습니다~~

google_reviews.author: Iaan Park
google_reviews.text: 2층 유럽식pub 특별한 안주가 맛있고 생맥이 시원하고 분위기좋고 친절한데 가성비까지 조으다? 근처에 온다면 두번가라. 세번가라.

google_reviews.author: on cafe
google_reviews.text: 친절하게 잘 가르쳐주세요👍🏻

google_reviews.author: toby S
google_reviews.text: 여기 추천이요... 해수욕장에서 가깝고 시설 무난하고 직원분들 친절하세요.

google_reviews_en.author: Jin Kyu Chang (JK)
google_reviews_en.text: Highly recommend if you need a decent pub nereby as well as surfing lesson.

google_reviews_en.author: Nayeon Kim
google_reviews_en.text:
The instructor is very kind and teaches well :)

Even when I made mistakes, they didn't hold back on their encouragement and support, so I was able to learn happily.

It was a relief that the sea wasn't too deep or rocky, and the sand was fine, so I didn't have to worry about hurting my feet 😊

google_reviews_en.author: Ga Ga
google_reviews_en.text:
It's April, but I wasn't cold at all wearing a wetsuit!

The explanations were very systematic, so even though surfing was difficult for me, I was able to get hooked and enjoy it.

I got a free drink through a review event, so I had a draft beer. It was really delicious, and the conversation was fun too!!

I recommend Samyang Surf & Joy to anyone looking to surf~~

It's perfect for surfing on cloudy or rainy days~~

google_reviews_en.author: Iaan Park
google_reviews_en.text: A European-style pub on the second floor. The special snacks are delicious, the draft beer is cold, the atmosphere is great, the service is friendly, and it's even good value for money? If you're in the area, go twice. Go three times.

google_reviews_en.author: on cafe
google_reviews_en.text: Please teach me kindly👍🏻

fields.title: MOONSURF & CAFE
fields.address: 7길1 Gwakji-ri, Aewol-eup, 특별자치도, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 제주시 특별자치도, 애월읍 곽지리 7길1

google_reviews.author: Jamie
google_reviews.text:
길가에 깨끗하고 화려하지않게 자리 잡고 있는 장소

안에 들어가면 시원한 느낌이나고, 아기자기 개방적인 공간의 실내 공간!!
빌려주는 슈트들도 이쁘고, 서핑보드도 새로 제작했다고 하는데, 정말 귀엽고 이쁘고 군더더기 없당.
안에는 샤워공간과 탈의공간이 붙어있는데 넓은 편은 아니다.

그리고 카페가 같이 있어서 커피와 음료 그리고 밤에는 맥주도 판매하는 곳!!!

바로 앞, 깨끗하고 소박한 곽지과물 해변에서 서핑을 즐 길 수 있는 곳!! 그리고 강사님이 너무 친절하고 꼼꼼하게 알려주셨다.

그리고 포토그래퍼 작가님이 쥐도 새도 모르게 사진을 멋지게 찍어주신다 히히히~~ 너무 좋은 경험이였따

google_reviews.author: 남수진
google_reviews.text: 서핑 초보에게 강력추천! 서핑이 처음이여도 혼자여도 가능할까?생각햇는뎅 가능해요ㅎㅎㅎ

google_reviews.author: yeonseo kang
google_reviews.text:
재밌다 또 엄청 재밌다
열정적으로 가르쳐 주신다
사진도 찍어서 공유해줘서 너무 좋다
샤워 시설도 좋고 제주도에 온다면 또 방문 예정

google_reviews.author: YuJin Choi
google_reviews.text:
서핑 가르쳐주시는 선생님 진짜 최고였음!!
진짜 파도가 심한데도 성공할수 있게 잘해주셨고 성공하면 누구보다 젤 신나해주셔서 기분좋았어요~~!!

google_reviews.author: barrell C
google_reviews.text:
사장님도 친절하시고 시설도 최고에요!
서핑강습으로 유명한 이유가 있더라구요!

google_reviews_en.author: Caroline Phung
google_reviews_en.text: The best experience ever and the best time of my life. I had so much fun that I couldn't stop grinning like a idiot lmao. I'm a beginner at surfing but they gave my training and supported me all the way through, my instructor Lola was the best too, shes my instructor but also felt like a friend and a sister, I had so much memories there, I would defo recommend it and go again in the future!, ✨✨✨👍👍👍👍🤭🤭🤭🤭❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

google_reviews_en.author: lynette koay
google_reviews_en.text: We had a great surf session at Moonsurf! Lola and the boss were v friendly and patient in guiding us during our lesson! Enjoyed our lesson v much!!

google_reviews_en.author: Nina Mikhail Audisho
google_reviews_en.text: I had a very good experience with moonsurf ! Lola, the instructor, was speacking in English so it was very nice. Also the beach is clean ! The facilities of the café is very convinient

google_reviews_en.author: Zhang Sarah
google_reviews_en.text: Good experience, good teacher! Sure will come back again. 👍🏻

google_reviews_en.author: J Lee
google_reviews_en.text: Kind coaches were very helpful. Recommend this strong. Wave was easy to follow for the beginner surfers. You can use shower, towel, and they provide some waters. They do not have locker but you can keep your belongings near the coaches.

google_reviews.author: 홍용주
google_reviews.text:
친절한 강사님~~
애들한테도 성인도 배우기 참 좋음.

google_reviews.author: Miyeon Yeom (파리여인)
google_reviews.text:
제주도에서즐기는실내서핑~~
직원분들도친절하구

보는일행들도 즐거웠습니다

google_reviews.author: 장윤경

google_reviews.text:
완전 꿀잼^^ 운동하고 싶으면 여기추천!!!
다음날 근육통 장난아님ㄷㄷ

google_reviews_en.author: 홍용주

google_reviews_en.text:
Indoor surfing in Jeju Island~~
The staff were friendly, and it was a really fun time, even for a first-timer.
I'd recommend doing two sessions in a row, as it's a shame you only get one session!
The people watching were also having fun.

google_reviews_en.author: 장윤경
google_reviews_en.text: The kids had so much fun that we decided to come back again!! I think it was a great experience!!

google_reviews_en.author: 무적엘린이
google_reviews_en.text: The kids loved it. Thank you for being so kind and welcoming.♡

google_reviews_en.author: 박계은
google_reviews_en.text: Totally fun^^ If you want to work out, I recommend this place!!! The muscle pain the next day is no joke.

google_reviews.text:
제주도, 월정리에서 서핑 제일 잘 가르쳐주는 곳!
서핑 일일강습도 좋지만 가장 좋은건 FUN서핑캠프 라는 프로그램이라고 생각한다. 핵강추

google_reviews.author: Ren Zo
google_reviews.text:
조카가 서핑은 처음이었는데 한국어를 전혀 몰라요. 그런데 여기 직원분들이 영어를 아주 잘하셔서 의사소통에는 전혀 문제가 없었어요.

직원분들이 정말 친절하고 배려심이 넘쳐서 강력 추천합니다. 가격도 꽤 괜찮아요!

google_reviews_en.author: Ren Zo
google_reviews_en.text:
It was my nephew’s first time to surf but doesnt know any korean. This place has staff that can speak english very well so communication wasnt a problem.

I highly recommend this place as they are very accommodating and are very pleasant to be around. Also their prices are quite competitive too!

google_reviews_en.author: jaewoo park
google_reviews_en.text:
The best place to teach surfing in Woljeong-ri, Jeju Island!

One-day surfing lessons are good, but I think the best thing is the program called FUN Surfing Camp. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Heejung Choi
google_reviews.text: 공항이랑 굉장히 가깝다. 여행동선 짤때 이보다 좋은 위치는 없을듯. 샵이랑 바다랑 가까워서 바로 씻을수 있는장점. 뷰도 좋고 강사들이 매우친절. 다음에도 서핑을 배운다면 이곳에서!

google_reviews.author: Holla
google_reviews.text: 정말 추천합니다.! 처음으로 배우는 거였는데 정말 쉽게 가르쳐줘서 저랑 남편이 쉽게 이해되서 재미있게 탔네요! 강사님도 계속 웃으면서 가르쳐주시고 정말 편한 분위기에서 배운거 같아요! 설명도 깔끔 장소도 깔금 서비스 좋음!!

google_reviews.author: LINA KIM
google_reviews.text:
비가 와서 2명뿐이라 거의 개인레슨 이었어요.
격려도 많이 해주시고 재미 있었어요.
전날 한라산 다녀오는 바람에
체력이 바닥나서 너무 힘들어서
많이 못타 아쉬웠어요.

google_reviews.author: 안도경
google_reviews.text: 강의도 알아듣기 쉽게 잘가르쳐주시고 좋았어요!! 샤워시설이 쪼꼼 낙후된것 말곤 좋아요^^

google_reviews.author: 이정덕
google_reviews.text: 친절한 사장님과 직원들의 도움으로 8살 저의 아들과 저, 딸들이 재밌게 서핑을 할 수 있었습니다~^^

google_reviews_en.author: Emer Miedema
google_reviews_en.text: What an amazing place! The owners are incredibly welcoming and always take the time for a little chat, which makes you feel right at home. We also received photos from our surf session, so we finally have some great pictures of ourselves surfing. Such a nice extra and a wonderful memory to take home. Highly recommended! 🌊🏄‍♂️📸

google_reviews_en.author: Evelyn Chih
google_reviews_en.text:
We made a reservation before we fly in. Sadly, the English instructor couldn't make it so the lady boss was there to help with the English translation as well as to help us take the photos while the husband teaches us.
Definitely a good experience. If you are of a chubbier side, you might wanna bring your own wet suit that fits well 🤣! Recommended for foreigners! Thank you for the iced americano!

google_reviews_en.author: Hristina Metahchova
google_reviews_en.text: It was very nice! The instructions were trying their best with English because our group was just foreigners, they were super supportive and sweet the whole time! The shop had ALL the needed amenities for after the lesson too! Showers, shampoos, slippers, towels, all too good! I would definitely recommend!

google_reviews_en.author: Madeline
google_reviews_en.text: Wow I had such a great experience with this school, it was the best thing I did on my vacation in Jeju.  It makes me so sad to think I almost didn't join because of my size (I am active but am about a US size 20-22 and was worried I would not be able to keep up).  I did bring my own swim leggings and rash guard because I wasn't sure they'd have my size (a typical occurrence in Korea) but they had large sizes of surfing suits.  It is also run in conjunction with an adorable chicken/coffee shop.  By the end of the lesson I was almost standing up and surfing ^^ It was better than other surfing classes I took before in other places.  The owners are friendly and Mel, our instructor, was great.  I could not reccomend it more.  I speak some Korean but the class was all on English and the other foreigners were able to keep up.  They also had shower facilities as well as sunscreen to use before and after going out.  There was also an opportunity to take photos with the surfboards that the instructor took.  I will 100% be coming back when I am in Jeju again and can't believe I waited this long to try surfing.  Its the most fun I've had since I can remember and I can wait to keep going with it.  It was worth some of the wipe outs and a few mouthfuls of salt water.

google_reviews_en.author: Al chan
google_reviews_en.text:
Bagus Surfing School gave me the best surfing class I’ve ever had! As a complete beginner, I was a bit nervous, but the instructors were incredibly nice, patient, and very professional. Before going into the water, we had a thorough practice and clear instruction, which made me feel much more confident.

They encouraged me every step of the way and made learning so much fun. The facilities are super clean, there’s a shower and they even prepare towels for you, which is such a thoughtful touch.

One of the highlights was that they helped take lots of photos during my lesson, so I have amazing memories to look back on. Overall, it was a fantastic experience from start to finish. If you’re visiting Jeju, this is a must-do activity. Highly recommended!

Thank you for the great experience!!

fields.title: Jeju Island Surfing Bum Surf
fields.address: 1569-25 Samyang 1(il)-dong, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 조대원
google_reviews.text:
첫 서핑 강습을 받은 곳인데 너무 만족합니다,,,

영상 강의와 안전 수칙등을 교육받고 물에 들어가는데
워낙 잘 알려주시기 때문에 재밌고 빠르게 배우실 수 있어요 :)

강추합니다!

google_reviews.author: Stella Han
google_reviews.text:
서핑샵을 비교적 여러곳 다녀봤지만 이곳이 가장 만족스러웠습니다.
강사님도 진도별로 차근차근 알려주시고, 시설도 모든것을 갖추고 있어 몸만 가도 수건까지 빌려주십니다.
다음번에 또 방문 예정입니다.

google_reviews.author: 박주현
google_reviews.text: 넘 친절하구 좋으셔요! 시설도 무난!

google_reviews.author: Hermela Solomon
google_reviews.text: 서핑은 처음이었는데 정말 재밌었어요! 한국어로 강습을 해주시는데 영어도 통하시는 분들이 계세요. 강사님들도 너무 친절하시고 실력도 좋으셨어요! 강습은 30분 정도이고, 소그룹으로 1시간 강습 후 1시간 30분은 자유 수영이에요. 탈의실/샤워실도 있고, 사진이랑 동영상도 찍어주세요! 다음에 꼭 다시 오고 싶어요 :)

google_reviews_en.author: Hermela Solomon
google_reviews_en.text: First time surfing but had a blast! They give instructions in Korean but can speak English. Great instructors and super nice ! About 30 min lesson 1 hr in small group with instructor, 1.5 hr free swim. Has changing room/shower, they take photos and videos of you! Will come back again :)

google_reviews_en.author: 조대원
google_reviews_en.text:
This is where I took my first surfing lesson, and I'm so happy with it.

After watching the video lectures and learning safety rules, I got into the water.

They explained everything so well, it was fun and I learned quickly. :)

Highly recommended!

google_reviews_en.author: Stella Han
google_reviews_en.text:
I have visited quite a few surf shops, but this one was the most satisfying.

The instructors teach step-by-step according to the level, and the facilities are fully equipped; they even lend you towels if you show up empty-handed.

I plan to visit again next time.

google_reviews_en.author: 박주현
google_reviews_en.text: Very friendly and nice! The facilities are also decent!

fields.title: Jeju Island Surfing 998 Surf (998surf)
fields.address: 33 Seonsa-ro 8-gil, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: JEAN L
google_reviews.text: 영어를 구사하는 코치들이 매우 꼼꼼하고 성실하게 가르쳐 주셔서 강력 추천합니다.

google_reviews.author: chieh chiu
google_reviews.text: 대만 친구들은 KKDay를 통해 예약할 수 있어요. 매장에 시간을 꼭 확인해야 합니다. 강사님들이 정말 잘 가르쳐주시고, 잘생기고 멋있어요! 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

google_reviews_en.author: JEAN L
google_reviews_en.text: There are English-speaking coaches who teach very carefully and diligently; highly recommended.

google_reviews_en.author: chieh chiu
google_reviews_en.text: Taiwanese friends can book through KKDay. You need to confirm the time with the store. They teach very well, and the instructors are cute and handsome! 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

fields.title: VIGOR SURF & FREEDIVING
fields.address: 70 Hyeongjehaean-ro, Andeok-myeon, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 웡대
google_reviews.text:
서핑 선생님들의 친절함도 좋았고 선생님들이 갖고 있는 서핑에 대한 자부심도 보여 좋았습니다!

서핑 배우고 싶으신분이면 꼭 비고르 서핑으로 가시길 추천해요 :)

google_reviews.author: SJ Yun
google_reviews.text:
서핑 체험했는데 완전 재밌었어요~~
중간에 돌고래 지나가는것두 보고~~
해수욕장이 아니라서 사람도 많지 않아서 더 좋은듯 합니다~~
파도도 오늘 쎈편이라서 초보자보다 중급자가 놀기에 더 좋은듯

google_reviews.author: 이동규
google_reviews.text: 진짜좋아요 다들친절하시고 초보자라면 다른데가지마시고 그냥 여기가세요!

google_reviews.author: 김찬영
google_reviews.text: 서핑선생님들도 친절하시고 게스트하우스도 깔끔하도 좋아요!!

google_reviews.author: SURF HOLIC
google_reviews.text: 감성 굿

google_reviews_en.author: J W
google_reviews_en.text: Stumbled upon this surf shop and spent the afternoon learning how to surf with my two teenager kids.  Spectacular views, perfect small waves for learning and excellent instructions from the Vigor Surf crew.  Gray Grove coffee shop next door has the best coffee in Korea.  Highly recommend for anyone visiting JeJu Island!

google_reviews_en.author: Victor Mangas
google_reviews_en.text: Had a lot of fun surfing with the instructor! Felt like I improved by the end!

google_reviews_en.author: 김도형
google_reviews_en.text: All the tutors are so kind. They are willing to teach you more. Whole facility is brand new.

google_reviews_en.author: Kay and Marcos
google_reviews_en.text: The store no longer exists at this location.  On their website they list another location closer to the coast near the coast guard office but I tried looking for it and there is no signage to confirm that they still exist.

google_reviews_en.author: 웡대
google_reviews_en.text: The surf instructors were friendly and I loved seeing their pride in surfing! It made me want to live by the ocean. If you want to learn how to surf, I highly recommend going to Vigor Surfing :)

fields.title: Woljeong Quick Surf
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Cheju, Haemajihaean-ro, 486 비101-1호

google_reviews.author: 거친R
google_reviews.text: 선생님이 친절하게 잘 가르쳐주시고, 사진 예쁘게 찍는 법도 알려주세요. 샤워시설에 도구가 다 갖춰져있어서 매우 편리합니다! 완전 추천

google_reviews.author: Sean
google_reviews.text: 처음 해보는 서핑이라 걱정이 많았는데, 강사님이 정말 친절하고 자세하게 알려주셔서 금방 적응할 수 있었어요. 초보자도 안전하게 즐길 수 있도록 계속 옆에서 도와주셔서 안심하고 탔습니다. 파도도 적당했고 장비도 깨끗해서 정말 만족스러운 시간이었어요. 다음에도 꼭 다시 오고 싶어요!

google_reviews.author: 별이된눈누
google_reviews.text: 강사님 완전 친절하시고 재밌으세요~! 샤워실에 온수 잘 나오고 샴푸, 린스, 바디워시, 폼클렌징까지 있어서 편하게 씻구 나왔습니다. 서핑 초보인데도 잼있게 잘 탔어요 굳굳🫶

google_reviews.author: 잠탱자
google_reviews.text: 엄청 친절하고 재밌게 알려주셔서 원래 물 무서워하는데 하나도 안무서웠어요! 너무 재밌게 놀다가 갑니다🙂 샤워 용품도 다 준비되어 있어서 편했어요:)

google_reviews.author: 민은영
google_reviews.text: 아이가 서핑 배우고 싶어해서 배우게 해줬어요. 너무나 보람된 하루가 되었습니다. 친절하게 잘 알려주셔서 잘 배웠어요. 곧잘 타네요 👍 또 오고 싶대요. 또 올게요!!^^

google_reviews_en.author: Shelby Atherton
google_reviews_en.text: Came for the 2 hour class and 1 one hour free surf!! The staff is incredibly kind and clearly communicates (even if you don’t speak Korean). They are very encouraging! They also provide many chances for photos on and off the board and in and out of the ocean! The shop is right on the water and provides great suit rentals in addition to fitting and shower rooms. If you’re gonna surf in Jeju, come here!

google_reviews_en.author: Minchan Jun
google_reviews_en.text: I recommend this place, it was my first time and the instructor was really kind and thoughtful. I will def learn again here if I visit Jeju island

google_reviews_en.author: Shuji Watanabe
google_reviews_en.text: beginner friendly

google_reviews_en.author: 거친R
google_reviews_en.text: The instructor was kind and helpful, and even taught us how to take beautiful photos. The shower facilities were fully equipped, making it very convenient! Highly recommended.

google_reviews_en.author: Sean
google_reviews_en.text: This was my first time surfing, so I was a bit worried, but the instructor was so kind and detailed, so I quickly adapted. He constantly helped me ensure that even beginners could enjoy the experience safely, so I felt reassured. The waves were just right, and the equipment was clean, so it was a truly satisfying experience. I definitely want to come back again!

google_reviews.author: Julie Jung
google_reviews.text:
아이언맨 사장님 강습 최고입니다 스탭분들도 친절하시고
서핑 배우기 너무 좋은 환경을 갖춘 서핑샵입니다
강력히 추천하고 또 추천해요

google_reviews.author: 태태태태
google_reviews.text: 로다주 닮은 강사님이 1차로 실내에서 이론 강습을 해주시고 2차로 덱스 닮은 강사님이 바다에 나가서 밀어주시면 실전 강습 1시간 해주시고 1시간 반 동안 자유로 탈 수 있어 너무 자세히 잘 배웠고 덕분에 아름다운 바다에서 재미있게 탈 수 있었어요ჱ̒ ｰ̀֊ｰ́ )(๑•̀ㅂ•́)و✧ᕙ(⇀‸↼‶)ᕗ

google_reviews.author: Richard Kim
google_reviews.text: 최고의 강습 내용과 찾아가기 쉬운 위치를 가진 서핑샵입니다 소낭게스트하우스와 함께 서핑캠프도 운영하고 계셔서 숙소와 서핑강습을 한 번에 해결할 수 있습니다

google_reviews.author: 김지적
google_reviews.text:
제주도 월정리 해수욕장에 위치한 최고의 서핑샵
시설, 강사와 스탭 친절도, 위치, 주차 최상의 상품

google_reviews.author: 부계정
google_reviews.text: 제주도 서핑훈련소 "서프서프"에서의 경험은 정말 좋았어요. 인스트럭터들이 친절하고 프로페셔널하게 가르쳐 줘서 초보자인 저도 금방 서핑을 즐길 수 있었어요. 설명도 자세하고 안전에도 많이 신경 썼어요. 여기서 서핑 배우는 거, 정말 추천합니다!

google_reviews_en.author: 신희민
google_reviews_en.text:
Highly Recommended!

From the owner to every staff member, everyone was incredibly friendly and welcoming.
The basic lesson took place indoors in a cool, comfortable space.
The shower facilities were clean and well-maintained, and we could enjoy coffee or drinks afterward.
Parking was super convenient, and the pricing was very reasonable.

I went with my son and made a last-minute reservation the night before — they still accepted us warmly.
From the indoor briefing to the surfing practice, everything was fun, well-organized, and meaningful.
Even though the waves were a bit too strong for a full experience, all the staff were so kind and supportive.
My son absolutely loved it and is still practicing back at the hotel!

We made some great memories together, and we’ll definitely be back next time.

Strongly recommend JEJU SURF SURF! 😃🙃😃

google_reviews_en.author: Семен Блинов
google_reviews_en.text: It was an amazing experience in Jeju. I highly recommend taking lessons at this school. Mr. Lee taught a 3-hour lesson for me and my friends. We all really liked it. Funnily enough, Mr. Lee looks like Robert Downey Jr.

google_reviews_en.author: Евгения Берлизева
google_reviews_en.text: Great surfing school! 100% recommending. Very nice and pleasant stuff!

google_reviews_en.author: Noble Viaggio
google_reviews_en.text: It was great experience! If you want to start studying surfing it is great place to start!

google_reviews_en.author: 최현욱
google_reviews_en.text:
Freakin cool!!!
It is located on the center of Woljeongri beach.
Also, help-pool and course is much organised.

fields.title: KITSCHWAVE JEJU 키치웨이브 제주
fields.address: 39 Gwakji 9-gil, Aewol-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: yeonsil Jang
google_reviews.text:
바로 어제 서핑 강습 받았어요!
서핑을 처음 배워보는거라 걱정 많이 했는데
강사님이 엄청 체계적으로 기초부터 잘 잡아주셨어요. 제가 낯가림이 심한편이라 혼자 가는게 망설여 졌는데 친절한 강사님이랑 엄청 재밌게 배우고 왔습니다.
심지어 강사님 훈훈하심 ^^!!! 다음에 또 갈래요!!!
아 그리고 서핑보드나 패들보드 강습 없이 렌트도 가능하던데 잘 타게되면 그것도 이용해 보겠습니다.

+애월 곽지해변 진짜 이뻐요 완존 추천합니다

google_reviews.author: Daniel KIM
google_reviews.text:
기초부터 꼼꼼히 설명해주시고
파도를 잘탈수있게 알려주시는
프로 서퍼출신 남자 사장님과

너무나 친절하고 사람을 기분좋게 만들어주시고
사진까지 잘찍어주시는 여자 사장님의
환상적인 조화

담번에 또 배우러 오겠습니다

google_reviews.author: 함경국
google_reviews.text:
샤도착하면 제일먼저 반기는 강아지부터 너무도 이쁜 서핑샾이였다 맑은하늘과 맑은바다물색이 서핑하는 내내 힐링하는 기분들개 했다
강사님들 역쉬 너무 개성있고 친절하게 하나하나 알려죠서 먼 바다까지 나갔는대도 겁나지 않았다
왕짱 노리터서핑

google_reviews.author: 리레이쓰
google_reviews.text:
사장님 직원분들 너무 친절하고 잘생기셨어요,,
강사님의 맞춤 서핑강습에 자신감 뿜뿜^^!!
저 이러다 파도랑 한 몸이 되어버리겠어요~
수트도 왕 예뻐서 서핑고수가 벌써 되어버린 느낌이랄까..?
감사합니다!!!!!!

google_reviews.author: 고수민 (숨니)
google_reviews.text:
처음 해보시는 분들도 쉽게 배우실 수 있을거에요 :)
전문적인 강사들과 함께 서핑을 즐겨보세요
곽지해수욕장에 오신다면 노리터서핑을 추천합니다!

google_reviews_en.author: Rachelle Kim
google_reviews_en.text: Finally found the place where my kids can learn surfing in English! And a lovely instructor!!! I give it two 👍 up!!!

google_reviews_en.author: Aisyah Kadir
google_reviews_en.text: I had a lesson with Areum. She is so paitent, kind, helpful and very detail in her teaching. She will guide all my mistakes and very happy to have her as my instructor. 🥰

google_reviews_en.author: yeonsil Jang
google_reviews_en.text:
I took a surfing lesson just yesterday!

I was really worried since it was my first time learning to surf, but the instructor taught me the basics very systematically. I tend to be quite shy, so I hesitated to go alone, but I had a blast learning thanks to the kind instructor.

The instructor was even handsome! ^^!!! I definitely want to go again!!!

Oh, and I noticed you can rent surfboards or paddleboards without a lesson, so I plan to try that out once I get better at it.

+ Aewol Gwakji Beach is really beautiful. I highly recommend it!

google_reviews_en.author: Daniel KIM
google_reviews_en.text:
The owner, a former professional surfer, explains everything from the basics to teach you how to surf the waves, and the owner, a woman who is incredibly kind and makes you feel good, even taking great photos, are a fantastic combination.

I'll definitely be back to learn again.

google_reviews_en.author: 함경국
google_reviews_en.text:
It was such a lovely surf shop, starting with the dog that greeted us first thing upon arrival. The clear sky and the color of the sea made me feel healed throughout the entire surfing session.

As expected, the instructors were so unique and kind, teaching us step by step, so I wasn't scared even when we went out to the open sea.

Noriter Surfing is the best!

fields.title: Jeju Island Surfing Lineup Surf Hado Surfing

google_reviews.author: 박선화
google_reviews.text: 친절한 사장님과 강사님들에게 감사하고~무엇보다 샤워시설 깨끗하게 관리되고있는게 보이는 곳이라 슈트입을때도 찝찝한느낌이 없었어요. 새거라서 더 안심했구요~샵 분위기가 굉장히 편안하게 형성된 곳이라 혼자여행자도 어색함없고 친구만들기 좋은곳이에요. 적극추천하는 곳입니다~

google_reviews.author: 제이제이
google_reviews.text:
샤워실 깨끗하고 사장님 친절해요.
강의 재밌게 잘 해 주세요.

google_reviews.author: 용기백
google_reviews.text: 사장님이 친절하시고 강의를 전문적이고 재밌게 잘 해주십니다. 샤워실에 물품 다있어서 편해요. 다시 오고싶은곳입니다!

google_reviews.author: 유학참새
google_reviews.text:
친절하신 사장님, 넘 멋진 경험 하고 가서 여기도 리뷰 남깁니다~정말 기분 좋게 잘 놀다 갑니다!!
아이들도 너무 좋아라하구 멍멍이도 또 보고 싶다고.. 돌아가는 길에 계속 라인업 다시 가고 싶다고 벌써ㅜㅜ...ㅎㅎ  조만간 또 방문 할께요~^^

google_reviews.author: Diddy Lee
google_reviews.text: 사장님이 너무 친절하고 강습도 좋아요

google_reviews_en.author: 박선화
google_reviews_en.text: I'm grateful to the friendly owner and instructors. Above all, the shower facilities were clearly maintained, so I didn't feel uncomfortable wearing a suit. The fact that they were brand new made me feel even more at ease. The shop has a very relaxed atmosphere, making it a great place for solo travelers to make friends. I highly recommend it.

google_reviews_en.author: 제이제이
google_reviews_en.text: The shower room is clean and the owner is friendly. He makes the lectures fun and engaging.

google_reviews_en.author: 용기백
google_reviews_en.text: The owner is kind and gives professional yet entertaining lectures. It is convenient because the shower room is fully equipped with amenities. It is a place I want to visit again!

google_reviews_en.author: 유학참새
google_reviews_en.text: Thank you, kind owner. I had such a wonderful experience and am leaving a review here as well. I had such a great time!! The kids loved it and the dog wanted to see it again.. On the way back, I kept wanting to go back to the lineupㅜㅜ...ㅎㅎ I will visit again soon~^^

google_reviews_en.author: Diddy Lee
google_reviews_en.text: The boss is very kind and the classes are great

fields.title: FinderWave

google_reviews.author: hee y
google_reviews.text:
샵이 깔끔하고, 엄청 친절하십니다!
애월 서핑 생각하시면 파인더웨이브로 가세요~
서핑 1도 모르고 못하는 왕초보였는데, 강습을 너무 잘해주셔서 강습 당일에 바로 보드에서 일어나기 가능했어요🤭

google_reviews.author: 오나성
google_reviews.text: 서핑 초보자인데 사장님 강습 덕분에 정말 만족스러운 시간 보내고 왔습니다. 서투른 부분도 친절하고 상세하게 짚어주셔서 부담 없이 안전하게 배울 수 있었습니다. 초보자 맞춤으로 세심하게 가르쳐 주시는 곳을 찾으신다면 추천합니다. 감사합니다😀

google_reviews.author: Byoung-Mun Min
google_reviews.text:
가족과 함께 처음 서핑을 접했는데
초보자도 쉽게 배울 수 있도록 너무 친절하고
즐겁게 가르쳐 주셔서 너무 좋았습니다.
제주에 오서 경험해 본 것 중에 가장 즐거운 경험이었어요.
제주에 오시면 서핑 꼭 추천드리고
애월항 근처 파인더웨이브 진짜 좋아요 ^^;
완죤 적극 추천합니다~~

google_reviews.author: 이상우
google_reviews.text:
제주 서핑 하면 무조건 또 올 곳. 제주에서 서핑 하면 오지 않을 이유가 없는 곳. 친절한 강사님과 서핑샵이 아닌 듯한 매장 인테리어. 그리고 하나도 찝찝하지 않은 화장실과 샤워실. 관리 잘 하신듯.

듣기로 운영하신지 6년 되었다고 들었는데 시설이나 소모품들을 관리 잘하시는 것 같음. 운동신경 제로인데도 불구하고 사장님의 강습으로 단 두번만에 서핑 성공.

파인더웨이브 덕분에 제주도 서핑의 매력을 느꼈음.

google_reviews.author: 신재광
google_reviews.text:
너무 친절히 잘 알려서 주셔서 성공 했습니다
담에 제주 서핑하러 오면 또 하러 올거 같아요
완전 강추 입니다

google_reviews_en.author: PJ
google_reviews_en.text: My first surfing experience was amazing! The instructor was fun, friendly, and made everything easy to learn. I enjoyed it so much that I went back three times during my stay in Jeju. It was an unforgettable experience, and I’m so happy I discovered a new hobby. Highly recommend to anyone visiting Jeju!

google_reviews_en.author: babysushi
google_reviews_en.text:
This was my first time surfing in Jeju Island, and it was truly memorable. The instructors were patient and friendly, and the teaching process was very reassuring. (They were also incredibly handsome!) The overall environment was very clean, and the equipment was all new. If you're planning a stay in the Aewol area, it's definitely worth a visit! 👍


It was my first time surfing in Jeju Island, and this place was incredibly cool. The instructors were so nice teaching, and it felt really safe surfing. The place is also very clean, and the equipment is new. If you're planning to stay around Aewol, you should definitely visit! 👍

google_reviews_en.author: hee y
google_reviews_en.text:
샵이 깔끔하고, 엄청 친절하십니다!
애월 서핑 생각하시면 파인더웨이브로 가세요~
서핑 1도 모르고 못하는 왕초보였는데, 강습을 너무 잘해주셔서 강습 당일에 바로 보드에서 일어나기 가능했어요🤭

google_reviews_en.author: 오나성
google_reviews_en.text: I am a surfing beginner, but thanks to the owner's lesson, I had a truly satisfying time. He kindly and thoroughly pointed out my clumsy parts, so I was able to learn safely and without pressure. If you are looking for a place that teaches meticulously tailored to beginners, I highly recommend this place. Thank you. 😀

google_reviews_en.author: Byoung-Mun Min
google_reviews_en.text:
I tried surfing for the first time with my family, and it was wonderful because they were so kind and taught us in such an enjoyable way, making it easy for even beginners to learn.

It was the most enjoyable experience I’ve had since coming to Jeju.

I highly recommend surfing if you visit Jeju, and Finder Wave near Aewol Port is really great. ^^;

I totally recommend it!

샤워시설이 친절하고 잘가르쳐 주시고
직원분들이 깨끗해요

google_reviews.author: 김민호
google_reviews.text:
최고의 서핑샵 👍 👍 👍

사장님이랑 직원분들 모두 잘생기시고 강습도 너무 친절하게 잘해주심 🥹

제주도오면 꼭 들려야할 최고의 레저 체험

google_reviews.author: 최재혁
google_reviews.text: 사장님과 직원분들이 정말 친절했어요. 저는 서핑을 처음 배워봤는데 정말 재밌었어요. 샤워 시설도 좋았고 로션, 선크림, 헤어드라이어도 구비되어 있었어요. 즐거운 시간 보내세요!

google_reviews.author: UI BIN SONG
google_reviews.text:
정말 좋은 서핑샵이네요.
사장님도 너무 친절하시고 잘생기셨어요.

google_reviews_en.author: 최재혁
google_reviews_en.text: The boss and staff are really kind. I learned surfing for the first time and had fun surfing. The shower facilities were good and they had lotion, sunscreen, and hair dryers. Have fun.

google_reviews_en.author: UI BIN SONG
google_reviews_en.text:
this is really nice surf shop
very kindly and boss handsome

google_reviews_en.author: 장천익
google_reviews_en.text: The shower facilities are friendly and helpful, and the staff are clean.

google_reviews_en.author: 김민호
google_reviews_en.text:
The best surf shop 👍 👍 👍

The owner and all the staff are handsome, and they are so kind and give great lessons 🥹

The best leisure experience you must visit when you come to Jeju Island

google_reviews.text:
진짜 강사님 친절하심
다시한번 오게된다면 여기서 강습한번 더 듣고 싶음
진짜 초보 서퍼들에게 완전 강추

google_reviews.author: 윤진주
google_reviews.text: 오늘 즉흥적으로 문의 드렸는데 저희 시간에 맞춰 주시고 친절히 안내해주셔서 너무 좋았습니다!! 그리고 강습도 너무너무 좋았어요!! 혼자 탈 수 있는 방법 알려주시고 10번 넘게 밀어주신것 같아요ㅠㅠ 나중에  또 배우러 오고 싶어요 시간가는줄 모르고 탔네요 감사합니다~!

google_reviews.author: Yooja Y.
google_reviews.text: 강사님이 너무 친절하고 좋아요~

google_reviews_en.author: June Keem
google_reviews_en.text:
The instructor is really kind.

If I come back, I want to take another lesson here.

I highly recommend this to beginner surfers.

google_reviews_en.author: 윤진주
google_reviews_en.text: I made an impromptu inquiry today, and it was so nice that you accommodated our schedule and kindly guided us!! And the lesson was also really, really good!! You taught me how to ride alone and pushed me more than 10 times, I think ㅠㅠ I want to come back to learn again later. I rode without realizing the time passing. Thank you~!

google_reviews_en.author: Yooja Y.
google_reviews_en.text: The instructor is so kind and nice~

fields.title: Come on surf
fields.address: 132 Teuhaean-ro, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 경이
google_reviews.text:
사랑채라는 식당 지하실에 위치해있습니다. 이호테우해변 바로앞이라고 하긴 뭐하지만 가깝습니다. 엎어지면 코닿아! 는 아니지만 1~2분으로 정말 가깝고 물먹은 휴지같은 몸을 이끌고갈거기때문에 좀 멀다고 느끼는거지 안멉니다.
친절하시고 재밌고 설명도 잘해주시고 기본기를 탄탄히 잡아놓고 가게 스파르타 혹독하게 해주십니다. 덕분에 파도를 만나고 해변에서 어리바리 하진 않았습니다.
제일 힘든건....수트 입는거...?ㅠㅠㅋㅋ
롱보드로 탔고 파도도 잘 잡아주시고 코칭도 훌륭하셔서 따라만가고 의지가 강하면 할수있습니다.
사진도 증말 많이 잘 찍어주셔서 감사합니다!
샤워시설도 쾌적했고 같은 성별이라고 막 집어넣지 않아 좋았습니다. 혼자서 편안하개 잘 씻었고 수건도 아주아주 넉넉하고 샴푸 린스 바디워시 폼클렌징 클렌징오일까지 다 구비되어있고 드러이기 빗 머리끈 면봉까지 다 있어서 편했습니다.
담이 제주오면 꼭 또 갈 것 입니다.
Activity, 활동적이고 운동을 좋아한다면 꼭 해보시길 추천합니다.

google_reviews.author: 쇼리
google_reviews.text: 강사분들이 다들 너무 친절하시고 섬세하게 잘 알랴주시네요! 다른데 여러군데 다녀봤는데 이만큼 설명이며 잘 해주시는데 없네요! 수트도 샤워실도 엄청 깨끗해요!

google_reviews.author: 신동민
google_reviews.text:
강사님들 너무 친절해요~~
콜라 사이다 계산 하려고 했는데
비용도 안받으시고~~^^
친구 여친이 음료 못마셔서
파워에이드 한개더 마셔도 되냐고
했는데 또 서~~비스 ㅋㅋ
인심도 좋고 너무 만족한 서핑이었어요ㅎ

google_reviews.author: 이상희
google_reviews.text: 적당한 양에 밥도 더 달라면 주시네요!! 기대없이 들어갔다가 친절한 사장님도 만났네요~~

google_reviews.author: 최현지
google_reviews.text:
강사님들도 엄청 친절하시고 시설도 깔끔하게 잘되어있어요
재방문의사100%!!!!!!

google_reviews_en.author: Caroline Lee
google_reviews_en.text: A great surfing instructor! He is very friendly and knowledgeable. We will definitely come back next time we visit Jeju!

google_reviews_en.author: 이건우
google_reviews_en.text: Best surf place ever

google_reviews_en.author: 경이
google_reviews_en.text:
It's located in the basement of a restaurant called Sarangchae. It's not exactly right next to Iho Tewoo Beach, but it's close. It's not like you'd fall over and touch your nose if you fell, but it's really close, just a minute or two. It feels a bit far, but it's not because you'll be dragging your body like wet tissue.
They're friendly, fun, and explain things well. They teach you the basics well, and they make it a Spartan experience. Thanks to them, I didn't have to mess around with the waves or the beach.
The hardest part was... putting on a suit...? ㅠㅠㅋㅋ
I longboarded, and they were great at catching waves. They also provide excellent coaching. Just follow along and if you're determined, you can do it.
Thank you so much for taking so many great photos!
The shower facilities were comfortable, and I liked that they didn't force me into the same-gender group. I was able to wash comfortably on my own, and there were plenty of towels. They provided shampoo, conditioner, body wash, foam cleanser, and cleansing oil. They even had a hairdryer, comb, hair tie, and cotton swabs, which was convenient.
I'll definitely be back next time I'm in Jeju.
If you're active and enjoy exercise, I highly recommend trying it.

google_reviews_en.author: 쇼리
google_reviews_en.text: The instructors are all so kind and explain things very thoroughly! I've been to several other places, but none of them explain things as well as this! The wetsuits and shower rooms are also super clean!

google_reviews_en.author: 신동민
google_reviews_en.text:
The instructors are so friendly~~
I tried to pay for a cola and cider,
but they didn't even charge me~~^^
My friend's girlfriend can't drink,
so I asked if I could have another Powerade,
and they gave me another freebie, lol.
They were so friendly and I had a very satisfying surfing experience.

fields.title: Jeju Kitesurfing, Wing Foiling & eFoiling & SUP
fields.title_ko: Jeju Kitesurfing, Wing Foiling & eFoiling & SUP
fields.address: 923 Hwanhaejangseong-ro, Seongsan-eup, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 최순식
google_reviews.text: 한번쯤 경험해 볼만하지만 제공되는 서비스 대비 가격은 좀   부담됨.

google_reviews.author: hi
google_reviews.text: 최고의 강사님들과 최고의 장소❤️

google_reviews.author: Samuel Pariente
google_reviews.text:
정말 잊지 못할 숙박이었어요! 제주도에서 카이트서핑을 배우려고 맥스와 모니크 부부의 게스트하우스에서 이틀을 보냈는데, 정말 멋진 경험이었어요. 솔직히 이렇게 따뜻한 환대를 받아본 건 처음이에요.

환대와 강습은 최고였어요. 게스트하우스는 아늑하고 편안했으며, 정말 친절한 분들이 운영하셔서 바로 집에 온 듯한 편안함을 느낄 수 있었어요.

맥스는 정말 훌륭한 강사였어요. 그에게서 많은 것을 배웠고, 그의 조언은 정말 큰 도움이 되었어요. 그는 제주도에 대해서도 아주 잘 알고 있어서 카이트서핑이나 윙포일 강습 사이사이에 이 아름다운 섬을 탐험할 만한 곳이나 할 만한 것들을 추천해 주었어요.

이 멋진 분들과 함께하는 숙박을 강력 추천합니다. 꼭 다시 와서 이 특별한 곳을 더 오래 즐기고 싶어요.

google_reviews.author: Peter Hildebrand
google_reviews.text:
오늘 윤 선생님과 함께 카이트포일링 수업을 정말 즐겁게 들었습니다. 제가 개인 웨트슈트를 가져갔는데도 윤 선생님께서 겹쳐 입을 수 있는 웨트슈트를 하나 더 주시더라고요. 3월 중순의 차가운 물에서 웨트슈트를 입으니 정말 큰 도움이 됐습니다. 확실히 좀 쌀쌀했는데, 웨트슈트 덕분에 추위에 떨지 않고 수업에 집중할 수 있었어요.

수업은 해변에서 20분 정도 기본기와 안전 수칙에 대한 설명을 들으며 시작했습니다. 이 짧은 설명 덕분에 물에 들어가기 전에 무엇을 해야 하고 무엇을 예상해야 하는지 훨씬 명확하게 이해할 수 있었습니다.

물 위에서도 윤 선생님께서는 명확하고 친절한 지도를 계속 해주셔서 체계적이고 수월하게 배울 수 있었습니다. 첫 윙포일링 수업이었는데, 제가 이룬 발전에 정말 만족했습니다. 수업이 끝날 무렵에는 탄탄한 기본기를 다지고 앞으로의 수업을 위한 좋은 토대를 마련했다고 느꼈습니다. 전반적으로 아주 만족스러운 첫 경험이었고, 카이트포일링이라는 스포츠를 접할 수 있는 좋은 기회였습니다.

google_reviews.author: Aidan Casey
google_reviews.text: 제주도로 휴가를 갔는데 카이트서핑 강습을 받고 싶었어요. 맥스 선생님을 추천받았는데 아쉽게도 바람이 좋지 않았어요. 하지만 맥스 선생님이 대신 전동 포일 강습을 제안해 주셨는데 정말 환상적이었고, 이제 전동 포일도 배워볼 생각이에요. 맥스 선생님은 정말 최고예요. 차분하고, 설명도 명확하고, 지식도 풍부하고, 무엇보다 재밌었어요. 그리고 맥스 선생님과 그의 사랑스러운 아내 모니크 선생님도 정말 따뜻하게 맞아주셨어요. 기회가 된다면 베트남에서 열리는 겨울 카이트서핑 캠프에도 참가하고 싶어요.

google_reviews_en.author: Samuel Pariente
google_reviews_en.text:
What an incredible stay! I spent two days at Max and Monique’s guesthouse to go kitesurfing in Jeju, and it was an amazing experience. Honestly, I have rarely received such a warm welcome.

The hospitality and the lessons were on another level. The guesthouse is lovely, comfortable, and run by truly kind people who make you feel at home right away.

Max is an outstanding instructor. I learned a lot from him, and his advice was incredibly helpful. He also knows Jeju very well, so between kitesurfing or wingfoil sessions he can give you great recommendations on what to do and where to go to explore this beautiful island.

I can only highly recommend staying with these wonderful people. I will definitely come back and spend more time enjoying this special place.

google_reviews_en.author: Peter Hildebrand
google_reviews_en.text:
had a great kitefoiling lesson with Yoon today. Even though I brought my own wetsuit, Yoon offered me an additional one to layer, which turned out to make a big difference in the mid-March water temperatures. It was definitely a bit chilly out there, so that extra warmth helped me stay focused on the lesson instead of the cold.

We started with about 20 minutes of instruction on shore, going through the fundamentals and safety points before heading into the water. That short session proved extremely valuable once we were out there, as it gave me a much clearer understanding of what to do and what to expect.

Out on the water, Yoon continued to give clear and helpful guidance, which made the learning process feel structured and manageable. For a first wingfoiling session, I was really pleased with the progress I made. By the end, I felt that I had developed solid fundamentals and a good base to build on in future sessions. Overall, it was a very positive first experience and a great introduction to the sport.

google_reviews_en.author: Aidan Casey
google_reviews_en.text: I was on vacation in Jeju and wanted to do a kitesurf lesson. Max was recommended to me but sadly the wind had other ideas. However Max suggested an e-foil session instead, which was fantastic, and which I’m now planning to take up as well. He’s a really first rate instructor - calm, clear knowledgeable and great fun. And he and his lovely wife Monique made me really welcome throughout. If I can I’m going to join their winter kitesurf camp in Vietnam…

google_reviews_en.author: Gioacchino Trovatello
google_reviews_en.text:
Fantastic kite session in Jeju.
Great spot, school and renting place.
Max and Monique are very friendly.
Highly recommend.

google_reviews_en.author: Hudson Trenear
google_reviews_en.text: Yoon was great instructor, Great vibes all day, had some pizzas for lunch. Super accommodating, first time learning and could tell he really enjoyed when you get the hang of it and wants to pass on the wisdom. Is action packed day come prepared and definately bring sunglasses with a strap for the water.

fields.title: Jejebaram windsurfing paddle board
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Cheju, 특별자치도, Seonsa-ro 8-gil, 13-4 삼양해수욕장 상황실 3층 KR 그제바람(제주시요트협회 3층 그제바람
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 제주시 특별자치도, 선사로8길 13-4 삼양해수욕장 상황실 3층 KR 그제바람(제주시요트협회 3층 그제바람

google_reviews.author: Semi Park (Mumin)
google_reviews.text:
네이버 예약 통해서 급하게 예약하고 갔어요. 윈드서핑은 처음이었는데, 체험 코스 10만원 (1시간씩 패들+윈드서핑을 할 수도 있고 2시간 내내 윈드서핑을 탈 수도 있어요. 윈드서핑만 하면 추가금 +2만원) 를 신청했습니다. 국가대표 출신 코치 선생님이 아주 꼼꼼하고 친절하게 잘 가르쳐 주시는데, 선생님 하는 거는 아주 쉬워보였는데 막상 서핑 보드 위에 올라가니 서서 돛을 올리는 것조차 어려웠습니다. 바람을 타고 막 가르고 싶은데 그렇게 잘 타려면 최소 3-4일은 연습해야겠더라구요. 하지만 체험만으로도 윈드서핑이 어떤 느낌인지 배울 수 있었습니다. 수트와 장비도 모두 깨끗했어요.
처음에 알려준 장소로 도착하니 아무도 없어서 당황했는데, 해녀들이 쓰는 간이 탈의실에서 갈아입고 2시간 신나게 배운 후, 끝난 후에는 공용 샤워장 가서 씻고 나옵니다. 공용 샤워장이 거리가 좀 있어서 끝나고 걸어가는게 귀찮았지만 그래도 즐거웠습니다.

google_reviews.author: 웅이
google_reviews.text:
가르쳐 주시는 분. 코치님이 국가대표 선수분이여서 믿고 윈드서핑을 배우러 갔는데 너무 친절하게 하나하나 자세하게 알려주셔서 다치지도 않고 정말 재밌게 윈드서핑 배우다 왔어요!!!
하루만하고 온게 후회가 될 정도입니다. ㅠㅠ
다음번에 제주도 또 놀러가게 되면 지인들 데리고 또 하러 갈께요!! 정말 추천합니다! 제주도 윈드서핑은 그제바람으로~

google_reviews.author: 박민규
google_reviews.text:
제가 육지사람이라 해양레저에 로망이 있어서 이번에 제주여행을 통해 꼭 해보자라는 생각을 갖고있었어요! 그래서 검색을 하다보니 그제바람이라는 곳을 알게 되어서 문의를 드렸더니 친절하게 잘 알려주셨어요 ㅎㅎ 따로 챙겨갈것도 없고 장비도 다 대여해주고 편하게 즐기다 왔습니다!! 혹시나 위험할까봐 걱정되시는 분들! 저도 쫄보라 위험할까봐 겁도 먹었는데 강사분께서 항상 근처에 계시면서 안심시켜주셨어요. 덕분에 안심하고 잘 배울수 있었습니다.
사진도 올리고 싶은데 사진 게시가 안되네요ㅠ
새로운 경험 해보고 싶으신분들 한번 방문해보시는거 강추요!

google_reviews.author: 윤가현
google_reviews.text:
정말 친절하시고 꼼꼼하게 챙겨주셔서
감사합니다.
사진도 너무 잘찍어 주셔서 멋진사진도 많이 건져갑니다! 다음에 꼭 재방문 하겠습니다.

google_reviews_en.author: Semi Park (Mumin)
google_reviews_en.text: I made a last-minute reservation through Naver Booking. It was my first time windsurfing, and I signed up for the 100,000 won trial course (you can choose to paddle and windsurf for an hour each, or spend the entire two hours windsurfing. Windsurfing alone costs an additional 20,000 won). The coach, a former national team member, was very thorough and friendly, and while the instructor's instructions seemed easy, once I got on the board, even raising the sail was difficult. I wanted to ride the wind, but I realized I needed at least three or four days of practice to become that good. However, the experience itself was enough to teach me what windsurfing feels like. The suit and equipment were all clean. I was surprised to see no one there when I arrived at the designated location. I changed in the makeshift locker room used by the haenyeo (female divers) and had a fun two hours of learning. Afterwards, I went to the public showers to wash up. The public showers were a bit far away, so it was a bit of a hassle to walk there afterward, but it was still fun.

google_reviews_en.author: 웅이
google_reviews_en.text:
The instructor. The coach was a national team member, so I trusted him and went to learn windsurfing. He was so kind and detailed, I didn't get hurt, and I had so much fun learning windsurfing!!!
I regret only staying for one day. ㅠㅠ
Next time I visit Jeju Island, I'll bring my friends and go again!! I highly recommend it! Jeju Island windsurfing is the best~

google_reviews_en.author: 박민규
google_reviews_en.text:
I'm a land-dweller, so I've always dreamed of marine leisure activities, and I knew I had to try them during my trip to Jeju! So, while searching, I found a place called Gejebaram. I contacted them, and they were so kind and helpful. Haha, I didn't need to bring anything extra, and they even rented all the equipment, so I was able to enjoy myself comfortably! For those worried about the dangers! I'm a bit of a coward, so I was a bit apprehensive, but the instructor was always nearby, reassuring me. Thanks to them, I was able to learn with peace of mind. I wanted to upload some photos, but they won't let me post them. ㅠ
If you're looking for a new experience, I highly recommend visiting!

google_reviews_en.author: 윤가현
google_reviews_en.text: Thank you so much for your kindness and thorough care. You also took such great photos, so I've got so many wonderful ones! I'll definitely be back again.

fields.title: Iho Surf
fields.address: 1665-10 Iho 1(il)-dong, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Jinhee S
google_reviews.text: 정말 친절하고 다정하셨어요. 잭슨과 함께한 멋진 서핑 레슨이었어요. 게다가, 직원들이 멋진 사진을 찍어주셨는데 정말 멋졌어요. 이호 서핑 가족분들, 감사합니다 :)

google_reviews.author: Matthew Nelson
google_reviews.text: 친절하고 전문적인 강사님들이 있는 훌륭한 서핑 스쿨입니다. 강사님들이 정말 친절하셨고, 저희 가족에게 수면으로 올라오는 연습 시간을 더 주셨어요. 누구에게든 추천하고 싶습니다. 정말 좋은 스쿨이에요! 건물도 예쁘고요.

google_reviews_en.author: Jinhee S
google_reviews_en.text: They were so kind and friendly. Awesome surf lesson with Jackson. Plus, The staff took a picture for us that was amazing as well. Thanks Iho surf fams :)

google_reviews_en.author: Matthew Nelson
google_reviews_en.text: Great surfing school with friendly, professional instructors. They were super kind and allowed my family extra time to practice surfacing. I would recommend them to anyone. It's a wonderful school! Cute building too.

fields.title: badadive
fields.address: 5 Donghong-ro 12beon-gil, 특별자치도, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 강동
google_reviews.text:
레스큐 다이빙 라이선스를 수료했습니다!
파트너와 안전하게 다이빙 하는 것을 목표로 했었는데,
강사님들이 물 밖에서도, 물 속에서도 정확한 프로세스를 찬찬하게 알려주셔서 이틀이라는 짧은 기간임에도 몸에 익을 수 있도록 도와주셨어요!! 여러 강사분들이 시연해주시고 따라하는 방식이라 오랜만에 다이빙 하는 상황이었는데도 자연스럽게 실습 할 수 있었습니다 :)

오픈워터나 어드밴스드 따실 때도 여기서 배우시면 일본이나 필리핀으로 가시더라도 문제 없이 다이빙 즐기 실 수 있을거에요! 강추합니다!!

google_reviews.author: taeeun yoon
google_reviews.text:
처음에는 조금 긴장했는데 막상 바다에 들어가니 완전 다른 세상이 펼쳐졌어요🌊
물도 생각보다 맑고 물고기들도 가까이에서 볼 수 있어서 너무 신기했어요.
강사님도 처음부터 끝까지 친절하게 하나하나 설명해주셔서 초보자인 저도 편하게 체험할 수 있었어요 :)

사진도 예쁘게 남겨주시고 안전하게 잘 챙겨주셔서 좋은 추억 만들고 왔습니다.
처음 다이빙 도전하시는 분들도 부담 없이 꼭 한번 체험해보셨으면 좋겠어요!
다음에 기회 되면 또 하고 싶을 만큼 정말 만족했던 바다 다이브 체험이었습니다🐠✨

google_reviews.author: 휴가
google_reviews.text:
제주도에서 정말로 잊지 못할 다이빙 경험을 했습니다 2일 동안 사라 강사님께 다이빙 교육을 받으면서 많은 것을 배웠어요
처음 배워도 잘 알 수 있을 정도로 친절하고 세심하게 설명해주시고 차분하게 이끌어주셔서 마음 놓고 배울 수 있었어요 전혀 부담스럽지 않고 항상 밝은 에너지로 대해주셔서 감사했습니다!
안전하면서도 즐거운 분위기 속에서 실력을 키울 수 있었고 덕분에 다이빙에 대한 자신감도 많이 올라갔습니다!
좋은 기억 만들어주셔서 진심으로 감사드려요 제주도로 다이빙 오시면 바다다이브로 꼭 오세요!!!😃👍

google_reviews.author: Audrey skin-lab
google_reviews.text:
첫다이브를 했는데 환상입니다
처음엔 불안하고 무서웠는데
현재강사님이 잘 끌어주셔서
성공할수있었어요
너무 만족
담에누교육받아서 입문하렵니다

google_reviews.author: sanghyeok kim
google_reviews.text:
사라 선생님께 배웠습니다. 수영은 전혀 못하는지라 물에 대한 두려움도 좀 있었는데, 너무나도 친절하고 쉽게 가르쳐주셔서 즐겁고 귀한 경험을 시작할 수 있게 됐어요. 그리고 오가며 마주치는 모든 분들이 동료처럼 반갑게 인사해주시는 것도 매우 좋은 기억으로 남습니다.

물에 대해 막연히 두려우시다면 꼭 이곳에서 다이빙에 도전해보시기를 추천해봅니다.

google_reviews_en.author: Ran Ji
google_reviews_en.text: Very nice experience. Maybe next time I will have a night dive here. At first I was so nervous, but the instructor’s patience made me relax. Have a truly good day for scuba diving.

google_reviews_en.author: Timothy Spross
google_reviews_en.text: This is a great dive shop. I don’t dive much - but I feel like they take care of all the small details, like snacks between dive, taking and easily sharing pictures, reminders on diving and setting up for dive. Sa’id and Bossu were really friendly and great to dive with.

google_reviews_en.author: David Lonjon
google_reviews_en.text:
I tried a few diving shops in Seogwipo, and in my opinion, this one is the best for foreigners. Sarah and the other instructors speak excellent English, and they’re all incredibly kind, friendly, and professional. They make you feel genuinely welcome and completely at ease. The shop itself is spacious, clean, and well equipped (the showers are great!) and it’s conveniently located just a few minutes’ ride from the boats.

I’m an Advanced Open Water diver and did four dives with them while renting their gear — two at Beom Island and two at Mun Island. The team had everything prepared in advance and gave clear, helpful explanations before each dive. They even offer a free drink to help prevent seasickness, which was a nice touch. (Ho and also snacks between dives too)

The dives were fantastic. I always felt safe and well looked after with Sarah and her team. Definitely well adjusted also to my level. The sites we visited were full of life — beautiful corals, plenty of fish, and even a few octopuses and squids.

Overall, I had an amazing experience diving with them and would highly recommend this shop to anyone visiting Seogwipo

google_reviews_en.author: Emma Leighton
google_reviews_en.text:
10/2025: I had to go back to Badadive! I recommend booking with them because I feel so welcome and comfortable. They provide snacks and great company. I just completed my advanced training with Heewoon/Sarah! She is so knowledgeable, helpful and kind.

07/2025: Amazing people and the most beautiful dives! The crew looks after you well. They are very knowledgeable and also supply snacks and great company!

google_reviews_en.author: Areeba Abidi
google_reviews_en.text: I did a discovery dive with them, and it was honestly amazing. The staff were super attentive, kind, and genuinely thoughtful the whole time. They even noticed when I was cold and made sure I was comfortable right away, which I really appreciated. Everything felt so smooth and well taken care of, and I felt completely at ease even as a beginner. I’d recommend them 100%—one of the best experiences of my life.

fields.title: Blue Whale Dive
fields.address: 35 Soam-ro, 특별자치도 Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 박지미
google_reviews.text:
강사님께서 친절하게 사전 교육 다 해주셔서 수영 못하시는 분들도 충분히 재밌게 체험하실 수 있어요!
제주도에서 특별한 체험하고싶으신 분들은 꼭꼭 블루웨일다이브에서 즐기세용 강추합니다~!!

google_reviews.author: JH Y
google_reviews.text: 여자친구와 체험다이빙 겸 펀다이빙 진행했는데 김강민 강사님께서 너무 재미있고 안전하게 가르쳐주시고 하나하나 챙겨주셨어요! 저희는 프리다이빙을 경험은 있지만 자격증이 없어서 체험다이빙으로 했지만 현장에서 보시고 펀다이빙 시켜주셨답니다! 덕분에 정말 즐겁게 즐겼어요! 다음에 제주도 오면 또 오려고요 >_

google_reviews.author: Gaeul Han
google_reviews.text: 제주에서 첫 프리다이빙하려고 알아보다가 블루웨일다이브로 결정했는데, 정말 후회없는 선택이었어요. 강사님들 모두 친절하시고 포인트 좋은 곳 잘데려가 주셔서 물고기 짱 많이 봤어요ㅎㅎ 비치,보트투어 두번 진행했는데 만족도 100%

google_reviews.author: 이해랑
google_reviews.text: 처음이라서 긴장했는지 친절하게 안내해주셔서 잘 즐겼습니다. 60세 어머니도 재밌게 잘 즐기셨고 매우 만족해하셨습니다. 날씨도 좋아서 깨끗한 바다를 볼 수 있어서 좋았습니다

google_reviews.author: 김보은
google_reviews.text:
귀여운 로든이와 함께하는 알찬 이론수업!!
첫날부터 부대끼는 수영장이 아닌 넓은 바다에서 여유롭게 진행되는 수업~~!!
대표 강사님 직강!! 옆에서 대표님께서 잘 이끌어주신 덕분에 스테틱 한번에 저와 남편 모두 기준을 통과할 수있었습니다ㅎㅎㅎ

바다에서만 진행 해서 다양한 물고기도 구경하고 더욱 재밌게 배웠습니다!! 잘 놀고 잘 배우고 갑니다! 서울 가서도 알려주신 방법대로 잘 복습 하겠습니다~~  최고최고!!

google_reviews_en.author: Zenia Zheng
google_reviews_en.text: Spontaneously decided one morning to go diving, didn't expect to be able to do it since you usually need to book these things in advance. But Blue Whale diving was really accommodating and fit an afternoon dive for us. It had been over a year since we got certified so we definitely needed a bit of a refresher and huge thanks to Kim who was a great guide. She was very friendly and made sure we were safe and confident. She also helped us capture great photos and videos underwater and we were very lucky to discover a sea turtle!!

google_reviews_en.author: Katy Bristow
google_reviews_en.text:
We did two dives with Kim, and both were really incredible. We hadn’t dived a in a while and Kim was great at reminding us of everything we needed to know and guiding us until we were confident again. She also gave a good brief for the plan of the day.
The dive sites were beautiful, lots of marine life and yellow and purple corals. The organisation of the whole day was very good.

google_reviews_en.author: Karl W
google_reviews_en.text:
🇺🇸 27 June 2025: Blue Whale Dive was a fantastic experience! I rented all my gear, and it worked flawlessly. The staff was timely, efficient, and more than willing to help. You are greeted from the beginning with kindness and respect. They will drive you to the dock where you will take a boat out to the dives sites. One unique aspect of these dives was the use of a lift to exit the water. That machine made it much easier to return to the boat. The only thing more beautiful than the dive spots was my instructor, Kim. She did an amazing job!
Gear rental ✅
Transportation ✅
Great Staff ✅
Good dives ✅
English Lanaguage friendly ✅
Rents gopros ✅

google_reviews_en.author: Núria Cayuela
google_reviews_en.text:
I did two boat dives yesterday with Blue Whale Dive. It all went nice and smooth. Kim is lovely and speaks good english so everything was easy. The purple and yellow soft corals are beautiful and can find some areas with a decent amount of them. We also found some cute nudibranches.
Thanks Kim for the nice time and the pictures :)

google_reviews_en.author: DreamerD
google_reviews_en.text:
Me and my best friend went intro diving here, absolutely fantastic experience to say the least. We got to see a bunch of aquatic life and explore the reefs of Jeju island. The guides Kim and River were super lovely and took great care of us. 10/10

Thank you so much, 🫶
Daniel 😊

fields.title: Jeju FREE Diving School
fields.address: 768 Bomok-dong, 특별자치도, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Ji Ae Kwon
google_reviews.text: 프리다이빙체험 너무 좋았어요! 센터도 이용하기 좋고, 바다도 즐거웠습니다!

google_reviews.author: 강싸부의 프리다이빙 포인트(강싸부)
google_reviews.text:
최고의 제주 프리다이빙 센터!
시설 시스템 그리고 상사님들의 열정이 살아있는
제주의 향기가 있는 곳

google_reviews.author: Toren
google_reviews.text: 저는 지금 한국에 3주째 여행 중인데, 이번 프리다이빙 체험이 여행의 하이라이트였어요. 다이빙을 배우는 것도 정말 재밌었지만, 직원분들이 너무 친절하고 열정적이셨고, 유익한 정보도 많이 알려주셨어요. 영어를 잘 하시는 분들이 많아서 과정을 자세히 설명해주셔서 물속에서 자신감을 얻을 수 있었어요. 필요한 장비도 모두 무료로 제공해 주셨는데 (정말 고품질이었어요), 다이빙 영상도 무료로 찍어주셨어요. 다이빙 강습 후에는 따뜻한 샤워를 하고 다이빙 영상을 함께 볼 수 있었어요. 정말 잊지 못할 경험이었어요. 제주도에서 프리다이빙을 하기에 이보다 더 좋은 곳은 없을 거예요. 이런 곳을 알게 돼서 정말 행운이에요! 제주도를 방문하는 모든 분들께 강력 추천합니다.

google_reviews.author: Sofia d P
google_reviews.text:
제주 프리다이빙 스쿨에서 처음으로 프리다이빙을 경험했는데 정말 최고였어요! 한국에 온 지 일주일밖에 안 됐는데도 팀원들 덕분에 마치 집에 있는 것처럼 편안하게 지낼 수 있었어요.
너무 좋아서 며칠 더 머물면서 다이빙을 즐겼습니다.

직원분들은 정말 친절하고 지식도 풍부해서 제게 필요한 맞춤형 팁을 많이 주셨어요.
장소도 아름답고 평화로웠고, 매트가 깔린 공간을 포함해서 필요한 장비들이 모두 갖춰져 있었어요.

강사님들은 정말 세심하고 열정적으로 가르쳐주셔서 잊지 못할 경험을 할 수 있었고, 많은 것을 배울 수 있었습니다. 다시 방문할 날이 벌써부터 기대돼요!

google_reviews.author: Harold Robins Gallardo Vizcaino
google_reviews.text:
놀라운 곳, 따뜻한 서비스, 그리고 제주 프리다이빙 스쿨의 모든 구성원들이 마치 가족처럼 편안하게 만들어 줍니다. 모든 강사들은 프리다이빙을 연습할 때 최고의 기준을 유지하고, 안전 수칙을 명확하게 적용하며, 프리다이빙뿐 아니라 인생에 도움이 되는 교훈을 주는 방식으로 가르칩니다.

마스터 강과 모든 훌륭한 가족, 그리고 강사분들께 진심으로 감사드립니다.

google_reviews_en.author: Toren
google_reviews_en.text: I have been visiting Korea for 3 weeks now and this free diving experience is the highlight of the trip. Not only was it incredibly fun to learn to dive, but the staff was incredibly friendly, passionate, and informative. Multiple members of the staff spoke English well and explained the process thoughtfully, which gave me great confidence in the water. They also provided all the necessary equipment (it was very high quality) for no extra fee and complimentary video. After the day of learning and diving, we got to take a nice warm shower and look over the video of our dives. It really was an incredible experience. No better place to try and free dive on Jeju. I’m lucky to have found it! I really recommend it to any visitor.

google_reviews_en.author: Sofia d P
google_reviews_en.text:
I loved my first free diving experience with Jeju Freediving School! Even though it was my first week in Korea, the team made me feel like home.
I enjoyed it so much that I extended my stay to dive more days.

The people are wonderful, very knowledgeable and gave me specific tips tailored to my needs.
The place is beautiful and peaceful, with all the necessary equipment, including an area with mats.

The instructors give their full attention and dedication, they made my experience unforgettable, and I learned a lot. I can’t wait to go back!

google_reviews_en.author: Matthew Smith
google_reviews_en.text:
An absolutely amazing place!

Brad, the owner, is friendly, experienced, flexible, and a great teacher. He's the perfect leader for his team of qualified instructors and the vibe at his dive center is legit special. The facilities are clean, safe, and purpose-built. Everything during our four day stay was the perfect balance including safety, hands-on education in the water, necessary classroom theory, great logistical planning & communication via text and face-to-face, and motivational zen community energy. English / Korean bilingual instruction is available.

I recommend staying at the nearby accommodation that is run by the same company. Great price and value, very clean, and helps bolster the community spirit that Brad and his team have cultivated (shout out to DJ, Gyuri, YoungGyeong, JoonYoung, etc).

It's actually difficult to put into words just how special this place is. I can say it was one of the best memories I could make with my daughters and I'm forever grateful for everyone's hospitality and professionalism. 100% I will return.

If you're like me and already scuba-certified or you're just looking for something new, either way this freediving center is worth every penny. Best in Jeju, hands down!

google_reviews_en.author: Petra Petláková
google_reviews_en.text: I had a fantastic experience at this freediving center. The instructor is extremely experienced, kind, and takes a truly individual approach with each student, making sure everyone feels supported and confident in the water. The overall atmosphere of the center is very relaxed and welcoming, with a great chill-out vibe that makes it easy to unwind and enjoy the experience. Highly recommended for anyone looking to learn or improve their freediving skills!

google_reviews_en.author: David Seo
google_reviews_en.text:
Jeju Freediving School is the only place on the island where you can get lessons in English with professional guidance.

I’ve been to 10+ dive shops around the world, and this one stands out for its professional training and friendly atmosphere. Brad, the owner, speaks perfect English, so it was super easy to communicate and learn.

The equipment is in utterly great condition, and they even took GoPro footages for using the latest model, which really helped capture all the fun moments.

I spent three days for training and fundiving here and can honestly say it’s a “5-star shop” that will show you the best of Jeju’s underwater world.

Also special thanks to my instructor, Yeon Oh (IG: @nemofreediving), for her awesome teaching and support :)🙏🏻🙏🏻

fields.title: MJ Jeju Diving Club
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Seogwipo, 특별자치도, 태평로 119-1 107호

google_reviews.author: 박찬진1112
google_reviews.text:
제주에서 오픈워터 받았는데 정재 강사님 덕분에 정말 좋은 경험이었습니다. 다들 친절하시고
질문도 하나하나 잘 받아주시고 이해하기 쉽게 알려주셔서 정말 좋았습니다.
끝까지 차분하게 케어해주셔서 안전하게 잘 마칠 수 있었습니다. 단순히 자격증만 따는 느낌이 아니라 정말 값진 경험으로 남은 교육이었습니다. 감사합니다!”

google_reviews.author: Jason Park
google_reviews.text:
What an experience! I did the Try Diving package. At first I was skeptical as I have never done scuba diving before so I didn’t think I would be able to go very deep and look at many things. I was wrong though! We went down about 15 meters I believe and it was such an amazing experience with such beautiful things to see in the underwater world! One of the best memories on this trip:)

여기서 너무 좋은 시간을 보냈읍니다. 너무 친절하게 챙겨주시고 돼게 큰 추억을 받으셨네요. 다이빙할때 생각보다 많이 깊이 내려가서 깜짝놀랬어요. 좋은 경험을 주셔서 감사합니다~

google_reviews.author: dal_goyo
google_reviews.text: 작년에 MJ에서 오픈워터를 배웠는데 엄청 친절하시고 이해가 쏙쏙 되게 알려주셨어요! 그 기억이 너무 좋아서 올해는 펀다이빙을 하러 방문했습니다. 물 속에서도 물 밖에서도 세심하게 챙겨주시는 햇살같은 선생님들 덕분에 편안하고 안전하게 다이빙할 수 있었어요. 내년에도 내후년에도 또 가고싶어요. 😄

google_reviews.author: 이은지
google_reviews.text: 약감의 물공포증이 있는 타입이었는데 MJ 다이빙 클럽 선생님들 덕분에 편안하고 행복하게 즐길 수 있었어요! 곧 7월에 또 뵙겠습니다!! 최고!

google_reviews.author: 조민영
google_reviews.text:
강사 분들이 친절하고 프로그램이 알차요. 처음 하는 스쿠버 다이빙이라 많이 긴장했는데, 강사분들께서 친절하게 브리핑해주시고 가르쳐주셨어요. 바로 뒤에서 잡고 따라와주셔서 안심하고 체험했네요. 상상도 못한 즐거운 추억 만들었어요💙 고프로로 찍어주신 영상 보고 있으니 지금도 즐거움이 생생하네요!!😆

주차가 편리하고 탈의실, 샤워실을 갖추고 있어요. 장소까지 차로 태워다주셔서 번거로움이 없어요.

10년 이상의 전문가들에게 배우는 다이빙, 엠제이 제주 강력 추천합니다!!👍👍👍

google_reviews_en.author: Gwen Goh
google_reviews_en.text:
MJ & Kim are so friendly and helpful. I lost one of my fins during my first dive and Kim held on to me when he realised that my fin was missing. With Kim being our guide, for the first time, on our 2nd dive, I wasn't afraid and could dive w confidence knowing that someone is looking out for me. A wonderilful trip. Love it w MJ & Kim. Trustworthy and friendly. Will definitely come back.
Oh ya... Jeju waters is worth diving in. Love it.

google_reviews_en.author: Isabella
google_reviews_en.text: I had a lovely experience with MJ Diving!! I took my advanced open water course with instructor MJ, who was very friendly, helpful and supportive. She was happy to answer any questions I had, was a great diving guide and gave me actionable feedback. The diving spots we went to were also incredible. Definitely would recommend to anyone wanting to dive in Jeju!

google_reviews_en.author: Joshua Groves
google_reviews_en.text:
I signed up with MJ Jeju Diving Club having never done any diving before.
I did their Trydiving session which was fantastic, they explained everything and I felt very comfortable the entire time.
I had so much fun and would absolutely recommend then and would use them again personally in future.

Thankyou so much for taking me and for the video footage!

google_reviews_en.author: James Talbott
google_reviews_en.text: I dove with MJ yesterday and it was amazing. She is a fantastic guide and I felt very safe the whole time. The equipment was in good condition and the port is close to the office. The dive itself was a drift dive and easy to do for divers with experience. Lots of tropical fish and more soft corals than you can count. I highly recommended diving with MJ and if you are looking at dive companies in Jeju, look no further!

google_reviews_en.author: Alissa Arlin
google_reviews_en.text:
An unforgettable and boundless happiness! I had the chance to dive in Jeju Island with MJ Jeju Diving Club, and it was absolutely amazing. Even my friend who couldn’t swim was able to experience the thrill of diving safely and comfortably.

I wouldn’t think twice about recommending MJ to anyone planning to dive in Jeju. Your messages will be replied to super quickly — unless MJ is under the sea, of course 😅.

google_reviews.text: 사장님이 너무 친절하시고, 시설도 좋네요.
