google_reviews.author: I love jeju
google_reviews.text:
제주에서 사람이 가장 많은 곳 중 하나
시간이 없어 전 코스를 못갔지만 시간들여 꼭 가볼만한 곳. 왕복 10km넘음. 삼나무숲길과 오솔길 걸으며 힐링하기 좋음

google_reviews.author: JangHoon Chung
google_reviews.text: 자연 산림욕장이고 곧게 뻗은 나무들이 인상적이네요. 밴쿠버나 케냐의 도심속 숲길 같아 가볍게 산책하기엔 좋습니다. 아쉬운점은 좀 더 컸으면 하지만 곳곳에 의자와 누울수 있는 장소가 있어 좋네여.

google_reviews.author: 이길선
google_reviews.text:
제주도 숲길중 단연 최고네요.크고,넓고.웅장하며.정말 아름다운곳이네요.참나무숲길과주변둘러보는길이 넘멋지네요. 고라니들도보이구요,
다시가보고싶은숲입니다 ㅎㅎ

google_reviews.author: 이지연
google_reviews.text: 겨울에 들르는 사려니숲길도 나름 좋네요. 현재 남쪽 출입구만 개방중입니다.

google_reviews_en.author: YOUNGHO GO (DANDDI)
google_reviews_en.text:
It's a very popular trail course and also easy to walk.
I always go here for a walk whenever I visit Jeju island.
If you want to go somewhere to walk in Jeju, first of all, you'd better consider here.
You'll never regret it.

google_reviews_en.author: Damian Frick
google_reviews_en.text: A must-visit spot in Jeju is the artificial forest with towering trees and various trails, perfect for short strolls or longer hikes. The atmosphere is cool and humid, ideal for nature lovers and families. Kids will delight in spotting insects and spiders along the way. The paths, including a barrier-free option, accommodate wheelchairs and strollers. Despite challenging parking, with most spots on the street, the experience is worthwhile. The trail loop starts and ends at a point with facilities including restrooms and food trucks offering refreshments and snacks. This forest is an essential part of the Jeju experience.

google_reviews_en.author: Andreia Carvalho
google_reviews_en.text: Besides being an amazing place for a walk, the park is also accessible to people in wheelchair. They have a cute "wild" library  in the middle. Great place for pictures.

google_reviews_en.author: NooKki
google_reviews_en.text: Very relaxing Cedar tree forest. I wish i visited when the weather is clear! The tracking course is easy to walk and accessible to anyone. The entire course is quite long; one way would take around 1:30 hours.

google_reviews_en.author: Hyeonew Kim
google_reviews_en.text: Me and my friends walked 10.5km on the Saryeoni Forest Trail.  It was a pleasant trek.

fields.title: Seogwipo Forest of Healing
fields.address: 2271 Sallongnam-ro, 특별자치도, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 꽃달고랄라라
google_reviews.text:
서귀포 치유의 숲
자연이 건네는 가장 따뜻한 위로
​제주 서귀포의 깊은 품에 안긴 '치유의 숲'은 이름 그대로 몸과 마음을 정화하기에 완벽한 곳이었습니다. 하늘 높이 뻗은 편백나무와 삼나무 사이로 쏟아지는 햇살은 일상에 지친 마음을 따스하게 어루만져 주었습니다.
​발길이 닿는 곳마다 느껴지는 푹신한 야자 매트와 정갈하게 정돈된 데크 길 덕분에 걷는 내내 온전히 숲의 소리에 집중할 수 있었습니다. 코끝을 스치는 진한 피톤치드 향과 나뭇잎 사이를 지나는 바람 소리는 그 어떤 음악보다 감동적이었습니다. 자연과 하나가 되어 진정한 휴식과 '쉼'의 가치를 깨닫게 해준 이 길을 오래도록 기억하고 싶습니다.

google_reviews.author: 객관이형
google_reviews.text: 제주 숲의 깊이를 온몸으로 느낄 수 있는 서귀포 치유의 숲. 편백과 삼나무 향이 가득한 산책로를 걷다 보니 숨이 저절로 깊어진다. 과하지 않은 오르막, 잘 정비된 길 덕분에 가족과 함께 걷기에도 좋다. 바람 소리와 새소리만 들리는 시간, 복잡했던 생각이 정리되는 진짜 ‘치유’의 공간.

google_reviews.author: me you
google_reviews.text: 입장료 1인 천원, 주차비 2천원으로 힐링할 수 있는 산책숲입니다. 깔끔하게 잘 관리되어 있네요. 여름에 오면 더 좋을 것 같아요.

google_reviews.author: CINDY WE
google_reviews.text:
무더운 여름에도
시원한 바람이 불고
햇볕이 덜해서 걷기 좋아요.

쉴 수 있는 의자
화장실
안내도 등등

관리가 잘 되어있어요.

자율탐방은 평일엔 당일 예약도 가능해요.

1인 1,000원

버스 이용은 가능하나
하루에 4번 다녀요.

google_reviews.author: 배성근
google_reviews.text:
조용하고 시설도 깨끗합니다.

반면 잘 보이지않는 입구때문인지 사람은 적어서 정말 힐링하기 좋은 곳입니다.

여름에도 나무들이 다 햇빛을 막아줘서 시원하고 조용히 쉬다 오기너무 좋습니다.

진정한 힐링을 원한다면 꼭 한번 방문해보시는걸 추천합니다👍👍👍

google_reviews_en.author: Kwan Jamigranont
google_reviews_en.text: Love this forest, its very healing like the name suggested. Such a great walk, several routes and easy walk route as well. Theres also resting benches along the way to enjoy the scenery, or simply to rest. Definitely a place to visit if you are in Seogwipo. We went in the morning and its perfect before it get too warm at noon. Wearing sneakers is a must for entering.

google_reviews_en.author: Vincent Mok
google_reviews_en.text:
Love this park. Ended up coming back for my last day and just spent more time chilling in their healing zones and doing other paths.

It is excellent in terms of the surroundings and how they have the trails maintained - the accessible boardwalk isn't what ive seen elsewhere which is usually a more compromised route, and short. But at 4km of gentle slopes and a proper boardwalk id definitely say this is world class.

For other parts of the park i really appreciated how they had a Kemp rug like flooring which helped with both grip (useful when it was a bit rainy) and also easier to walk..

100% if im back in jeju will repeat again.

1000 won entry is a steal, and if you park your car on the road outside which lots of people do you can skip the parking fees too

google_reviews_en.author: Keane Wee
google_reviews_en.text:
Seogwipo Forest of Healing on Jeju Island is an absolute gem for anyone looking to escape the chaos of daily life and immerse themselves in nature and tranquility. From the moment you enter, you’re greeted by lush greenery, tall trees, and a serene atmosphere that immediately feels restorative. The forest paths are well-maintained and easy to walk, making it suitable for visitors of all ages and fitness levels. There’s a gentle mix of wide trails for leisurely strolls and narrower paths that invite you to explore more intimately.

What makes this forest truly special is the sense of mindfulness it inspires. There are designated areas for meditation, quiet reflection, and even forest bathing, allowing you to connect with the environment in a deep, almost therapeutic way. The air is crisp and fresh, with the faint scent of pine and flowers filling the senses, and the ambient sounds of birds, rustling leaves, and distant streams create an incredibly calming natural soundtrack. Benches and small rest areas are thoughtfully placed along the trails, giving you spots to pause and fully take in the peaceful surroundings.

The facilities are clean and well-managed, including restrooms and informational signage that provide guidance on the forest’s features, flora, and wellness practices. The staff are friendly and welcoming, often offering helpful tips on the best trails or the optimal times to experience the forest’s natural beauty. Seasonal variations bring unique charm—spring blossoms, summer greenery, autumn foliage, and the quiet stillness of winter each offer a distinct experience, making repeat visits feel fresh and rewarding.

For anyone visiting Jeju Island, Seogwipo Forest of Healing is more than just a tourist spot—it’s a sanctuary for the mind, body, and spirit. Whether you’re looking to take a slow, contemplative walk, meditate, or simply enjoy the beauty of nature, this forest delivers on every level. It’s easy to see why it’s beloved by locals and travelers alike. Highly recommended for anyone seeking peace, natural beauty, and a genuine connection with the outdoors.

google_reviews_en.author: Jason L
google_reviews_en.text: This is a beautiful forest that is  worth a visit Well maintained and interesting hiking paths with wooden lounge chair for you to rest when you are tired from walking The overall experience is unforgettable

google_reviews_en.author: Rang Rang
google_reviews_en.text:
This Forest of Healing is calling me back to Jeju... I unfortunately could only spend an hour here, when I could have done at least 4 hours or more!

Wear covered shoes
No food / picnics allowed

Parked along the main road (you'll see plenty others) and took a small pathway in to pay for an admission ticket & off we went! (Reservations were not required when I went in May'24).

A staff at the trail head told us where to go (take the boardwalk on right first) - this boardwalk is definitely doable for seniors & wheelchair bound visitors.

Loved the resting spots, where one lays and listens to the wind blowing n trees rustling.

Can't wait to return!

google_reviews.text:
100미터도 안되는 목장입구길이지만, 숲길 분위기 내기좋은, 사진 스팟으로 추천합니다.

google_reviews.text:
제주도 최애 장소이고 세번 방문.
붉은오름쪽 입구로 들어가면 큰 길에 주차하고 가기도 편하고 입구에 푸드트럭이 있어서 간단하게 요기도 할수있다.
내가 갔던 날은 다 날씨가 좋아서 최고의 사진과 풍경을 감상할수있었고 날이 좋지 않아도 기대되는 곳이다.

#유한킴벌리 #우리강산푸르게푸르게 #고맙숲니다

google_reviews.text: 일부 구간만 돌아도 충분히 아름다운 곳이어서 여러번 방문하게 됩니다. 누구나 어렵지 않게 즐길 수 있게 되어있어서 전체를 돌아도, 일부만 돌아도 좋았던 것 같아요. 일부만 경험하시고자 한다면 붉은 오름쪽으로 가시는 것을 추천드립니다.

google_reviews_en.author: Kuromi Meili
google_reviews_en.text: I hiked here from one entrance to another exit. But on the day I went, the weather was very good and not hot. I walked to enjoy the forest atmosphere on both sides. The sound of waterfalls, the wind blowing leaves and the sound of birds singing made me feel very good. I walked for about 3 hours. It was my first time hiking.

google_reviews_en.author: 황광현
google_reviews_en.text:
100미터도 안되는 목장입구길이지만, 숲길 분위기 내기좋은, 사진 스팟으로 추천합니다.
샤이니숲길이라 불리고 있고, 사려니숲길은 아닙니다. 숲길도 하이킹코스도 당연아니고요^^

google_reviews_en.author: Jiyeon Bae
google_reviews_en.text:
This is my favorite place in Jeju Island, and I've visited three times.
If you enter through the Red Oreum entrance, parking is convenient on the main road, and there's a food truck at the entrance, so you can grab a quick bite.
The weather was perfect every day I visited, allowing for stunning photos and breathtaking views. Even on a cloudy day, it's still a place to look forward to.
The deck and path are well-maintained, making it an easy stroll for both the elderly and children!!!
#YuhanKimberly #KeepOurCountryGreen #ThankYouForest

google_reviews_en.author: yj J

🌳The forest I always want to visit whenever I go to Jeju Island #SaryaniForest!

🌳I can't believe there's such a wonderful place in our country!?

🌳It's beautiful when the sunlight shines through the trees, and it's charming and wonderful even when it rains!

🥹Let's be together for a long time, Sariani~
#YuhanKimberly #KeepOurCountryGreen #ThankYouForest

google_reviews_en.author: 오재환
google_reviews_en.text: It's a place with really pretty trees, but the road was frozen when I went, so it was dangerous.

google_reviews.author: 전평수
google_reviews.text:
2월 말 4코스를 계획하고 제주에 갔는데... 날씨 상황도 그렇고 갑작스런 자료요청에 호텔방에서 일만하다 올라온게 억울해서 당일치기로 가능한, 제주공항에서 가까운 17코스를 급선택 하여 도전...
버스로 출발점을 찾아가는 길에 우겨곡절도 있었지만 출발지인 광령1리 사무소에서 외도까지는 비교적 완만한 내리막길이라 좋고, 외도 부터는 거의 해안도로를 따라 걸어서 좋음.
특히 해안도로는 익숙한 길이지만 차가 아닌 도보로 이용하다보니 새로운 느낌!
중간 즈음에 있는 도두봉은 야산 정도에 불과하지만 저질체력자가 거의 8~9km이상 걷고 오르자니 살짝 힘에 부침 ㅠㅠ.  하지만 오르고 나면 한라산과 제주 바다를 볼수 있는 전망대에서 보는 제주공항 활주로에서의 이착륙 광경은 참 볼만함.
여튼 완만한 내리막을 내려와 외도부터는 도두봉을 제외하면 거의 완만한 코스로 이루어져 크게 부담 없이 다닐 수 있어 좋았음...^^

제가 여기 제주도 지도는 아무리 3차원으로 대입을 시켜 이해를 하려고 해도 이해 할 수가 없거든요
이호태우해변이 소방서에서 내려가서 레비켜고 어찌 찾았는데 그 옆이 함덕이되었어요

google_reviews.text:
해안과 도심을 즐길수 있는
코스

google_reviews.author: 싸나이
google_reviews.text:
길을알려주는 리본과화살표가너무부족해요
동문시장안에서는 힘들게 화살표를찿았고 동문시장나와서는 찿을수가없네요

google_reviews_en.author: Jia Moon
google_reviews_en.text:
Wow, what an adventure!
Beautiful coastal sights, you'll be constantly pulling out your camera for the countless photo opportunities!

Be warned, while not a challenging walk for elevation changes, this is a super Loooonnngg walk...18.4 km!

I suggest going at a nice pace and stopping at the several cafes, stores and sightseeing places along the way.

The last 3km were killer for me...sheer pride made me finish. My legs were cramping at the end and I am still sore today (1 day after!).

This trail passes many beaches, bridges, lighthouses, countless cafes, touristy stores, the Jeju airport, and the list goes on...

I definitely recommend this trail. The coastal views are spectacular!

I found myself so thankful and quite obsessed towards the end with the blue and orange Olle markers.
It was all worth it once the trail opened up to the Dongmun Traditional Market.

I shopped and ate like I was celebrating something...like a 18+ km trek!
Haha
Enjoy!!
🧡💙🧡💙🧡💙🧡

google_reviews_en.author: Chlotus
google_reviews_en.text: Olle Trail Route 17 is one of my favorites. It passes some popular sights, Iho beach, Yongduam rock, then takes you into the city, and finishes at Dongmun market. You can have seascapes, pony lighthouses, and city views at the same time. All on route 17!

google_reviews_en.author: 전평수
google_reviews_en.text:
I went to Jeju at the end of February, planning to do four courses... The weather was bad, and a sudden request for information made me feel bad about having to come up from my hotel room after just working, so I quickly chose Course 17, which was close to Jeju Airport and a day trip.
There were some twists and turns on the bus ride to the starting point, but the relatively gentle downhill slope from the Gwangnyeong 1-ri office to Oedo Island was pleasant. From Oedo Island, it was a pleasant walk along the coastal road.
The coastal road was a familiar path, but walking instead of driving felt refreshing!
Dodubong Peak, located halfway up, is just a small hill, but for someone with limited stamina, the 8-9km hike up was a bit tiring. However, once you reach the top, the view from the observation deck overlooking Hallasan Mountain and the Jeju ocean is truly spectacular, with views of takeoffs and landings on the Jeju Airport runway.
Anyway, the gentle descent from Oedo Island, with the exception of Dodubong Peak, made for a relatively gentle course, making it a pleasant hike without much effort...^^

google_reviews_en.author: U L
google_reviews_en.text: I had a pleasant walk.

google_reviews_en.author: 김현숙
google_reviews_en.text:
No matter how hard I try to understand this Jeju Island map in 3D, I can't.
Iho Taewoo Beach is located near the fire station, and I'm looking for it. But it's right next to it.
I wandered for a while to a quiet place near Hamdeok to buy tools in Hwabuk. But it's right next to Hanareum Hospital.
Every time I go to Yeonbuk-ro next to City Hall, the road loops around.

fields.title: Seoubong Trail
fields.address: 199 Hamdeok-ri, Jocheon-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: U L
google_reviews.text:
굳
서우봉 트레일코스는 제주 올레길 중 하나인 제주 올레길 19코스와 연결되어 있어 걷는 재미를 더해주는 산책로다. 서우봉은 높지 않은 오름이라 부담 없이 오를 수 있으며, 초입부터 이어지는 완만한 길 덕분에 가볍게 자연을 즐기기에 좋다.

특히 정상까지 오르지 않아도 중간 정도만 올라가면 함덕해수욕장의 에메랄드빛 바다가 시원하게 펼쳐지는 것이 큰 매력이다. 짧은 시간 투자로도 충분히 아름다운 풍경을 감상할 수 있어 시간 여유가 많지 않은 여행자에게도 제격이다. 바람을 맞으며 천천히 걷다 보면 자연스럽게 마음이 편안해지고, 제주 바다의 매력을 가까이에서 느낄 수 있는 힐링 코스로 추천할 만하다.

google_reviews.author: Happy Jeong's Moment
google_reviews.text: 함덕해변과 유채꽃이 어우러져 너무 아름다운 곳입니다. 둘레길을 걷는내내 에매랄드바다와 유채꽃을 볼 수 있어용. 둘레길의 끝은 나무가 터널을 이룬 숲이고 계단이 많아요.

google_reviews.author: BEUMJOON KIM
google_reviews.text: 보통 소노벨에 많이 묶는데 그 이유 중 하나가 이 둘레길이다. 힘들지 않으면서도 너무 아름다운 바다를 볼 수 있다. 글라이딩을 하는 분도 많아 이채롭다.

google_reviews.author: 엠비티아이티
google_reviews.text:
제주도 올때마다 꼭 들리는곳. 일몰 장소로도 좋구요.
계절에 따라 꽃들이 만발하는곳. 정말 훌륭합니다.

google_reviews.author: 남영순
google_reviews.text: 해변도로 해안도로가펼쳐진서우봉둘레길 해수욕장도있어서 사람들도많고 이국적인장소이네요

google_reviews_en.author: Tan. W
google_reviews_en.text:
All the signs are in Korean, and Google Translate didn’t help much, so we had to match the characters ourselves and make our best guesses along the way.

Do note that the photos shown on Google Maps aren’t always accurate — many of them are taken along the trail rather than at the actual summit. I’ve included captions showing what the summit really looks like so you can decide if it’s worth the climb.

We hiked to both summits marked on the map. The higher one offers a more rewarding view, though some parts are blocked by trees. The initial climb is the toughest and where most people slow down, but once you reach the steady upslope, turning around gives you a beautiful view. Otherwise, the best views are during the descend in my photos here.

google_reviews_en.author: Billy Lim
google_reviews_en.text:
Seoubong Trail is a great choice if you're looking for an easy and scenic hike in Jeju. The trail is relatively gentle, with an elevation of around 107 meters — manageable for most people, even beginners.

The path is well-maintained, making it perfect for a casual walk or light hike. Along the way, you'll be rewarded with beautiful views of the coastline and surrounding nature. It was quite windy during our visit, which made the hike feel refreshing and added to the experience.

Overall, it’s a peaceful trail with stunning scenery — a perfect way to enjoy the outdoors without too much effort. Definitely worth checking out if you're in the area!

google_reviews_en.author: Rej Argueza (Yohan Soloklista)
google_reviews_en.text: Nice view and not too crowded. The beach view is also amazing.

google_reviews_en.author: Moses Cannone
google_reviews_en.text:
Nice beach and nice trails.
The view of the beach from up high is beautiful rain or shine!

google_reviews_en.author: Long Nguyen (Thanh)
google_reviews_en.text: Good view of Hamdeok. Went early on a September morning to avoid the humid heat.

fields.title: Jeju Land ATV & Horseback Riding (Yoke Riding Center ATV)
fields.address: 2815 Nansan-ri, Seongsan-eup, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 나현
google_reviews.text:
ATV 진짜 강추합니다 !!
제주도 오면 다들 승마하신다고 하시는데 승마는 그냥 짧아서 돈 더 내고 저는 ATV 추천드려요 :)
사장님이 저희 둘밖에 없어서 그냥 더 재밌게 해주시고 이야기도 재밌게 해주시고 사진도 너무 잘 찍어 주셨어요 !!!
담에 재방문 의사 1000% 있습니다 !

google_reviews.author: 김하은
google_reviews.text: 승마 도우미님도 괜찮고 승마 코스나 거리 시간도 괜찮네요. 도우미님이 설명을 재밌게 해주셔서 재밌었네요. 출발전 사진도 찍어 주시는데 인화 기술이 기가 막혀요! 사진도 잘 뽑히고 더불어 액자도 돼요! 저같은 경우엔 사진만 인화했는데 15000원이예요. 사진도 예쁘게 잘 찍어주셔서 좋습니다! 한적한 길에서 말을 타며 걸으면 스트레스도 풀리네요! 추천드립니다^^

google_reviews.author: marisophia Lee
google_reviews.text:
비추비추
사진강요안한다  떡하니 적혀있는것부터 은근 강요
아이들 사진 특히 그런듯하구요
사진장사좀  안했음 좋겠어요
여기 블로그니 네이버 리뷰도 업체 통해
쓰신것인가요
기분만 상했어요
재미없었답니다
승마장 이름도 뷰제주하늘인데 수정해야겠어요
가식친절도  안좋아요

google_reviews.author: 요술램프지니
google_reviews.text:
1월 행사로 ATV오프로드 15분(1인3만원)을 잘 타고나오면 승마 맛보기 탑승무료가 있어서 재미있게 타봤습니다
운전할줄아는 성인20살~50세(여성)이면 ATV를 탑승운전 할수있습니다(참고:운전후 손바닥과 손가락이 힘이 풀려요~타보시면 압니다)
말먹이 당근4조각은 2천원이네요
사모님이 친절하셔서 즐거운 시간을 보냈습니다
다음에 다시 또 방문할 의사가 있습니다

google_reviews.author: 뾰로롱
google_reviews.text:
조금 무섭긴하지만 적응하는데 몇분안걸려요!  많이위험하지도않고
처음이신분들도 부담없이 즐길수있어요!!

google_reviews_en.author: Ms Chua
google_reviews_en.text: If u ride atv, horse riding is free. Thats fake. No discount for taking both. Booking online is cheaper. Very unfriendly ahjussi except the ahjummas. Cant speak much english. They help u take 1 photo during ride and you can choose to buy additional photo at 20000 won. Gd experience though. Very big area

google_reviews_en.author: Miss_ LHX
google_reviews_en.text: Able to do both ATV & horse riding after the UDO boat got cancelled due to bad weather. It was really fun though! Horse riding you get to see nice scenery. While ATV course was quite adventurous with rocks & grass.

google_reviews_en.author: Noya
google_reviews_en.text:
I paid 50,000 won for 20 mins ride but they didn’t allow me to take my phone to take any pics while riding ,the only pics i took was what they took of me and they want me to pay additional money for that so i refused .
Other than that the ride was fine so i gave it one ⭐️

google_reviews_en.author: Monica Bushey
google_reviews_en.text: This is a perfect place to go if you're new to horse riding or if you want to give it a shot. For experienced riders, you're given a couple of minutes at the end to ride whatever gait you want! I really enjoyed the views and the ride and the staff were incredibly friendly. Definitely a nice stop to put in your travel plans if you're in Jeju!

google_reviews_en.author: Adel
google_reviews_en.text:
great experiences! you can opt to drive the ATV yourself (if age between 19-65 and has a driver's license) OR have the staff drive while you seated behind.
For those within the age but without driver's license, you will have a short practice session for the owner/staffs to deem is you are qualified to drive the ATV yourself.

fields.title: Neodo Nado ATV
fields.address: 393 Myeongnim-ro, 봉개동 Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Apple Jeong
google_reviews.text: 교관님이 친절하시고 ATV 재미있어요. 엑티브한거 좋아하시면 꼭 체험해 보시길 추천합니다! :D

google_reviews.author: ingmo
google_reviews.text:
친절하시지만 수련원을 개조한 코스의 한계가 아쉽다
다만 노약자에겐 오히려 좋은점일수도.

google_reviews.author: 임태훈
google_reviews.text:
사장님 친절하시고, 시간도 넉넉하게
주셔서 대만족입니다
멋진경험이었습니다

google_reviews.author: SH
google_reviews.text: 넘재밌었어요!  사이사이 사진도 찍어주시고 여튼 돈아깝지않았어요

google_reviews_en.author: Apple Jeong
google_reviews_en.text: The instructors are friendly and ATVs are fun. If you like active activities, I highly recommend giving it a try! :D

google_reviews_en.author: ingmo
google_reviews_en.text:
They are kind, but it is a shame that the course is a converted training center.

However, this might actually be a good thing for the elderly and infirm.

google_reviews_en.author: 임태훈
google_reviews_en.text: The owner was very kind and gave me ample time. I was very satisfied. It was a wonderful experience.

google_reviews_en.author: SH
google_reviews_en.text: It was so much fun! They even took pictures for us in between, so it was worth the money.

fields.title: Daeyoo Land (ATV Hunting & Shooting)
fields.address: 144 Sangye-dong, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: stone cold
google_reviews.text:
가성비는 그닥
너무 빨리 신호를 줘서 16발이 순식간에 끝남
날아가는 표적물에 적중했을 때는 짜릿함

google_reviews.author: space return
google_reviews.text: 클레이사격 권총사격 소총사격 ATM 타고 하는 꿩사냥 등 화약냄새 그리울 때 가서 스트레스 풀기 정말 좋은 곳입니다. 가시기전에 신분증 꼭 잊지마세요. 신분증 없으면 발길을 돌리는 수 밖에 없어요.

google_reviews.author: 어떠노 (어떠노)
google_reviews.text:
다양하게 스트레스 확 풀리고 딱 좋아요.
누구나 쉽게 재미있게 돈으로 즐길수 있어요.
남자들 끼리라면 내기 하셔도 좋을듯 하네요.
조경도 나름 깔끔하게 잘 정돈 되어 있어요.
가격은 간단하게 정리 해드리면
권총. 소총은 12발에 35000원
베레타(산탄) 16발에 39000원
ATV(사륜오토바이) 4킬로 35000원. 6킬로 50000원. 8킬로 80000원으로 즐길 수 있습니다.

google_reviews.author: seacloud Kim
google_reviews.text: 권총사격 클레이사격을 했는데, 직원들 친절하고 화약냄새 좋고.., 색다른 경험을 할 수 있습니다.  제주 올 때마다 총 쏘러 오는데, 괜찮은 아이템인데 대유에서 시설투자를 안하나봐요.  올 때마다 사람이 더 적어지고 한산해지는 것 같아요.  몽베르 골프장 자주가서 친근하게 느껴지는데, 여기도 투자 좀 하세요... ㅎㅎㅎ

google_reviews.author: 정현호
google_reviews.text:
혹시들 군대에서 말고 사격 해보신적 있으신지요?  태어나서 한번도 총 못쏴보고 죽을수도 있습니다.  그런분들은 제주도에 가면 남녀 모두 14세 이상이면 사격을 해볼수 있는 곳이 있어요
제가 알기론 왠만하면 거의 모든 실탄 사격장이 실내에 위치하여 있지만
이곳은 atv타는 곳까지 넓은 공간을 가지고 있어 실내에서는 쏘지만 표적지는 실외에 있습니다.

티비 영화 드라만에서 부자집도련님들이나 회장님이 하시는 클렝이사격
고 소리에 접시가 2번 지나가면 빵빵 두발을 쏠수 있습니다. 접시가 슝하고 빨리 지나가서 맞추기가 힘이 들지만 맞추었을때의 쾌감은 말로 표현이 힘들어요

권총은 군대 같다온 남자들도 쏴보기 힘든데 이곳에서는 38구경 스미스 45구경까지 준비되어 있어서 원하는 총으로 사격이 가능합니다. 친구들끼리 가벼운 점수 내기해도 재미있네요

google_reviews_en.author: SL Wong
google_reviews_en.text:
👍:
-This area is more like a mini theme park where you can experience shotgun shooting/ Rifle shooting/ pistol shooting/ Atv riding
-I would recommend trying the shotgun shooting as it's not just at a rifle range. It's kind of outdoor, where they fire a clay plate for you to aim and shoot. Very interesting, the staff there were professional and will guide you along as well. It felt safe.

👎:
-Nothing, loved it!

google_reviews_en.author: Balasubramanian G
google_reviews_en.text:
A place that we did not think we would enjoy but ended up having an absolute blast. They provide a range of outdoor entertainment options like ATV and horse riding. We opted for the ATV as it sounded more fun and it sure did.
The ride time was good for the demanding price (which is high to be honest). But I got an experience that I have not had before. A must visit recommendation in Jeju. The only catch is that it is located quite a bit away from the main city and might take a while to reach in a car.

google_reviews_en.author: Wei Quan Mu
google_reviews_en.text: 35,000 won for 12 bullets pistol. Great experience. Require passport and also signature for some sort of information

google_reviews_en.author: Hyojung Ashley Kim
google_reviews_en.text: Great place to relieve your stress. It costs 35000 won for a dozen pellet.

google_reviews_en.author: Timothy Desmond
google_reviews_en.text:
You can shoot guns or ride off-road vehicles here,  for a premium. Definitely for tourists. You can spend a thousand dollars ($1,000 or ₩1,000,000) here in a few hours between the ammunition costs and the ATV costs.

The pistol shooting gives you 12 rounds and then you have to pay again.  They also have clay pigeons as well as a rifle range.

I chose a 9mm Smith and Wesson and it was entertaining but over very quickly.

Because it's Korea your gun is locked to a double chain and is loaded by the technician, who watches over your shoulder in a locked blind with you.  Only one person is allowed to shoot at a time so if you have 10 friends you have to go one at a time,  12 rounds each.

It is nothing like going to American range. If you're from a country where you don't have the opportunity to shoot and your in jeju then give it a shot, but otherwise it's kind of a ripoff.

fields.title: Saebyeol ATV
fields.address: 산65 Donggwang-ri, 대정읍 특별자치도 Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 서귀포시 특별자치도 대정읍 동광리 산65

google_reviews.author: DONGHUN LEE
google_reviews.text:
제주 액티비티 중 다섯 손 안에 들어가는 신남 맛집.
직원분이 친절하고 재밌습니다.
새별오름 코스 탔는데 오름을 직접 오르는건 아니고, 오름 밑까지 갑니다. 약 40분 왕복 후 10분 자유시간 있었습니다. 예약 후 방문 추천드립니다.
Exciting sports in jeju :)

google_reviews.author: Younkwan Lee
google_reviews.text:
최고의 액티비티 중 하나!

9.81파크 가려다가 예약마감때문에 대체로 이곳으로 왔는데 더 좋았습니다. 적당한 직선주행로와 오프로드가 잘 구성되어있습니다.

처음에 되게 허름해서 이게 맞나 싶었지만 가면 옷이랑 헬멧 바로 대여가능합니다.

생각보다 주행하면 옷이 심하게 더러워져서 아예 새옷을 따로 준비하시는걸 추천드립니다. 흰티입으면 그냥 다 배린다 생갇하시면 됩니다. 옷으로 가려도 먼지가 엄청 많아요.

그리고 생각보다는 위험하니 이점은 참고해서 안전하게 운전하시길. 저는 혼자 나무에 박았는데 헬맷덕분에 살았습니다.

그래도 최고의 경험이고 다른분들과 올때도 또 갈거고 추천할겁니다.

google_reviews.author: 원혜진
google_reviews.text:
오름투어 예약해서 한시간 열심히 달렸습니다 ^_^
여자 혼자 왔어도 재밌게 타다 갈수 있어요!!
가이드 분이 너무 친절하시고, 사진 예쁘게 찍어주셔서 좋은 기억 남기고 갑니당 ㅎㅎ 가을에 또 와야겠어요!

google_reviews.author: AfreecaTV ping
google_reviews.text:
큰코스였음 좋았는데 그래도 잼있었어요 미끄러지는것도있었지만
잼있었어요ㅎ

google_reviews.author: 유진의
google_reviews.text: 너무 즐거웠습니다 사장님도 너무 좋으셔서 즐거운 시간 보내구 가욤 ㅎㅎㅎ처음타봤는데 개 재밋어용 ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ경치도 아주 좋았어용

google_reviews_en.author: DONGHUN LEE
google_reviews_en.text:
One of the top five most exciting activities in Jeju.

The staff are friendly and fun.

We took the Saebyeol Oreum course; however, we didn't actually climb the hill itself, but went to the base. After a round trip of about 40 minutes, we had 10 minutes of free time. I recommend making a reservation before visiting.

Exciting sports in Jeju :)

google_reviews_en.author: Younkwan Lee
google_reviews_en.text:
One of the best activities!

I was planning to go to 9.81 Park, but it was sold out, so I ended up here instead. It's a good mix of straight tracks and off-road terrain.

At first, it looked a bit run-down, so I wasn't sure if this was the right place, but you can rent clothes and helmets right there.

Your clothes will get really dirty after driving, so I recommend bringing new clothes. If you wear a white T-shirt, you'll just get all wet. Even with clothes, there's still a lot of dust.

It's also more dangerous than you might think, so keep that in mind and drive safely. I crashed into a tree by myself, but I survived thanks to my helmet.

Still, it was a great experience, and I'd go again with others and recommend it.

google_reviews_en.author: 원혜진
google_reviews_en.text:
I booked a mountain climbing tour and rode hard for an hour. ^_^
Even a solo woman could have fun!
The guide was so kind and took such beautiful pictures that I'll have great memories. I'll have to come back in the fall!

google_reviews_en.author: AfreecaTV ping
google_reviews_en.text: It was good that it was a big course, but it was still fun. There were some slippery parts, but it was fun.

google_reviews_en.author: 유진의
google_reviews_en.text: I had so much fun. The owner was so nice, so I really enjoyed my time here hehe. It was my first time riding it and it was super fun hehehehehe. The scenery was great too.

fields.title: Jungmun Off-Road Experience Center
fields.address: Seogwipo-si, South Korea

google_reviews.author: DS Kim
google_reviews.text:
야외복 무상대여해 줘서,
말도 오랜만에 탔습니다.
서열1위 말도 타고 랭글러로, 오프로드주행 신나게 즐겼네요.
업체 사장님이 차를 좋아해서 말들 이름도 전부 자동차 브랜드네요.

google_reviews.author: 김규태
google_reviews.text:
어린이, 어른, 분들 오세요! 요기 진짜 꿀잼 입니다.
어린이분들은 승마 타면 많이 좋아합니다! 말 먹이주기체험도 있고 말 탈수도 있고 말과 사진 찍을수 있습니다.
어른분들은 ATV(사륜오토바이), 버기카, 지프랭글러(오프로드) 탈수 있습니다, 참고는 ATV는 17세이상 다 가능하고용
버기카 또는 지프랭글러 는 운전면허증 있어야지 탈수 있습니다! 가다가 서서 사진도 찍고 맑은 날씨때 타십쇼!

google_reviews.author: 코로나매니아
google_reviews.text: 평소 육지에서 보지못한 바퀴커다란 차도 있고 사륜오토바이도 초딩이는 재미있어했네요 평지긴한데 돌길이라 속도나 스릴은 산악에서 타는것보다 재미지진 않아요.승마체험도 같이할수있어 좋았습니다.단 큰개가 2마리 풀어져서 다녀요 손님한분이 예쁘다고 가까이가니 개가 으르렁거리고 주인은 그런개를 풀어놓고도 그 손님한테 개를 왜만지냐며 짜증을 내내요....@@아니...우린 무서워도 아무말 안하고 개를 피해다녔는데...개가 쇼파에 올라와서 자기 때문에 쇼파 앉으실때는 개가 쓰는 쇼파라는거 감안 하시고 앉으세요 친절은 거리가 먼곳인점 참고하세요

google_reviews.author: 박초희
google_reviews.text: 버기카 탔어요 같이 탄 일행, 모르는 일행 전부 여기저기서 재미없다고 수근수근……싼 가격도 아니고 비싼 체험비에 오프로드 의미가 없는 10키로 미만 속도로만 체험 해야합니다~가격을 낮추던 속도 제한을 풀어야 합니다 ~ 절대 비추입니다ㅠㅠ돈 아껴서 회 사먹…. 10명은 배부르게 먹을 수 있어요^^

google_reviews.author: 쭈쭈뉴뉴
google_reviews.text: 너무 잼있다능ㅎ 비오는날 타면 대박일거같다능ㅎㅎ 요거슨 꼭 타야한다뇨뇨뇨~~~

google_reviews_en.author: Joseph Luerssen
google_reviews_en.text: Disappointed, not friendly to foreigners, if you are not Korean you are not welcome here!!!

google_reviews_en.author: Shan Hen
google_reviews_en.text: Love the experience. Their english wasn’t the best but we managed to understand each other. This establishment allows foreigners to rent buggies compared to others, maybe insurance concerns but we decided to ride ATVs instead. Appears to be family owned which is great when supporting local businesses during the off season. I highly recommend.

google_reviews_en.author: Suchan Kim
google_reviews_en.text: Never rode an ATV before but it was a new and fun experience! The guides were nice and friendly, would definitely come back again!

google_reviews_en.author: Subin Kim
google_reviews_en.text: Kind and competent staff. Nice ATV course and a fun ride!

google_reviews_en.author: SB ong
google_reviews_en.text: Excellent service. Could communicate in Chinese with the staff.

fields.title: Jeju Sorang ATV
fields.address: 1631-1 Hannam-ri, Namwon-eup, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 올리브
google_reviews.text:
제주 ATV 사륜오토바이.체험 !̆̎ !̆̎
평범하겠지 라고 셍각했는데 완전 다이나믹하고
신나신나 여행 코스 안넣었으면 너무 서운했울뻔 ㅜㅜ 한 대 장만하고 시푸다.....
안전교육도 절해주시고 사진도 다 찍어주시고 너무 친절해서 더 감사했던 곳 •◡•
다음에는 승마까지 하러올게용 하하하

google_reviews.author: Zons Amado
google_reviews.text: 제주투어패스를 구매해서 가장 처음으로 방문한 곳이다. 비가 오는 날씨에 오픈런 해서 방문했는데 날씨가 맑기를 원했지만 결론은 우천 라이딩도 정말 재밌었다. 기본코스는 시동 걸고 출발해서 좋다라고 느낄때쯤 끝날 것 같고 기본보다는 상위코스를 타야 어느 정도 라이딩한 기분이 난다. 이번에 갔을때 4륜 바이크를 신식으로 구매했는데 처음으로 타게 되어 더 좋았다. 자녀들이 있다면 추억쌓기로 한번쯤 해보기에 좋다. 라이딩 코스에 영화 마녀2 등 배경이 된 곳이 있어 직접 보니 더 즐거웠다.

google_reviews.author: 유현정
google_reviews.text:
아들이랑 예약시간보다 너~무 일찍
도착해 버렸지만 즐겁게 잘 타고 왔어요 좀 길게 하고 싶어서 프리미어 한다는데 돈 든다며 중간꺼도 충분하다 하셔서 20~30분짜리 코스 했네요 ^^  근데 추워서 긴거 했음 큰일날 뻔ㅠ
코스는 딱 좋아요 멋진 한라산 뷰에
길도 위험하지 않구요 내려올땐
말도 보고 승마장 쪽으로 내려와서
볼거리가 많아요 완전 만족 하고
즐겁게 타고 왔습니다.
대기실 안쪽에 장갑이 있어요
꼭 챙겨들 가셔요~^^
손꾸락이 감각이 없어져요ㅋ

google_reviews.author: 박혜진
google_reviews.text:
사장님 너무너무 친절하세요~
비가와서 제주투어패스 기본코스만 했는데 그래도좋았어요 날좋은날 다시와서 코스 추가해서 하려구요 굿♡

google_reviews.author: SIUDABIN입니다
google_reviews.text:
미성년자는 못타게 함 진심 가지 마셈 돈 더내라고 유도함 호구 잡히기 싫으면 가지 마셈 여기 갈빠엔 다른 곳 감 진심 개 비추임 진심 시간만 날림 제발
가지마셈 진심

google_reviews_en.author: 올리브
google_reviews_en.text:
Jeju ATV Quad Bike Experience! ̆̎ !̆̎
I thought it would be ordinary, but it was so dynamic and exciting. I would have been disappointed if I hadn't included it in the itinerary. ㅜㅜ I just bought one and it was so much fun...
They gave me a safety briefing, took all my pictures, and were so kind that I was even more grateful. •◡•
Next time, I'll come horseback riding too. Hahaha

google_reviews_en.author: Zons Amado
google_reviews_en.text: This was the first place I visited after purchasing the Jeju Tour Pass. I visited on a rainy day during the open run, and while I had hoped for clear skies, the rainy ride was still incredibly enjoyable. The basic course felt like it would be over by the time I felt comfortable starting up, but I felt like I had completed a more advanced course to truly feel like I had ridden. This time, I bought a brand new quad bike, and it was even more enjoyable because it was my first time riding one. If you have children, this is a great way to create memories. The ride course featured scenes from the movie "The Witch: Part 2," making it even more enjoyable to see them in person.

google_reviews_en.author: 유현정
google_reviews_en.text:
My son and I arrived way too early for our reservation, but we had a great time riding. I wanted to ride a bit longer and was offered the "Premium" course, but they told me it costs extra and that the medium one would be enough, so we went with the 20-30 minute course. ^^ However, it was so cold that we would have been in big trouble if we had taken the longer one. ㅠ

The course is just right. There is a magnificent view of Hallasan Mountain, and the path isn't dangerous. On the way down, you can see horses, and since we head down towards the riding arena, there are plenty of things to see. We were completely satisfied and had a wonderful time riding.

There are gloves inside the waiting room. Make sure to bring them with you! ^^

Your fingers will go numb, haha.

google_reviews_en.author: 박혜진
google_reviews_en.text: The owner is so, so kind~ It was raining so I only did the basic course of the Jeju Tour Pass, but it was still great. I plan to come back on a sunny day and add more courses. Good♡

google_reviews_en.author: SIUDABIN입니다
google_reviews_en.text: Minors are not allowed to ride. Seriously, don't go. They try to trick you into paying more money. If you don't want to be fooled, don't go. If you're going to go here, go somewhere else. Seriously, I don't recommend it. Seriously, you're just wasting your time. Please don't go. Seriously.

fields.title: view jeju sky
fields.address: 397 Seoseongil-ro, Seongsan-eup, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 덕질hyun
google_reviews.text:
제주투어패스로 방문~오후4시타임에 타는줄알았는데 그게아니였음. 주인아주머니가 언제든오면된다해서 예약없이 갔음.
패스권찍고 몇명타는거말하고 대기~말들이 밥먹는시간임~85kg이상은 칼같이 몸무게잼
모자쓰고 운동화신어야함
10분정도 산책코스태워주심
사진찍는포인트에서 사진찍어주고
사진 살껀지 고름~현금이체로 사장아지매가 깍아줌~이걸로 돈버는거~기념이니 샀음~어른들꺼라서 액자했지요.
기분좋으면 말도 달려주는데 말이삐졌음.
암튼 멀긴오지게 멀긴함. 그래도 사진찍을수있게 해주시고 그건좋음~ 사진은강매가없다지만ㅋㅋ 파일이라도 받을라면 사야됨~잘주심~

google_reviews.author: 굿초이스
google_reviews.text:
다음날 비소식이있어 급하게 일정을 바꿔가며 방문한곳
다들 비슷한 생각이셨는지 앞에 대기줄이 좀 있었음
앞에 4팀 있었으나
이렇다저렇다 몇분정도 걸릴거같다 안내사항 전혀없이 무작정 1시간넘게 기다림
제주도까지가서 특성상 날씨 좋은날 그것도 섬 특성상 오후일찍 모든 일정이 마무리되는 분위기에서 일분일초가 아까운데
아무런 설명없이 대기하는데 쓴시간이 아까움..
1시간 기다려서 5분 말타고 사진 구매권유받구..
앞팀에서도 욕 엄청하며 가시는분들 여럿보였음..

google_reviews.author: 선영
google_reviews.text:
제주패스에 추가요금 내구 오름코스로 해봤어요
기념이다 싶어 액자도 ㅎㅎㅎ
잼있었어요😆😆😆

google_reviews.author: Jaehyun Hwang (수지파파)
google_reviews.text:
제주패스로 다녀왓고
말 타고 천천히 마실 다녀왓어요!
제주 패스는 트랙 1비퀴인데 너무 짧아서 만원 (현금가) 추가해서 10여분 탓어요
애들은 마냥 좋아함 (특별히 여기라서는 아니고)
사진도 만언 주고 파일만 사왓어요!!

google_reviews.author: ખਅ (4or2)
google_reviews.text:
말이 건강하고 체험이 즐겁다.
이용할 계획이 있다면 온라인으로 먼저 예약하도록 하자.
대략 20%정도 이상을 할인 받을 수 있다

google_reviews_en.author: 김용유
google_reviews_en.text: The boss is kind and the best in Jeju Island. Equestrian ATV is the best. Yes,

google_reviews_en.author: j.pundareekam goud
google_reviews_en.text: Good

google_reviews_en.author: 덕질hyun
google_reviews_en.text:
I visited with the Jeju Tour Pass. I thought the ride would be at 4 p.m., but that wasn't the case. The owner said I could come anytime, so I went without a reservation.
I stamped my pass, told her how many people were riding, and waited. It was the horses' feeding time. They weighed over 85kg, so they were incredibly heavy. You had to wear a hat and sneakers. They took a 10-minute stroll. They took pictures at a photo spot. I chose which photos to buy. The owner gave me a discount if I paid cash. She made money from it. I bought them as a souvenir. They framed them because they were for adults.
If they were happy, the horses would gallop, but they were a bit sullen.
Anyway, it's really far. They let me take pictures, which was nice. They say they don't force you to take pictures, lol. If you want to at least get the files, you have to buy them. They were very generous.

google_reviews_en.author: 굿초이스
google_reviews_en.text:
The next day, there was rain, so we had to hastily change our plans and visit. Everyone seemed to have a similar idea, as there was a long line ahead of us. There were four groups ahead of us, but we were told it would take a few minutes. Without any guidance, we waited for over an hour. We went all the way to Jeju Island, and even on a nice day, the island's schedule tends to wrap up early in the afternoon. Every second counted.
It was a waste of time waiting without any explanation.
We waited an hour, rode a horse for five minutes, and were offered a photo opportunity.
I saw several people in the group ahead of us swearing as they left.

google_reviews_en.author: 선영
google_reviews_en.text:
제주패스에 추가요금 내구 오름코스로 해봤어요
기념이다 싶어 액자도 ㅎㅎㅎ
잼있었어요😆😆😆

fields.title: Polly Park
fields.address: 3912 eoeum-ri, Aewol-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: JOON SHIN
google_reviews.text:
산악오토바이~전체적으로 이곳저곳 문닫고 그랬는데 atv하는곳만 운영하는듯
다른곳보다 코스도 산악 비포장 포장된곳 다양하고 길게 다녔고 인솔자는 친절 사무실은 누가왔는지 그리 신경쓰지 않고~
암튼 돈아깝지 않게  힐링하고 코스도 좋고 두군데 포토타임 하고 좋았음

google_reviews.author: BK B
google_reviews.text:
엉덩이가 좀 아픕니다... 오프로드를 가니까요...
다만... 그 고통을 견디면 이 풍경이 나를 기다립니다.
대신... 살이 엄청타고 흙먼지는 진탕 뒤집어씁니다...

google_reviews.author: 슈슈슈크림
google_reviews.text: 재미는 있음. 재미만 있음. 왜곡 없이 팩트만 말하면 시설 최악. 헬맷보관 컨테이너... 헬맷관리는 둘째치고 개 오줌은 치워야 하는거 아닌가요? 냄새 장난 아님 ㅠㅠ atv도 너무 노후되서 좀 불안 했음. B코스 45분 탔는데 30분만에 끝남. 심지어 5분 차이도 아니고 그럼 15분을 더 태워줘야 하는거 아님? 시간에 따른 금액 차이인데 돈은돈대로 받고 시간은 채 채우지도 않고.. 호갱된 기분!! 님들이 빨리 잘 타서 빨리 끝난거다 라는 응대는 좀 매우 어이없었음

google_reviews.author: 김채원
google_reviews.text:
장사안돼서 후기도 조작하나봐요ㅋ별하나도 아까운데 후기적어야하니까 줌. 완전 기대하고 아침부터 예약해서갔더니 현장직원은 모르쇠 태도에 예약받은거없다고 불만적인 태도로 어쩌라는식의 대응이였음.  그래서 아침에 전화했던 직원한테 전화해서 얘기하니까 그제서야 착오가있었다면서 결국 한시에타기로했던거 세시에타라함. 그러면 예약은 왜해요? 예약할때 분명히 이름 안남겨도되냐고 물었고 그냥 가서 바로 타면된다고 안내받았음.
그러고 현장직원한테 코스 얼마나걸리냐하면 대답해주면되지 예의없게 "홈페이지에 다 나와있는데요? 그거 보시면 알잖아요?" 이딴 태도면 일하기 싫은거 아닌가? 예약햇던 시간에 결국 못타서 어떻게하냐니까 사과는커녕 취소하고 옆에있는 새별atv 타러가라하고 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
진짜 sns의 폐해. 주작영상에 속아서 시간버리고갑니다. 거기 시설도 구려서 atv 다 고장나고 제대로 돌리지도못하고 몇개만 겨우 돌려돌려 장사함. 환불처리한게 천만다행ㅋ

google_reviews.author: ATV Poly
google_reviews.text:
완전 재밌어요. 꼭 타세요 두번 타세요 ~
제주도 필수 코스 입니다. 특히 B코스 꺄아
사진도 엄청 잘 찍어 주시고 엄청 친절해서 추천 꾹

google_reviews_en.author: JOON SHIN
google_reviews_en.text:
Mountain bikes~ A lot of places were closed, but it seemed like only ATVs were open. The trails were longer and more varied, both on paved and unpaved trails. The guides were friendly, and the office didn't seem to care much about who was there.
Anyway, it was worth the money, a relaxing ride, and a nice course. The photo opportunities at both locations were great.

google_reviews_en.author: BK B
google_reviews_en.text:
My butt hurts a bit... because I'm going off-road...

However... if I endure that pain, this scenery awaits me.

In return... I get severely sunburned and covered in thick dust...

google_reviews_en.author: 슈슈슈크림
google_reviews_en.text: It is fun. Just fun. To be honest, the facilities are the worst. The helmet storage container... helmet maintenance aside, shouldn't they at least clean up the dog urine? The smell is unbelievable ㅠㅠ. The ATVs were also so old and worn out that I felt a bit uneasy. I was supposed to ride Course B for 45 minutes, but it ended in just 30. It wasn't even a 5-minute difference; shouldn't they have let me ride for an extra 15 minutes? The price is supposed to be based on time, but they charged me the full amount without even completing the full time... I feel like a total sucker!! Their response saying it ended quickly because we rode fast was absolutely ridiculous.

google_reviews_en.author: 김채원
google_reviews_en.text:
Business is bad, so they must be manipulating reviews. Even one star is a waste, but I have to write one. I had high expectations and made a reservation early in the morning, but the on-site staff acted ignorant and complained, saying they didn't have a reservation. So I called the same staff member I'd called that morning to tell them, and only then did they realize there was a mistake and told me I should ride at 3:00 instead of 1:00. Why even make a reservation? I clearly asked if I didn't need to leave my name when I made the reservation, and was told I could just show up and ride.
I then asked the staff member how long the ride would take, and they rudely replied, "It's all on the website, right? You know what I mean?" With that kind of attitude, doesn't it seem like they don't want to work? When I couldn't ride at my scheduled time, they didn't even apologize, but instead told me to cancel and go ride at Saebyeol ATV next door. ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
The perils of social media are truly devastating. I was fooled by fake videos and wasted my time. The facilities there are also poor, with all the ATVs broken down and not even running properly. They only manage to keep a few going. Thank goodness I got a refund lol

google_reviews_en.author: ATV Poly
google_reviews_en.text:
It's so much fun. You absolutely have to ride it, ride it twice!

It's a must-do on Jeju Island. Especially Course B, yay!

They take amazing photos for you and are super friendly, so I highly recommend it.

fields.title: Sungeup Land
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Seogwipo, 특별자치도, Seongub-ri, 2045-1 KR
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 서귀포시 특별자치도, 성읍리 2045-1 KR

google_reviews.author: 맘이따뜻한맘
google_reviews.text:
깨끗하고 젊은 사장님이 친절하시고 직원분들도 친절하셨어요.
처음 말 타는데 지도하시는분도 말 타고 같이 가는 코스입니다.
처음 타는 분은 겁이 날 수도 있으나
숙련된 분들이 지도하에 가는거니 안심되었습니다.
그리고 실내 사진 찍을 수 있는 의상과 포토존이 있었고요.
곳곳에 세심한 인테리어가 보였습니다.
또 다른 경주차 체험도 있어서 좋은 것 같습니다.
별점이 높은 이유가 있었네요~^^

google_reviews.author: Wei albert
google_reviews.text:
카트 승마체험등 여러가지 즐길수있는곳 입니다.
카트 타봤는데 개인적으로는 트렉이 좀 짧은거 같습니다.

google_reviews.author: HB L
google_reviews.text: 혼자 말을 타고 나름 빠른 속도 (습보)로 말을 타 볼 수 있는 좋은 경험이 있으나 사진을 찍을 수 없는 아쉬움 존재

google_reviews.author: 최지훈
google_reviews.text: 엄청길고 큽니다 여기만가야겠습니다

google_reviews.author: 최윤주
google_reviews.text: 제주도에서 카트가 가장 재미있는 곳..

google_reviews_en.author: April Chua
google_reviews_en.text: The staff are really kind and helpful. They helped us to call and book a cab when we couldn't get one via Kakao T, and stayed open till our cab arrived (we were the last customers), and even went out to tell the driver our destination. We played ATV and rode on grassland with boulders and dirt. My gals enjoyed the horse riding where they rode on their own in the grassland, with a staff on another horse near them throughout. The Go Kart was alright. They provided us with outer layer of pants and tops for the ATV and Go Kart so our clothing were not dirty.The place is clean. Note that the cafe sells snacks and drinks only.

google_reviews_en.author: dep gov
google_reviews_en.text:
The team that was in the acceleration carts was completely rude and treated you with bad manners that I have never seen in Korea.
The worst experience ever in korea

google_reviews_en.author: M J
google_reviews_en.text:
Friendly staff members
Very clean and sanitised area with great kart system
Did both kart and horse riding
Loved both activities
Horse riding was amazing had great safety gear everything ready for you and loved the interior
Friendly horses and great cafe drinks

google_reviews_en.author: GuLee Kunlee
google_reviews_en.text: The best experience ever that I have had in Jeju-do 😍

google_reviews_en.author: WATERDROP
google_reviews_en.text:
Very bad team
Very Not polite

fields.title: Eleisure Buggy Experience Center
fields.address: 15 Sallokseo-ro, Aewol-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Fantazije
google_reviews.text:
2020년5월까지 한바퀴 가격에 두바퀴 돌게해준다고 들었음(전화문의 확인필요)
기존의 ATV는 좀 없어 보이는데 버기카는 뭔가 더 야생마 같은 엔진음과...음..
타보고 싶었던 버기카였음 (오늘은 그냥 현지스케치만...)

google_reviews.author: Allison Lee
google_reviews.text:
영업시간은 11시부터이고,
사장님 친절하세요.
제주에 버기카 타는 곳이 많지 않아서 버기카 원하시면 강추드려요~
비오면 못탄다고 하니 출발전에 전화해보세요~
가격은 7km기준 1인 33000원 2인 38000원 입니다.

google_reviews.author: 김유석
google_reviews.text: 사장님 친절하시고 코스 짧지않고 만족할 수 있었던 곳. 말 잘하시면 요금 조금 업그레이드하고 한바퀴 더 돌 수있음. 추천할 만한곳

google_reviews.author: 엽떡 어묵 빼고 떡 많이 주세요
google_reviews.text:
Very good! Friendly staff! valuable price! 사장님 짱친절ㅜ 재밌었다 자동차 운전할줄 알면 쉽게 할 수 있음 its not difficult for people who can drive car
비옷 입어도 옷, 신발 흙탕물에 젖을 수 있음. 샤워기 있음
There is a raincoat but sometimes your cloths can meet muddy water. In a bathroom there is a shower head.

google_reviews.author: dongmyung park
google_reviews.text: 늘 한번 타보고싶었던 버기카를 이번 제주여행 중에 타게 되었습니다. 예전 신화월드를 들은 기억이 있어 갔다가 현재 운영하지 않더군요. 그래서 검색하여 찾은 곳이 이레저 버기카 였는데 친절한 직원분, 재미있던 코스와 좋았던 차량상태 등 재미있게 타고 들어오니 한바퀴 더 돌아보게 해주시더군요. 담에도 제주방문 시 타보고 싶네요. 강추합니다.

google_reviews_en.author: Fantazije
google_reviews_en.text:
I heard that until May 2020, you can go around twice for the price of one (needs to confirm via phone inquiry).

The standard ATVs look a bit cheap, but the buggy cars have a more wild horse-like engine sound and... um...

It was a buggy car I really wanted to try. (Just a local sketch today...)

google_reviews_en.author: Allison Lee
google_reviews_en.text:
Business hours are from 11 AM, and the owner is very friendly.
There aren't many places to ride buggies in Jeju, so if you're interested, I highly recommend it.
They say they can't be operated in rain, so call before you go.
The price is 33,000 won per person or 38,000 won for two people for a 7km ride.

google_reviews_en.author: 김유석
google_reviews_en.text: The owner was friendly, and the course was not too short, so I was satisfied. If you're good at talking, you can upgrade your fare and go an extra lap. Highly recommended.

google_reviews_en.author: 엽떡 어묵 빼고 떡 많이 주세요
google_reviews_en.text:
Very good! Friendly staff! Valuable price! The owner was super friendly. It was fun. If you know how to drive, it's easy. It's not difficult for people who can drive a car.
Even if you're wearing a raincoat, your clothes and shoes can get wet in the muddy water. There's a shower.
There's a raincoat, but sometimes your clothes can get wet. In the bathroom, there's a shower head.

google_reviews_en.author: dongmyung park
google_reviews_en.text: I've always wanted to ride a buggy, so I got to ride one during my recent trip to Jeju. I'd heard about Shinhwa World before, so I went, but it was no longer in operation. So I searched and found Irejje Buggy. The staff were friendly, the course was fun, and the vehicle was in good condition. After enjoying the ride, they let me ride around for another time. I'd love to ride one again next time I visit Jeju. Highly recommended.

fields.title: Jerazin Real Offroad
fields.address: 624-4 Seonheul-ri, Jocheon-eup, 특별자치도 Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 제주시 특별자치도 조천읍 선흘리 624-4

google_reviews.author: 임창경
google_reviews.text: 전날 비가온뒤라 웅덩이도 많고 미끄러운 오프로드를 너무 신나고 잊지못할 감동으로 만들어주신 머릿결이 고운 쪽진 머리의 드라이브님..최고라는 단어로는 부족한 환상의 실력과 친절함과 멋진 사진은 덤으로 ..리뷰는 거의 안 남기는데 이번 경험은 남기지 않을수가 없네요 .다음 다음에도 제주오면 꼭 다시 옵니다

google_reviews.author: 김대원
google_reviews.text: 쥬라기 공원을 다녀온 기분이에요! 정말 돈이 하나도 안 아까움ㅋㅋㅋ오프로드가 이렇게 재미있는 건 줄 몰랐습니다. 대표님께서 운전을 기가 막히게 해주신 덕이라는데 쨌든 정말 재미있게 타고 왔네요ㅋㅋㅋ비 오는 날 탔는데 더 재미있었습니다!

google_reviews.author: 박상민
google_reviews.text:
너무 재밌다
대략 30분 이상타는데
우리나라에 이런 오프로드 자동차를 타는 곳이 있다니. 너무 재밌다
오프로드 타러 외국 갈 필요가 없다

google_reviews.author: 하크크tv
google_reviews.text:
여러 유명연예인들도 뮤비 및 사진찍으러 들리는곳

하지만 오프로드를 타시라구요!!!!

사장님이 부업으로 오프로드 하시는듯하고 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ

알고보면 사진작가일듯!!!

google_reviews.author: Green Bottle (녹색술병)
google_reviews.text:
오프로드 입문을 생각하는 당신 꼭 체험해봐야 할 곳!! 입문 강의 교육프로그램도 있다하니 참고하세요
뒷좌석 앉으면 멀미나니 참고하세요 ㅋㅋ
평소 오프로드 유투브만 보다 실제로 경험하니 멋진 추억으로 간직합니다 ㅎㅎ

google_reviews_en.author: Tal Fernandez
google_reviews_en.text: One of the best experience here in Jeju. Off-road truck driven by the best driver!! It was fun and must-do here in jeju!! Best view 🫶🏻

google_reviews_en.author: Scott Hatton
google_reviews_en.text: A bumpy ride, but that's what you expect. A really fun time, great scenery.

google_reviews_en.author: atif samad
google_reviews_en.text: Good experience

google_reviews_en.author: 임창경
google_reviews_en.text: The driver with the beautiful, wavy hair made the slippery off-road with many puddles after the rain the day before into an unforgettable and exciting experience. His fantastic skills and kindness are beyond words, and the wonderful photos were a bonus. I rarely leave reviews, but I couldn't help but leave one for this experience. I will definitely come back next time I come to Jeju.

google_reviews_en.author: 김대원
google_reviews_en.text: I feel like I've been to Jurassic Park! I really didn't regret spending money at all. I didn't know off-roading could be this much fun. They say it was thanks to the owner's amazing driving skills, but anyway, I had a lot of fun riding. It was even more fun riding on a rainy day!

fields.title: Jeju Kart Club
fields.address: 341-2 Wolrim-ri, Hallim-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 박성호
google_reviews.text:
어느 때부터 제주도 가족 여행을 오면 더 이상 새로운 곳을 찾기가 쉽지 않다.
또한, 애들이 커가면서 박물관이나 전시장 같은 곳은 더 이상 거들떠 보지도 않는다.
이제 액티비티 여행이 필요한 때 인가보다.
두 노부부가 함께 운영하는 이곳은 간단히 조종법만 익히면 초등학교 2학년부터 탈 수 있다.
주인 아저씨가 일일히 사진까지 찍어주신다.
애들 맘 같아서는 계속 타고 싶어 하지만 한시간정도
재미나게 즐기기 좋은 곳이다.

google_reviews.author: Shinhwa Bang
google_reviews.text:
제주 여행동안 2번 왔어요 ..사장님 친절하시고
좋았어요~
초5학년 남자아이 만족도 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
(초5 관점) 엑셀 밟으면 빠르게 나가고
앞지를수 있는 공간이 넓어서
좋다고 하네요

google_reviews.author: SH OH
google_reviews.text:
2인용 카트는 15분에 35000원 1인용은 25000원이다. 당연히 1인용이 재미있다. 카트 특상상 레일에 다른차들이 많으면 속도를 낼수 없어 재미가 떨어지지만 우리가 갔을때는 2카트밖에 없고 거의 끝날때 쯤이어서 둘이서 카트를 탈수 있어서 좋았다. 남여 기준 누구나 탈수 있고 조작이 간단하다. 스트레스 풀기용으론 최고다.
다른곳은 10분에 25천원정도인데 이곳이 5분더 있어서 이곳으로 정했다 ㅡ.ㅡㅋㅋㅋ

google_reviews.author: 임은희
google_reviews.text:
초등4, 2학년 다녀왔는데
사장님이 친절하게 설명도 잘해주셔서 쉽게 잘 배우고
아이들이 엄청 신나게 체험했어요~
초등생 아이들 카트 입문에 강추합니다

google_reviews.author: 김우석
google_reviews.text: 시설이 넓지 않아도 초3부터 탈수있고 손님도 없어 약 20분 정도 타고 놀았습니다 아저씨도 친철하셔서 좋았네요

google_reviews_en.author: Jung Lee
google_reviews_en.text: Frendly fun for kids.  Be nice to the owner and they let you do more free laps.  A bit pricey.

google_reviews_en.author: Sarina H.
google_reviews_en.text: Really Nice & Funny!

google_reviews_en.author: Jack
google_reviews_en.text: Good wholesome fun. No queues. KRW25,000 each for our party of 4, with approx 15min sessions.

google_reviews_en.author: 박성호
google_reviews_en.text:
At some point, it became difficult to find new places to visit when traveling to Jeju Island with my family.

Also, as the kids grow up, they no longer even glance at places like museums or exhibition halls.

It seems it is time for an activity-based trip.

Operated by an elderly couple, this place is accessible to children as young as second graders, provided they learn the basic controls.

The owner even takes photos of everyone individually.

The kids would love to keep riding, but it is a great place to enjoy for about an hour.

google_reviews_en.author: Shinhwa Bang
google_reviews_en.text:
I came here twice during my trip to Jeju. The owner was very friendly and it was great.
My 5th grader's satisfaction level was ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
(From a 5th grader's perspective) He said it was great because it accelerated quickly when you step on the accelerator and had plenty of room to overtake.

fields.title: Jeju Leports Land
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Cheju, 특별자치도, Jocheon-eup, Waheulsangseo 2-gil, 47 KR
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 제주시 특별자치도, 조천읍 와흘상서2길 47 KR

google_reviews.author: 도마
google_reviews.text:
제주도에서 놀거리찯으신다면 추천드려요!
이색체험으로 진짜 적합한거같아요 ㅋㅋㅋ

google_reviews.author: sunset palm
google_reviews.text: 제주 여행중 우연히 들렸는데 카트랑 사격 즐겁게 했어요. 좋은 추억만들었습니다. 친구나 가족들이랑 같이가면 괜찮은곳같아요. 친구 가족단체들 많아보였어요. 친절하신것도 좋았습니다. 굿굿👍

google_reviews.author: ma ro
google_reviews.text:
제주 여행 중에 방문한 제주레포츠랜드!
생각보다 규모도 크고 체험할 수 있는 레포츠가 다양해서 시간 가는 줄 모르고 즐겼어요 😊
직원분들도 친절하게 안내해주시고 안전하게 진행돼서 더 좋았습니다.
가족, 친구, 연인 누구랑 와도 재미있게 즐길 수 있는 곳이에요!
제주 오시면 한 번쯤 꼭 추천드립니다

google_reviews.author: 한비광
google_reviews.text:
다양한 액티비티로 카트체험, 번지점프, 사륜바이크 등 이색적인 레포츠를 한곳에서 즐길 수 있어 남녀노소 모두 재미있어요
특히 카트는 트랙이 길고 코너링이 재미있어 스피드를 즐기기에 좋으며, 가족 단위나 친구들끼리 경쟁하듯 타면 더욱 흥미진진해요
스릴 있는 체험을 원한다면 강력 추천! 제주에서 색다른 재미를 느끼고 싶을 때 방문하기 좋은 곳입니당

google_reviews.author: 유태욱
google_reviews.text:
제주도 놀러 와서 엑티비티 하려고 찾아왔는데 매표소 직원분도 너무 친절하시고 좋아요~~~
카트는 다른곳보다 구간이 길어서 시간가는줄 모르고 타고 왔네요~~~

google_reviews_en.author: Joe
google_reviews_en.text: Went there last year around June/July, I had so much fun, the karts faster than most I've been on. Staff were super friendly, bathrooms were in order, and a very small amount of people. Only downside was having to drive/get a cab there. Would reccomend!

google_reviews_en.author: Kyle Wehrsig
google_reviews_en.text: There’s a variety of different activities for all ages, my favorite was the karts. The track offers a few turns which I was able to drift a few times, a slope and a straight for easy passing. Track lines were easy to learn and got to lapping people in no time! Would highly come back with friends next time for a more competitive time.

google_reviews_en.author: Matisse Driesen
google_reviews_en.text: Consistently delivers on what it promises. Quality is evident, service is efficient, and the environment is well-maintained. A reliable choice

google_reviews_en.author: Aj Garcia
google_reviews_en.text: It's really hard to commute going here, taxi will be the only option because it was in the middle of the island. We researched about it before coming here so we know that for kart it's only 17,000 won per person for 15 minutes but in there, it was written as 25,000 won. So, I decided to just buy the tickets online but when I showed it to the lady in the counter, she said just buy it here and I'll give it for 17,000 won per person. So, you need to do your research first guys! Anyway, it was reaaaaaaaaaally fun! It feels like it was more than 15 minutes! You need to try drifting with the kart!!! Soooooo fun!!! Hahahah just be careful and put your eyeglasses away. Don't be like me, I lost it in the middle of the track while driving kkkk The track is I think 1.2 km? And it was really a good course. For your 2nd try you will get 50% discount!

google_reviews_en.author: Charles Lee
google_reviews_en.text: Highlight of my entire honeymoon to Korea. Words do no describe how fun the go karts and off road buggys are. 100% must do in Jeju.

fields.title: Jeju Oreum Horse Riding Land
fields.address: 454 Seonheul-ri, Jocheon-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Steve Lee
google_reviews.text: 승마 체험가능한곳 입니다. 긴시간을 타려고 오름 코스를 하였는데 말을타고 오름 숲길을 걸을수 있습니다. 예약이 불가하고 선착순으로 탈수있습니다. 오전에 가시길 추천드립니다. 참고하세요.

google_reviews.author: 패연방
google_reviews.text:
제주도 승마 체험의 코스
최상의 조건과 위치

google_reviews.author: Seungcheol Lee
google_reviews.text: 오름둘래길승마채험 말을느낄만큼 딱 고만큼 타요. 재미있어요

google_reviews.author: youngsun yun
google_reviews.text: 승마 너무 재미나고 좋았어요, 다만 안전상의 이유로 말 타고 있는 사진을 찍지 못해 아쉬웠답니다.

google_reviews.author: 박은형
google_reviews.text:
늦가을의 정취를 만끽할 수 있었던 외승
검은 오름으로 이어지는 부대오름과 부소오름  둘레길을 말과 함께하고 달리고 싶은 분들께 추천합니다.

google_reviews_en.author: Zubair Hasan
google_reviews_en.text: Great for kids. Good helpful staff

google_reviews_en.author: Guy P
google_reviews_en.text: This place is amazing. Horses are in great condition and well cared for. From the moment we walked in the entire staff were very helpful and accommodating. They made the experience so easy and fun from the start. Our guide was Mr Bang, he led us on a truly beautiful journey through the acres of farm land and forested trails. If you're looking to have a great time, no stress, and beautiful scenery...this is the place!!

google_reviews_en.author: Steve Lee
google_reviews_en.text: This is a place where you can experience horseback riding. I chose the uphill course for a longer ride, but you can also walk along the forest path on horseback. Reservations are not possible; rides are on a first-come, first-served basis. We recommend going in the morning. Please note.

google_reviews_en.author: 패연방
google_reviews_en.text:
Jeju Island Horseback Riding Course
Best Conditions and Location

google_reviews_en.author: Seungcheol Lee
google_reviews_en.text: Ride uphill on a horseback riding adventure. Ride just long enough to feel the horse. It's fun.

fields.title: Sungeup ATV
fields.address: 2045-1 Seongub-ri, Pyoseon-myeon, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 조현아
google_reviews.text: 확실히 사람많을때 가는것이 즐거울거 같습니다ㅎㅎㅎ 경쟁하듯 달리니 정말 재밌었어요!

google_reviews.author: 이창희
google_reviews.text: 그저그랬어요

google_reviews.author: Namkyu Kim
google_reviews.text: 한 달 전에 방문했습니다. 카트와 ATV가 너무 낡고 정비 상태도 좋지 않았습니다. 카트가 너무 심하게 흔들려서 불편했습니다.

google_reviews.author: Pengyao Yang (鵬耀)
google_reviews.text: 근처에 말 농장이 있어서 좋네요.

google_reviews_en.author: Namkyu Kim
google_reviews_en.text: Visitied a month ago. The cart and atv are too decrepit and not well tuned up. The cart was shaking so much and was not comfortable.

google_reviews_en.author: 조현아
google_reviews_en.text: I think it would definitely be fun to go when there are a lot of people. It was really fun to run as if we were competing!

google_reviews_en.author: Pengyao Yang (鵬耀)
google_reviews_en.text: There's a horse farm nearby, that's nice.

google_reviews_en.author: 이창희
google_reviews_en.text: It was just so-so

fields.title: Daeyoo Land Sikdang
fields.address: 144 Sangye-dong, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: R. C. N
google_reviews.text:
이번제주여행에서 ~젤~좋았네요
권총과,소총,클레이사격까지~한번에해결~
국내유일~라이플소총사격~오랜만에화약냄새~
ㅎㅎ 클레이는 의외로 반동이 좀있음~
제주여행중 꼭꼭~대유랜드사격장~체험해보세요~~

google_reviews.author: 제주인택시
google_reviews.text: 옛전통 꿩요리르누릴수있고옆에는말많은군대에서자랑하는총솜씨를확인할수있는 사격장도있어요^^^^

google_reviews.author: 제주여행코스 짜 드립니다.
google_reviews.text:
대유랜드 수렵장 구내 직영   꿩샤브샤브가 유명 하다
맛은 ?  시설은 크다

google_reviews.author: D K LEE
google_reviews.text:
직원들이 불친절하다
설명도  불친절하다
계산만 설명을 잘한다
계산이 끝나면 너무 불친절하다
고객을 위해 개선해야한다

google_reviews.author: LEE D.R
google_reviews.text: ATV타고 크레이사격 경험하기 좋은곳.

google_reviews_en.author: Charles Chan
google_reviews_en.text:
Plenty of activities being offered

ATV, pistol, revolver, rifle, clay shooting.

Did the pistol package, 12 rounds for 35k won.

Instructors are patient and friendly.

Hall of fame shooter dates back to 1994 of maybe even later.

Has props of bullet proof vest and guns for photo taking.

Plenty of parking.

google_reviews_en.author: R. C. N
google_reviews_en.text:
This was the best part of this Jeju trip.

Pistols, rifles, and even clay shooting—all in one go!

The only place in the country for rifle shooting. It's been a while since I smelled gunpowder.

Haha, the clay shooting had a bit of recoil, surprisingly.

Make sure to try out the Daeyu Land Shooting Range during your Jeju trip!

google_reviews_en.author: Hani Al-Nasser
google_reviews_en.text: A beautiful place for activities like archery, quad biking, and exploring the surrounding greenery. Finally, enjoy a snack at the restaurant or a cup of hot coffee while strolling through the park's flower-filled gardens and fruit-bearing orange trees. It's well worth a couple of hours of your itinerary on the beautiful island of Jeju.

google_reviews_en.author: 제주인택시
google_reviews_en.text: You can enjoy traditional pheasant dishes, and next to it, there is a shooting range where you can test the marksmanship the much-talked-about military boasts about.

google_reviews_en.author: 제주여행코스 짜 드립니다.
google_reviews_en.text:
The pheasant shabu-shabu directly managed on the premises of Daeyu Land Hunting Ground is famous.

How is the taste? The facilities are large.

fields.title: Jeju Reading Farm & Jeju Sky Badang ATV
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Seogwipo, 특별자치도, Seoseong-ro, 955 110 1층 103호

google_reviews.author: 김재균
google_reviews.text: 20분에.   ㅡ35000원.   아고비싸다.    이돈이믄.  우리동네선.   쐬. 주가 자그마치.     10병이오~~.    차를.  탈때.   나에틀니가.  흔들. 흔들.  렷소.😱😱😱  ~~ 하마타면.  명보다일찍.  저승.   갈뻔.   했지않는가~~~^^

google_reviews.author: 이형권
google_reviews.text:
환승연애4에 나온곳인데 atv는 경치가 정말 최고네요.

제주도에 이런 경치를 볼수있는데가 있다니...

정말 신기했습니다.

google_reviews_en.author: 김재균
google_reviews_en.text: In 20 minutes. -35,000 won. Oh my, it's expensive. With this amount. In our neighborhood. It's like. 10 bottles of liquor~~. When. I. got. in. the. car. My teeth. shook. Shake. 😱😱😱 ~~ If I had taken a Hamatha. I almost went to the afterlife. Before my time. Didn't I~~~^^

google_reviews_en.author: 이형권
google_reviews_en.text:
This is the place featured in Transfer Love 4, and the scenery from the ATV is truly amazing.

I can't believe there is a place in Jeju Island where you can see such scenery...

It was really fascinating.

fields.title: Jeju Horse Riding Park
fields.address: 1175 Yusuam-ri, Aewol-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Jae제임스
google_reviews.text:
30분 코스로 가셔야 승마경험을 합니다.
물가가 올라 살짝 비싼 느낌이지만
산속으로 들어갔다가 나오는 시간이 힐링입니다

google_reviews.author: 완두동부병아리
google_reviews.text: 재밌네요 사장님도 말 끌어주던 외국인 직원분들도 친절이 기본인듯..가격은 승마 자체가 거기서 거기인듯 해요..당근 먹이 체험때 말들 몰려오는게 귀엽

google_reviews.author: Kyung Mi Sohn
google_reviews.text:
딸내미랑 조카만 타고 왔는데 코스가 숲길이라 예뻤다고 합니다. 저희는 기다리는 동안 카페에서 스무디랑 크로크무슈 먹었는데 맛있었어요.
카페 사장님도 친절하시고 승마공원 직원분들도 다 친절하셔서 다음에 제주에서 승마는 꼭 여기서 할 생각입니다. ^^

google_reviews.author: Lily Kim
google_reviews.text: 체험승마도 가능하고 레슨도 받을 수 있는 곳이에요. 친절하고 섬세하신 선생님 덕분에 만족스러웠습니다. 주변에 궷물오름이나 큰노꼬메 오름도 함께 둘러보기 좋아요.

google_reviews.author: 전현민
google_reviews.text: 직원들 친절함. 숲길 좋음. 말이 순함. 먹이주기 체험 가능.

google_reviews_en.author: elena
google_reviews_en.text: The best moments the kids had in a long time. The course was 15 min long through the forest and there was an instructor with them all the time. My kids are 6 and 9 years old and a bit scared at the beginning but when we met again after the trail was done,they were all smiles and laughter. There is also a small cafe for the parents to enjoy while waiting.  Both kids and adults can ride if they wish to.

google_reviews_en.author: Cilem Sat
google_reviews_en.text: We did a 30-minute ride and it cost 66,000 won per person. The experience itself was okay, but the photo policy was really disappointing. I wasn’t allowed to take photos with my own phone, and they told us that the staff would take photos instead — but that never happened. In the end, you can only get photos if you buy their photoshoot package, which feels misleading because the information we received before paying was not true.

google_reviews_en.author: Maggie Lee
google_reviews_en.text: The experience was awesome! We went with our 2 kids (8trs and 11yrs) and took the route in the forest for 30min. Wasn’t really taught of how to manage the horse for us and I think a safety brief will be helpful especially for first timers. The kiddos were led by 1 worker from the stable (1 on each side), while my husband and I were just right behind them on our own. I was a little nervous as my horse stopped a few times to feed on the grass and I didn’t really know how to manage that …except being told to tug back on the rope. Nonetheless, the overall experience was really memorable!

google_reviews_en.author: Atiqah Ismail
google_reviews_en.text: I really like this place. There are mostly local tourists instead of foreigners so it’s nice and quiet. The forest is beautiful, the photographs sent 1 week later are so professionally taken!

google_reviews_en.author: PINOY ARTIST CHANNEL
google_reviews_en.text: THIS PLACE IS AWESOME  OWNER AND STAFF ARE ALL GOOD AND KIND

fields.title: Jeju Horse Riding Center
fields.address: 1065 Bijarim-ro, Jocheon-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: E.H Lee
google_reviews.text: 찾아가기 쉽고, 직원분들도 너무 친절해요. 숲길로 체험하는 말타기 정말 좋네요. 제주도 가시면 꼭 해보세요.

google_reviews.author: Jaechul Yoon
google_reviews.text:
저는 말들이 내 무게때문에 불쌍해질거 같아서 안타구 애들만 태웠음~
거리두 적당하구 말 하나하나 직원 분이 끌어즈시구 좋았음~ 중간중간 말들이 똥두 싸구 풀 뜯어먹는 돌발행동 있었지만 재미있었어요~
아내 말은 사장님이 끌어주시다가 혼자 타라고 하고 어딘가로 가버리심~ 혼자 타는게 재미있을거라고 하면서 . 그래두 첨 무서워한거 빼곤 잘 탐~~^^

google_reviews.author: TED NAM
google_reviews.text: 아이와 함께 승마체험을 하기위해 방문하였는데 가격이 좀 부담되긴 했지만 아이가 좋아해서 다행이었다. 3만원짜리 15분 기본코스와 5만원짜리 25분 스페셜코스가 있는데 15분은 짧을거 같아서 스페셜코스를 선택했다. 나중에보니 사람들이 다 같은생각인지 25분짜리 스페셜코스를 많이 탄다. 광고 영상을 보니 말을타고 숲속을 거니는 장면이 있어서 더운날 덮지않게 말을 탈수 있어 보였고 25분이면 꽤 길다고 생각했는데 막상 타보니 25분이 금방간다. 그리고 광고에서 보던 숲속길도 생각보다 짧고.. 그래도 숲속에 잠시라도 가니 기분은 좋음. 아쉬운건 내가 탔던 말이 지쳤는지 계속 비틀거려서 넘어지는거 아닌가하고 엄청 긴장하며 탔다는사실. 7살 아들에게는 작은 말을 타게 해주었는데 아이가 타기 딱 적당했다.

google_reviews.author: 임희빈
google_reviews.text: 풍경도 좋고 승마하면서 사진도 찍고 승마를 전문적으로 배울 수 있어요

google_reviews.author: 쩡눈누난나
google_reviews.text: 내가 탄말은 ㅠㅠ고집이쎄서 그날인가? 가끔한번씩 그런다는데 오늘이 ㅎ 우성이라고 조금만 말을 잘듣지ㅎ 그래도 잼났으~~~

google_reviews_en.author: Claire Png
google_reviews_en.text: Stumbled upon this horse riding venue and had such a great experience! Perfect for first-timers, whether adults or kids. Unlike the more popular ranches, this place takes you through a forest surrounded by tall trees — the scenery makes for amazing photos! Definitely a must-visit. Staff are friendly too ! I did the 25-minute ride for 55,000 won, and it was just right — the 15-minute option feels too short. They also offer ATV rides, so I might come back to try that next time!

google_reviews_en.author: E.H Lee
google_reviews_en.text: It's easy to find, and the staff are incredibly friendly. Horseback riding along the forest trail is truly a wonderful experience. If you visit Jeju Island, be sure to try it.

google_reviews_en.author: Jaechul Yoon
google_reviews_en.text:
I didn't ride because I thought the horses would feel bad for me because of my weight, so I only let the kids ride.
The distance was just right, and it was nice that each horse was led by a staff member. The horses occasionally pooped and ate grass, but it was still fun.
My wife's horse was being led by the boss, but he told her to ride alone and then went off somewhere. He said it would be more fun to ride alone. But other than the initial fear, she rode well.

google_reviews_en.author: TED NAM
google_reviews_en.text: I visited with my child to experience horseback riding. It was a bit pricey, but thankfully, my child loved it. There was a 15-minute basic course for 30,000 won and a 25-minute special course for 50,000 won. I thought 15 minutes would be too short, so I chose the special course. Later, I realized many people seemed to agree, as many opted for the 25-minute special course. The commercial showed a scene of a horse riding through the forest, which seemed like a great way to ride on a hot day without getting too wet. I thought 25 minutes would be a long time, but it flew by in the end. The forest path in the commercial was also shorter than I expected. Still, it felt good to be in the forest for a little while. The only regret was that my horse kept stumbling and falling, probably because it was tired. I was extremely nervous about it. I let my 7-year-old son ride the smaller horse, which was just right for him.

google_reviews_en.author: 임희빈
google_reviews_en.text: The scenery is beautiful, you can take pictures while riding, and you can learn horseback riding professionally.

google_reviews.author: 김민준
google_reviews.text: 아이들과 함께 제주 여행 중 방문했는데 정말 기대 이상으로 만족스러운 경험이었습니다. 초등학생 아이들이 처음 타보는 승마라 걱정이 많았는데, 직원분들이 하나하나 친절하게 설명해주시고 자세도 잘 잡아주셔서 안전하게 체험할 수 있었어요. 무엇보다 말들도 잘 관리되어 있고 온순해서 아이들이 무서워하지 않고 끝까지 즐겁게 탔습니다. 탁 트인 풍경 속에서 한라산과 바다를 동시에 보며 승마를 할 수 있다는 점이 정말 특별했고, 가족 모두에게 오래 기억에 남을 소중한 시간이었습니다. 가격이 조금 있는 편이긴 하지만 이 정도 경험이라면 충분히 가치 있다고 느꼈고, 다음에 제주에 오게 되면 꼭 다시 방문하고 싶은 곳입니다.

google_reviews_en.author: Anna Kim
google_reviews_en.text: I get excited with beautiful and smart white horses... name Alexander he very gently and slowly walks  ... beautiful scenery hallasan and sea jeju islands always amazing island for me

google_reviews_en.author: Shawn Miller
google_reviews_en.text: The owner of this establishment was awesome. We went the day after a good rain so horses were a bit muddy. That didn't take away from an excellent ride. Horses were calm and well trained. I am nearly 215 lbs. my horse had no problem trotting when called to. On top of all this we took a Taxi up to the location and when we finished taxis were refusing to come back and get us even when offered double fare. The owner took us to computer museum in his car.  That is well beyond what we expected.  I will definitely visit here again.

google_reviews_en.author: Rosie Annie
google_reviews_en.text: Staff were very nice, horses were cute, good scenic view for the morning, a tad rushed to finish on time

google_reviews_en.author: Aafaq ur Rehman
google_reviews_en.text: It's very expensive and the course is also very short. It's kinda touching horse and that,s it.

google_reviews_en.author: Jose Santos
google_reviews_en.text: I had such an amazing experience visiting this horse riding place during my trip to Jeju Island. As a traveler from the Philippines, I was truly impressed by how beautiful the scenery was—riding a horse while seeing both Hallasan and the ocean was something I will never forget. The horses were very gentle and well-trained, which made me feel safe and comfortable even though it was my first time. The staff were incredibly kind and helpful, guiding me the whole time and even assisting with taking photos at the best spots. The whole experience felt very relaxing and special, and it became one of the highlights of my trip. I would definitely love to come back again someday and highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Jeju.

google_reviews_en.author: Hardy Chou
google_reviews_en.text:
This review is for Jungmun Horse Riding Park on Naver.

This so-called “horse riding” place is a tourist scam. We paid 55,000 won (about $50 SGD or $38 USD) per pax for the “beach course,” which was a 20–25 minute trail ride. It was the longest course they had, so we agreed. While that’s steep, we could have accepted the price if the experience matched the description. It does not. The ride does not go on the beach at all. You can only see the ocean in the distance. Calling this a “beach course” is simply misleading.

They also insist that you surrender your phones before the ride, claiming it’s for “safety reasons.” This is pure nonsense. Adults are perfectly capable of keeping a phone in a pocket. When we raised legitimate security concerns, the staff raised their voices and insisted, “This is Korea, no one wants your phone.” This is a ploy to ensure you don’t take any content during the ride, as they take a few photos on a DSLR and try to sell prints afterward for 30,000 won.

We were also strictly told not to touch or hold the reins at any time, even though we are not beginners and have done trail rides overseas before. They claimed the horses are “automatic,” which is laughable. Horses are animals, not robots. During the ride, my wife’s horse stopped to graze and even veered dangerously close to barbed wire fencing a few times. If she had not used the reins to steer away, her legs could have been seriously scratched. This alone shows a lack of basic safety awareness in their pre-ride briefing and management.

In reality, this place is only suitable for very young children doing nose-to-tail rides while being led by staff. It is not appropriate for adults at all, and they should not be marketing or charging adult prices for such an aggressively controlled and misleading experience.

Avoid if you’re looking for a genuine or safe riding experience.

google_reviews_en.author: Garry Lew Your Estate Advisory Realtor
google_reviews_en.text:
🇰🇷 Visited 10/12/2023 warm winter Sunday morning. The following sharing are based on our unbiased personal opinion and experience

Had a stopped over at this horseback riding in Jeju. We discover this place via Google map and took a relaxing drive over. The place was not crowded when we arrive.

Politely ask the service staff on the pricing and available time slot for the ride. The nice Korean young lady attended to us was patient to explain to us the package available.

After the ride we even get to feed the horses. It was a nice experience.

📷 Follow us for a gastronomic experience and discover the world finest in its purest form

google_reviews_en.author: x Mickey
google_reviews_en.text:
I would honestly give zero stars, but seeing that they AT LEAST have given their horses a roof over their heads is somewhat comforting. The front desk area seems professional and the staff there was helpful, BUT after you pay the admission and take you to the horses you can see the true colours of the business. I bought carrots to feed the horses, and that's when I began to see something wasn't right; one of the horses was gnawing on the fence and jerking its head- an obvious sign of stress. And when I got on my horse my mother saw one of the workers deliberately kick a horse for no apparent reason. Furthermore, the worker who helped me on my horse was completely rude- he kept pushing my leg or arm out of the way roughly instead of just asking politely to move them.

The actual horse ride wasn't peaceful at all, I still can't understand why they were making the horses run instead of allowing them to trot along the course at their own pace. And these were NOT the large kind of horse, these horses were smaller and I could tell they were having a hard time carrying (much less running) with full grown people on their backs. The horse guide at the front repeatedly told me to hit my horse with the horsewhip on the NECK- even I knew enough about horse riding to know that the neck is a tender spot for all animals, even muscular horses; the proper etiquette is to hit on the shoulder or rear.

Overall, I had such a terrible experience, I could feel the horse's discomfort and I felt so bad for them. This type of establishment should be shutdown. They overprice it and they don't care about their animals- it is so obvious that they just want profit- complete shame on them. I encourage everyone to report this establishment to at least improve their currently unacceptable conditions.

google_reviews_en.author: Michael Tonn
google_reviews_en.text:
A bit short for the price. It can be a bit boring if you have been around horses. "sit on the moving animal and wait for the ride to be over."
Overall it was nice and mostly importantly, my daughter loved it.

google_reviews_en.text: Owner was kind and incredibly friendly, even as foreigners who didn’t speak Korean, he patiently guided us with gestures and abit of English, This was hands down the best experience I’ve had in a while, major kudos to the extremely kind owner 😭😭. He took some amazing photos too

google_reviews_en.author: Melissa T.
google_reviews_en.text: It was an absolutely amazing experience for my 23-year-old daughter to ride in Jeju, South Korea! We got her a cab to the address, but she was dropped off at the wrong location. No problem, the owner went to pick her up since it was close and took her back for a wonderful ride. She's a very experienced Western rider but has had some experience with English riding in the past. The rides here are English, and she had no real issues. She rode an Arabian horse in a more advanced session with the boots and pants they provided her. The owner took outstanding pictures and videos all during her ride. It was very scenic and such a beautiful day. She said the owner was the nicest man, and she had the most amazing time. I could not be more pleased and would recommend this place to anyone!

google_reviews_en.author: JS
google_reviews_en.text:
As a visitor from Germany and someone who is riding since about 15 years I must say, that I really really enjoyed riding here!
I rode Goliath, who is a quite well trained and really well behaved horse!

I went there with my friends who were riding for the first time. The owner knows Horses well and is a good Trainer. They got a basic instruction into riding before going on the trail ride through the forest and grassland. I loved seeing this side of Jeju. This place is in my heart now, and I would love to visit again, once I can come back to Jeju Island. 🐴

google_reviews.author: 황남편
google_reviews.text:
숙소와 가까워 방문했지만 너무 만족해 두번이나 다녀왔습니다. 어린 아이들은 조랑말을 타고, 어른들은 큰 말을 타볼 수 있습니다. 안전조끼와 모자 등이 새것처럼 관리되고 있고, 먹이주고 빗질을 하는 등 다양한 체험과 볼거리를 제공해줍니다.

체험승마를 하는 공간의 뷰가 좋아 사진도 잘 나오니 한번쯤 방문해보시길 추천합니다.

google_reviews.author: 박혜정
google_reviews.text: 올해 2월부터 아이가 승마 레슨을 받고 있어요~^^ 제주도 살면서 전신운동에 승마가 좋다고 해서 승마는 꼭 시켜줘야지 하고 체험부터 시작했는데 꾸준한 수업과 감독님의 열정적인 코칭으로 이제 장애물 시작해서 잘 다니고 있어요~ 무엇보다 안전한 승마가 최고인데 선생님들이 안전을 우선으로 꼼꼼히 잘 봐주시고 사춘기 아이들에게는 승마가 제일인거같아요! 승마 고민하신다면 꼭 제주도 승마레슨 전문 초원승마클럽 추천합니다~~~제일 좋은 점은 기능별로 말들이 준비되어 있어서 초보자부터 부담없이 탈 수 있어요.

google_reviews.author: 금주윤
google_reviews.text: 37개월 아들 체험으로 했어요~! 너무 좋아하구요 어디서든 사진찍어도 멋있습니다~~~말들도 관리 잘되어있는것같아요! 담에 와도 또올께용!!!

google_reviews.author: 켄D난
google_reviews.text:
사장님 친절하시구요
말이 너무 순하고 귀여워요..

google_reviews_en.author: DAVID BAEK
google_reviews_en.text:
This is a place where children can safely enjoy a horseback riding experience.

The experience lasts about 15 to 20 minutes; elementary school students and older ride regular horses, while preschoolers ride ponies.

The trainers are friendly and provide excellent explanations, resulting in high satisfaction among the children.

google_reviews_en.author: 황남편
google_reviews_en.text:
I visited because it was close to my accommodation, but I was so satisfied that I went back a second time. Young children can ride ponies, while adults can try riding larger horses. Safety vests and helmets are kept in pristine condition, and they offer various activities and sights to see, such as feeding and grooming the horses.

The view from the experience area is great for taking photos, so I recommend visiting at least once.

google_reviews_en.author: 박혜정
google_reviews_en.text: My child has been taking horseback riding lessons since February of this year. Since we live in Jeju, I heard that horseback riding is great for a full-body workout, so I made sure my child tried it. We started with a trial session, and thanks to consistent lessons and the instructor's passionate coaching, my child has now started show jumping and is doing well. Above all, safe riding is the most important thing, and the instructors prioritize safety and watch over the children meticulously. I think horseback riding is the best option for teenagers! If you are considering horseback riding, I highly recommend Chowon Riding Club, a professional riding lesson center in Jeju. The best part is that they have horses available for different skill levels, so even beginners can ride without any pressure.

google_reviews_en.author: 금주윤
google_reviews_en.text: My 37-month-old son tried it~! He loved it so much and the pictures look great no matter where you take them~~~ The horses seem to be well-managed! I'll come again next time!!!

google_reviews_en.author: 켄D난
google_reviews_en.text:
The owner is kind, and

their words are so gentle and cute..

fields.title: OK Horse Riding Center
fields.address: 2595 Beonyeong-ro, Pyoseon-myeon, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 김재천
google_reviews.text: 친절하게 잘 가르쳐주시고 어린딸이 겁내지 않도록 대장말에 태워서 잡고 가주셨어요. 날씨좋은 날가서 좋은 풍경에 말타고 너무 좋았습니다. OK승마장은 제주갈때마다 갈것 같습니다.

google_reviews.author: sieunjieun lee
google_reviews.text: 친절하시고 가격착하고 코스 적당히 즐기기에 딱이에요! 건너편 갔다가 가격듣고 놀래서 다시 와서 여기서 했어요~

google_reviews.author: 강우석
google_reviews.text: 제주도 2시간 설원승마!! 보조사업을 시작하고 있어서 자부담 8만원 나머지 정부보조금 이 나오니 저렴하게 탈 수 있어요.~

google_reviews.author: Dulcamara M
google_reviews.text: 체험승마 추천, 오랜 역사가 있는 승마장

google_reviews.author: Eden
google_reviews.text: 저렴한 티켓을 끊어서 나쁘지않게 산책후 빠르게 짧은 원 안을 두바퀴 도는 코스가 있다. 친절함과는 거리가 있는 편.

google_reviews_en.author: Scott Thompson
google_reviews_en.text: 1 hour ride in the forest. Epic.

google_reviews_en.author: 이일령 (쌀가게)
google_reviews_en.text: medium

google_reviews_en.author: 김재천
google_reviews_en.text: They taught us very kindly, and held onto the lead horse to ensure my young daughter wouldn't be scared. We went on a beautiful day, so riding the horse amidst the lovely scenery was wonderful. I think I will visit OK Horse Riding Center every time I go to Jeju.

google_reviews_en.author: sieunjieun lee
google_reviews_en.text: They are friendly, the prices are reasonable, and it’s perfect for enjoying a moderately good course! I went to the place across the street first, but was shocked by the price, so I came back here to have my meal.

google_reviews_en.author: 강우석
