google_reviews_en.text: 2 hours of snow horseback riding in Jeju Island!! Since a subsidy program has started, you only have to pay 80,000 won out of pocket, and the rest is covered by government subsidies, so you can ride affordably.~

fields.title: Soewa Flower Equestrian Center
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Seogwipo, 특별자치도, Seongsan-eup, Goseong-ri, 354-1 KR
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 서귀포시 특별자치도, 성산읍 고성리 354-1 KR

google_reviews.author: Kwangwon Chung
google_reviews.text:
말도타고 성산일출봉 도 보고
해변도 돌아보고 참 좋은 체험입니다ㆍ
25000 원코스도 있고
50000 원 코스가 해변까지 다녀오는 멋진 말타기입니다ㆍ
성산 다녀와서 섭지코지 들러 함덕 가는 방향 도로변이니 찾기도 쉽고 한번쯤 경험 해 볼일입니다ㆍ

google_reviews.author: S욘
google_reviews.text:
제주도에서 말을 타보고싶었는데
유명한 섭지코지 주변에는
주차장 들어가는 대기줄이 너무길어
포기하고 나오다 발견한 곳.

저는 말을 타본 적이 있는데,
그래서 직접 타보고 싶었는데,
관리자분이 잡고만 한바퀴 돌아서
그게 아쉬웠어요.

근데 그땐 시간적 여유가 없어서
내가 타보고싶다 말도 못꺼냈죠.

그래도 말을 보고 타본건 좋았음^^
예쁜 말들~♡

google_reviews.author: Changhyeon ko
google_reviews.text:
한시간에 오만원입니다.
주차장은 4대정도 넉넉해요
성산 일출봉이 보이는 유일한 승마장입니다

google_reviews.author: yeongcheol Heo
google_reviews.text:
섭지코지 부근에 있는 승마 체험장입니다.
코스는 2가지이며, A코스 25000원 B코스 50000원입니다.
A코스는 10분 정도 소요되며 말 관리 아저씨가 열심히 뛰기도 하시고 걷기도 하시면서 재미있게 말을 태워 주시네요.
사진도 직접 찍어 주시고 친절하세요.
근데 다른 승마 체험장 대비 좀 비싼 듯 합니다.

google_reviews.author: 유선주
google_reviews.text:
정말 방목으로 키운듯 말들이 건강해보여서 좋았어요.
해변가 사진 스팟도 좋아요.

google_reviews_en.author: James Wong
google_reviews_en.text:
First of all, I think most of the horse stables/farm probably have the same package A (just around the farm area) about 10mins or package B, to the beach and back about 30mins?
The only differences are the type of horses.
The scenario is good and probably worth it and they help take some videos along the way and photos.
What I was a little disappointed was the horses were directed by a handler all the way so we didn’t get to move by ourselves (unlike in New Zealand or in Hokkaido). Some parts is quite dangerous for beginners so I understand but it felt like just sitting on a mobile controlled horse ride.
So I would say good for beginners but for those that had some free rein of riding, may find it a bit boring/disappointing. Also the way there partly was the beach but you don’t get to backtrack and it goes directly back to the stable.
Overall I would commend the experience for the view on horses. Wish had a bit more free rein riding and a bit more of the beach on the way back as well. Paid about 150,000 won for 3.
The facilitator spoke Chinese.

google_reviews_en.author: Young Jae Kim
google_reviews_en.text: Nice ride through woods and directly into beach but it lasts about only 25 minutes for 30usd per person. Bit expensive but worth the photos.

google_reviews_en.author: Jurec Mulder
google_reviews_en.text: The scenery is pretty amazing, aside from some trash someone dumped near the farm. The horses seem to be taken good care of. The people are super nice. The view of Sonsang Ilchulbong is amazing.

google_reviews_en.author: Kwangwon Chung
google_reviews_en.text: Riding a horse, seeing Seongsan Ilchulbong, and touring the beach is a truly wonderful experience. There is a 25,000 won course, and the 50,000 won course is a fantastic horseback riding experience that goes all the way to the beach. It is located on the roadside on the way to Hamdeok after visiting Seongsan and stopping by Seopjikoji, so it is easy to find and definitely worth trying at least once.

google_reviews_en.author: S욘
google_reviews_en.text:
I wanted to ride a horse in Jeju Island, but the line to get into the parking lot near the famous Seopjikoji was so long that I gave up and found this place.

I've ridden a horse before, so I wanted to try it myself, but the manager just held me back and made me go around once, which was a shame.

But I didn't have enough time at the time, so I couldn't even bring myself to say I wanted to ride.

Still, it was nice to see and ride the horses. ^^
Beautiful horses~♡

fields.title: Jungmun Horseback Riding Experience
fields.address: 349-1 Sangye-ro, 특별자치도, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Jimmy Butler
google_reviews.text:
평점 3점대가 의아한.. 사장님이었던 것 같은데 승마체험 관련 해서 엄청 친절하시고 말 관리도 잘 되는 것 같고, 코스 관리도 잘 되는 듯 합니다. 직원분들 모두 친절하시고요.
군대식느낌 난다는 리뷰.. 그것에 대해 생각해 보자면 안전 상 문제로 확실하게 말씀해 주시기 때문 아닐까 싶네요.
말 뒤로 가면 발에 채인다든지 문제 예방을 위해 특별히 신경쓰시더라고요.
포토 스팟 잘 챙겨서 사진 찍게 알려주시고, 직접 카메라 받아가서 사진 찍어 주시기도 했고요.
큰 진돗개 세마리 있는데 애들이 다 순합니다. 그렇다고 막 찾아가서 만지지는 마시고.. 손님에 대해 우호적인데 자는데 만진다거나 피하는 아이 궂이 쫓아가서 만지려 하는 사람들 가끔 있다고..
올 여름에 한번 갔다가 좋은 기억이 남아 겨울에 다시 찾아갔네요. 그래서 이런 저런 말씀도 듣고 해서 리뷰에 같이 적어봅니다.
중문에서 가깝고 말들도 많고 포니도 있고 충분히 좋은 평점 받을 만 하다 생각합니다.
(별점 1점짜리 리뷰를 다시 보니 아랍인이셨네요. 아무래도 의사소통 문제였던 것 같네요. 아무튼 저는 별점 5점 드립니다.)

google_reviews.author: HR Kim
google_reviews.text: 그동안 가봤던 여러 승마 체험장중 가장 깨끗하게 관리되는 곳인듯. 덜 알려져서 그런지 조용하게 아이들 승마 체험 시킬수 있었습니다. 바로 옆에는 오프로드 차량 체험장을 같이 하네요.

google_reviews.author: jejuin
google_reviews.text:
말들이 꼼짝못하게 묶여있음.
할인으로 현금결제 유도함.
체험하면서 사진도 못찍음.
끝나서야 겨우 사진건짐.
추천 안함

google_reviews.author: 오치영
google_reviews.text:
아주깨끗하고 친절하세요
말교육도 잘되었어요

google_reviews.author: seojun im
google_reviews.text: 여자사장님은 착하신데 주변 남자 직원분들이 약간 말을 기분나쁘게하시네요 이점빼곤 괜찮은거같아요

google_reviews_en.author: Jimmy Butler
google_reviews_en.text:
I'm a bit surprised the rating is in the 3-star range... I think it's the owner, but he's incredibly kind and helpful with the horse riding experience. He seems to take good care of the horses and the course. The staff are all friendly, too.
Some reviews say it feels a bit military-style... I think that's because they're very clear about safety issues.
They take special care to prevent problems like getting kicked when walking behind a horse.
They even pointed out photo spots and took photos for us with their cameras.
They have three large Jindo dogs, all of which are docile. Don't go up to them and pet them, though. They're friendly, but I've heard that some people pet them while they're sleeping or chase after children who avoid them.
I went once this summer and had such good memories that I went back again in the winter. So, after hearing all the comments, I'm including them in this review.
It's close to Jungmun, and there are plenty of horses and ponies, so I think it deserves a good rating. (I looked at the 1-star review again and it turns out the reviewer was Arab. I guess it was a communication issue. Anyway, I'll give it 5 stars.)

google_reviews_en.author: HR Kim
google_reviews_en.text: Of all the horseback riding centers I've been to, this one seems to be the cleanest and most well-maintained. Perhaps because it's lesser-known, I was able to quietly let my kids ride. Right next door is an off-road vehicle experience center.

google_reviews_en.author: Heba Almudhi
google_reviews_en.text: No mobile phones allowed, only 3 tours allowed, designated area for photography, and only one phone allowed, like we're in the military.

google_reviews_en.author: jejuin
google_reviews_en.text:
The horses were tied up so they couldn't move.

They tried to induce cash payment with a discount.

I couldn't even take photos during the experience.

I barely managed to get a photo after it was over.

I do not recommend it.

google_reviews_en.author: 오치영
google_reviews_en.text: Very clean and friendly. The horse training was also excellent.

fields.title: J Horse Club
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Cheju, 특별자치도, Wolsannam-gil, 284 제이홀스승마장 KR
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 제주시 특별자치도, 월산남길 284 제이홀스승마장 KR

google_reviews.author: 김기주
google_reviews.text:
깨끗하고 선생님들도 친절하게 알려 주셨어요
저희 아이는 회원은 아니어서 미리 전화해서 시간 예약하고 방문했습니다

google_reviews.author: 시숭이
google_reviews.text:
체험으로 갔는데 엄청 친절하게 알려주신다. 사진도 엄청 열심히 찍어주시고 질문하면 친절하게 대답해주신다. 심지어 강아지도 귀여움.
공항 근처라 위치도 괜찮고 가격 가성비도 괜찮은 편.

google_reviews.author: 무니
google_reviews.text:
제주도에서 최고의 승마장입니다.
너무너무 좋아요.
사장님도 엄청 친절하시고 직원들도 친절해요.
2층 제주시내뷰가 최고입니다.

google_reviews.author: ashley kim
google_reviews.text:
바다를 품은 승마장…
승마 체험,
말 당근 주기,
2층에 club house에서 coffee….
over looking ocean and city view…
V. Very nice~

google_reviews.author: 윤경보
google_reviews.text:
신제주 도심 10분?에서 제일 가까워서 너무 좋습니다.
승마장 시설도 깔끔하고, 깨끗하고 굿입니다.
조교선생님도 친절하게 가르쳐 주셔서 감사합니다.^^

google_reviews_en.author: 진Jin718
google_reviews_en.text:
Lovely place to visit with your family. They have horse riding experience for kids.
I highly recommand to visit if your in Jeju

google_reviews_en.author: Sze Hwee Ho
google_reviews_en.text: Kids enjoyed their introductory rides indoor with the coaches.

google_reviews_en.author: Eunice曉紋
google_reviews_en.text:
My son just turned 7 today, and I chose a horse riding experience as his birthday gift. So, we quickly picked the nearest stable on the map, which turned out to be a satisfying decision. My son is already saying he wants to come back and ride again tomorrow.

The stable, riding area, and relaxation area were all very comfortable. The riding equipment was clean and in good condition, and the horses seemed well cared for. The instructor leading the ride was very friendly and even recommended a great restaurant. We'll meet at the restaurant for lunch tomorrow!

---

google_reviews_en.author: 김기주
google_reviews_en.text: It was clean and the teachers were friendly and helpful. My child wasn't a member, so I called ahead to make an appointment.

google_reviews_en.author: 시숭이
google_reviews_en.text:
I went for a trial session, and they were incredibly kind and helpful. They took lots of photos for me and answered my questions very kindly. Even the dog was cute.

The location is good since it's near the airport, and the price is quite reasonable.

fields.title: Tamna Horse Riding Center
fields.address: 1044 Bijarim-ro, Jocheon-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: traces of life
google_reviews.text: 1km코스￦30.000인데 - ￦5000할인=￦25.000 인데 긴시간동안 승마를 즐기게 해주시고 한30분 탔것같아요.승마가 너무 즐겁단걸 다시 느낌 그리고 사진가격도 착하게 해주셔서 해피한시간~더 타고싶은 맘 접고 이동

google_reviews.author: 수원백남봉
google_reviews.text:
말먹이체험만하고왔어요.
이동중에지나가다보여서..
승마까지할려고했는데비싸네요..

google_reviews.author: Charles Lee
google_reviews.text: 패기지로 제주여행 신청해서 어쩔수 없이 방문한 곳인데 정말 성의 없는 곳. 승마 도와주시는분들 웃음끼 1도 없는 표정으로 비실비실 불쌍한 말등에 앉는것도 미안한 마음이 드네요..비추..비추..

google_reviews.author: 박정규
google_reviews.text: 비싸요 사진 인화 강요 하며 사진 대충 찍고 눈 감았는데 잘 나왔데요

google_reviews.author: 일셜
google_reviews.text:
말타기 좋았는데 아쉬운부분은
모자가 깨끗하지않았구요
사진만판매하지않구 액자에 넣어판매를 하는부분이 아쉬웠어요

google_reviews_en.author: Steve Park-Smith
google_reviews_en.text: Lots of fun. Gives you the chance to ride a Korean pony around a circle. The horses are placid.

google_reviews_en.author: Andreia Carvalho
google_reviews_en.text: They do not allow people to carry their phones, as vibration or ringing can upset the horses. They will take pictures but ask for 30.000 per photo. I bought the tourist pass, so the riding fee was included. It's a 5 minutes ride, but it is an interesting experience for someone who never rode a horse.

google_reviews_en.author: Eunice
google_reviews_en.text: Very stressful experience. The instructors were rude and provided no direction and the whole riding experience was less than 2 minutes. For someone riding a horse for the first time, it tainted the experience for me. Also, the horses were very irritable, all in all it was very unnerving experience. Not foreigner friendly either, did not accommodate to English speaking customers.

google_reviews_en.author: Douha Alrabeea
google_reviews_en.text: The place is amaizing and people there are helpful.. but they don't have self horse riding

google_reviews_en.author: LCYC
google_reviews_en.text: Those horses were adorable and clever:D

fields.title: Samdasu Ranch
fields.address: 485-15 Bijarim-ro, Jocheon-eup, Cheju, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Lee Dogyeong
google_reviews.text: 아이랑 승마체험했는데 코스도 길고 친절하셔서 좋았습니다. 먹이체험도 있고 다양한 말을 볼수있어 좋았습니다. 강추합니다

google_reviews.author: WOORI CHO
google_reviews.text:
왕초보의 승마 경험을 위한 목장
노인을 위한 촬영용 코스부터 시간별 요금이 다양함
체계적이고 거대한 목장은 아닌듯한데 소소하고 할만함
아무 준비없이 크록스 신고 반바지 입고 가서 사진만 찍고 가려했는데 살짝 달리기까지 해서 깜짝
아이만 타게하지 않고, 보호자도 옆에서 같이 타기를 원했으나 만원 추가해서 직원분이 동행함
95kg 넘으면 승마 불가
사진은 겁없는 초1이 매우 즐거워하는 모습과 목장 정경

google_reviews.author: Huijeong Kim
google_reviews.text: 한적하고 넓어서 여유로이 승마체험하기 좋습니다. 상업화된곳들만큼 체계적이진않은데 목장서 조용히타는 기분내기엔 좋아 아이들이 좋아했습니다. 현금할인됩니다.

google_reviews.author: 송애니
google_reviews.text:
지나가다 말 좀 타볼까 했는데 바로 보여서 들어간 곳...
넓은들판 한바퀴돌고 들어와서 짧게 두바퀴 뛰고 오는 코스...한 20분 정도...인당 현금 3만원...보통 요즘 6만원 정도 하는데 현지라 좀 싼듯...말도 꽤 크고 농장이 운치가 있었어요. 전 모자를 잘 못 써서 뛸 때마다 모자가 눈 앞을 가렸다는...그래서 집중이 좀 안됐네요. 아쉬운건 첨에 모자 쓴거 한번 확인해 주셨으면 했던 아쉬움에 별 하나 뺐어요. 말 조련 해주시는분이 세심하게 안전하게 인도해주셨어요. 다음에 한번 더 갈 생각입니다. 그리고 현금 꼭 준비하시길...

google_reviews.author: 쌩글리브가
google_reviews.text: 공항가는길 어릴때 타봤던 말을 타고 달리고 싶다하여 우연히 찾아간곳 목장이 2.5킬로 둘레 넓고 5만원에 입가에 함박웃음 머금고 만족하며 탄곳

google_reviews_en.author: Jodie Lee
google_reviews_en.text:
Lovely riding experience with incredible views — I opted for the long ride (20min) for 50k won. I came alone and got accompanied on my ride by the owner who was so kind. I met another staff person Jay first and she showed me around. There are bathrooms here if you need to change clothes and they provide helmets and boots. I didn’t use boots since I had sneakers on.

Enjoy this wonderfully unique Jeju experience!

google_reviews_en.author: Vasiliy Rozhkov
google_reviews_en.text: It is really special experience with riding gentle horses. Really picturesque view with professional guide. We are feel safety. Highly recommend

google_reviews_en.author: Lina Daniel
google_reviews_en.text: My family stumbled upon this ranch and it was such a great experience!!! We loved riding and the staff was really friendly. Definitely recommend the longest ride option that they offer

google_reviews_en.author: Jonathan Tan
google_reviews_en.text:
Had a lot of fun riding around the big field! good for beginners and staff is very helpful and friendly :) thank you to Ms Jay for helping us through the process. will come again to see the views of hallasan!

p.s you can ask for carrots to feed the horses

google_reviews_en.author: Seong Won Kim
google_reviews_en.text: I visited here with my non-Korean speaking family, and we had a great time! Jay was very kind and nice. All staffs were friendly and we didn’t have any trouble communicating.

fields.title: Arion Horse Riding
fields.address: 1391 Donggwang-ri, Andeok-myeon, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Hayeoung Park
google_reviews.text:
화장실 실내 실외 전부 깨끗하고 냄새 안나요
직원분들 친절하구요
망아지 먹이주기 체험을 더 좋아하고 즐겼습니다
코스는 어른에겐 짧게 느껴지는 말타기였어요
지금보니 아쉽게도 코스를 덜 돌아주셨네요 ㅜㅜ

google_reviews.author: 라면은 농심
google_reviews.text:
제주도 방문시마다 꼭 승마장을 이용하는데 지금껏 다녀본 네 다섯곳 중 최고입니다.
1. 사장님이 굉장히 미인이시고 친절하세요.
2. 친절한 설명에 무료 먹이주기 체험까지...
3. 미끼상품에 사진 강매를 하지않구요.
4. 단순히 돈받고 한 바퀴 태워주고 사진찍어주는 곳이 아니라. 말을 어떻게 다뤄야하는지, 어떻게 교감하는지를 알려주는 곳입니다.

여기 한 번 가보시면 다른곳 못갑니다. 아이들 체험을 고민중이신 부모님들, 연인들, 친구들 여기가 정답입니다.

google_reviews.author: 박재용
google_reviews.text:
사장님도 친절 하시고 작은말 먹이주기 체험도 시켜주시고 너무 좋았습니다.
8살, 4살 아이들이 말을 탔는데요. 너무 재미있었다고 하네요. 기수분들도 친절하시고 아이들한테도 말씀 이쁘고 친절하게 해주시고 안전한 승마 체험 하고 왔습니다. 다음에 제주도 가게 되면 재 방문 하려구요.

google_reviews.author: 소정자
google_reviews.text:
제주 아리온 승마장
깨끗하고 친절하고 코스도 좋고 가격도 착하고
사진도 찍어주시고
말도 착하고,말 힘도 좋고, 실내도 깨끗하고 편하고
몇년전 갔더 곳하고는 판이하게 다르네...
번창하세요.
제가 추천해서 월욜에 한가족 갔어요.~~~^^

google_reviews.author: SY LEE
google_reviews.text: 정말 친절하고 사진도 잘 찍어주세요!. 시기 잘 맞춰서 매밀꽃 필때 가시면 더 좋아요 (05.18일 기준 사진)

google_reviews_en.author: Y S
google_reviews_en.text:
This horseback riding club features a very spacious area, including its own pasture. It offers a variety of riding courses and is located very close to the Shinhwa Marriott.
Although the experience time is short, it’s more than enough to give children a meaningful and enjoyable introduction to horseback riding.

google_reviews_en.author: Dajung Yeom
google_reviews_en.text:
Who says horseback riding is dangerous?
It was anything BUT, Gorgeous comes to mind!
I didn’t expect that much at first since riding a horse usually isn’t that special. However, this place was different from any other. If you wanna give your kids delightful memories in Jeju, just visit! They had hats and vests for kids to wear. Crazy cute! Each horse was saddled up and ready to ride! They even had steps to help my kids get on the horses easily. My family took both A+B course. “A”course was like a round track, and “B”course was going up a tranquil and serene forested hill. It seemed like we strolled into heaven! The helpful workers gave us carrots to feed to the ponies, and we could observe the hair, teeth, and the shapes of the ponies carefully. On top of this, they gave my family a souvenir photo :D The only bad thing was that I stepped in the horse poop…. Unfortunately, it was scattered everywhere.. Next time I go to Jeju, I’m sure I’ll visit again! It’s something you can enjoy all the time, in a super family-friendly place!

google_reviews_en.author: Sam
google_reviews_en.text: Nice place.. Front desk people can speak English well. They also provided a printed picture of mine after the horse ride.

google_reviews_en.author: Junda Ong
google_reviews_en.text: A simple walk up the hill and back. Good experience and kids enjoy ridingx

google_reviews_en.author: wee kwok suen
google_reviews_en.text: My kids had a lot of fun riding the horses up the hill. The ride took about 10-15min only. They also got to feed a pony.

fields.title: Our horse riding range
fields.address: 3305-51 Samdal-ri, Seongsan-eup, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 웅컁컁
google_reviews.text: 헉 올패스로 왔는데 무료로 탄 기본 코스가 생각보다 너무 좋았어요. 목장 내를 도는 게 아니라 주변 들판길을 걷는데 생각보다 짧다는 생각 전혀 안들고 만족해요. 시설은 그냥저냥이지만 말타는 게 목적이면 무관.. 마지막에 당근 먹이 사서 태워준 말에게 먹이주기도 하고 아이들 재밌었어요

google_reviews.author: so-yoen kim
google_reviews.text: 네이버 예약하고 갔는데, 너무 저렴한 금액으로 한바퀴 체험했어요. 훈련사분들 다 친절하셨어요. (그건 사람마다 차이가 있는듯 ㅎㅎ저랑 탄 분 너무 친절 ㅎㅎ말이 사오정??ㅎㅎ) 저는 사진은 먹이체험 사진 밖에 못 찍어서 아쉽네요..

google_reviews.author: Christine Noh
google_reviews.text:
즐거운 승마경험을 할 수 있지만, 코스가 짧고 말들을 혹사하는 기분이어서 좀 안쓰럽다. 사진을 찍는 사람에게 큰 소리로 면박주는 것을 보고 분위기 싸해짐. 아무리 사진영업을 해도 그건 아닌 듯하다.
모자도 지저분하고 소독하는 것도 아니어서 불편했다.

google_reviews.author: 안영찬
google_reviews.text:
패기지 여행으로 갔는데 비가와서 한참을 기다리다가 탔는데 직원들 인상이 별로 않좋았습니다
빨리 타고 가라는식으로 ....
내돈주고는 안가겠습니다
사진찍고 돈 버는곳! 그나마 말들이 착해서 별 2개 줍니다

google_reviews.author: 딸딸이아빠
google_reviews.text: 어떨까하는맘,아이들을 위한맘에 브이패스로 방문했는데 코스도길고,재밌게말태워주셔서 한번더탔어요.ㅎ

google_reviews_en.author: Helen Lim
google_reviews_en.text: You are lead by a guide (holding on to horse reins) in pairs of 2. Very short 10 minutes ride around their fenced-in compound. Good experience for first timers riding a horse. Very slow pace, so no galloping invovled. You cannot take pictures of your self or group as they want us to buy photos with glass or wood frames (around USD30) each.

google_reviews_en.author: KRP
google_reviews_en.text: Feeding carrots cost 5k won.

google_reviews_en.author: Mac Zy
google_reviews_en.text: I visited here with a tour. Don’t expect much for the horse ride. The staff is very rude, they stopped us from taking photo while my family members take the ride. Other that that, after we paid for 30,000 KRW for the picture, they still refused to provide us with the softcopy of the pictures. Even though we offered to pay for the softcopy, they said NO, they only allowed us to buy the physical picture which is super overpriced. Therefore, for those who wants to capture this memorable experience, this is not the place for you. 🙂

google_reviews_en.author: Diane Ham
google_reviews_en.text: I wanted my kid to try basic and they refused to take one only. So I had to take as well. Basic course was 15,000won but we had to pay for 30,000 for two instead. And 3 carrot sticks for 3,000 won. Now I searched online, the ticket is sold for 5,500 won. OMG. Also, I have no idea why but they asked us to take off masks right away as soon as we paid. I asked if I could keep my mask on, and she said no. This was the worst choice I made during this whole trip. Hope you can avoid it.

google_reviews_en.author: Lily Valarie
google_reviews_en.text: Sad that we are not allow to take photos. So cannot share to anyone about the place.

fields.title: Ieodo Horse Riding Center
fields.address: 2972 Nansan-ri, Seongsan-eup, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: LOVE DUKJA (덕자아빠)
google_reviews.text:
너무 친절한 사장님의 안내에 너무 즐거운 승마 체험을 할수있음.

예쁜액자까지 만들고 보니 뿌듯~~
자녀들의 만족도 200%

제주여행객들에게 강력추천!!

google_reviews.author: marisophia Lee
google_reviews.text:
여타 체험 승마장과 다른거 같아요
미취학 어린이 신나서  여기 또 가고싶다고
머무는동안 또갔어요
또 갔을때 다른 아이도
저랑 같은날  다른시간 타고 두번째에
또 왔더라구요
다른분 평처럼  가식의 친절이 아니구요
진짜 편하게 친절하셔요
아이혼자 탓는데도 편하게 잘 인도해주시더라구요
말들도 기다리는동안 볼수 있어요
말들이 순딩순딩 사랑스럽습니다
정말 좋은곳이예요
떠나기전에 한번더태워주고 싶어요
가격도 높게 책정해두지 않구요
승마체험 하시고 싶으시다면
여기 가보세요
사진도  잘찍어주시고 은근 강요도 없어요
사진만 선택해도 원본도 다주셔서 너무나 좋았어요
바로 근처 승마장처럼 가식 불편한 친절이나
현금강요 이런것도 없고 쵝오~~~

google_reviews.author: Nobody Noone
google_reviews.text: 초딩. 중딩 조카 체험했어요. 정말 친절하시고 아이들이 너무 재밌다고 원래 짧은 체험형 한다는 거 제가 긴 코스로 신청했던 건데 너무 잘했다고 고맙다고 하네요 ㅎㅎ 사진도 정말 잘 찍어주셔서 감사했습니다 다음에 제주에 가면 꼭 또하고 싶대요 이번 제주 여행에서 가장 재밌었다네요

google_reviews.author: Eunkyoung Kim
google_reviews.text:
음...승마체험 간단히즐길수있었고
사진촬영도 해주는데 마지막에 부담되는 가격에 액자까지 다해야만 판매하고있어서 그건 별로. 데이터만 팔아도 몇배이익일텐데. 조금만 저렴하게해서 방문객들 추억도남기고 다다익선으로 사장님콜???

google_reviews.author: 박찬원
google_reviews.text:
소규모이지만 매우 친절하게 알려주십니다.
꼭 가장 긴 코스로 하세요.
초원도 산책하고 원하시면 달리는 체험도 가능합니다. 사진도 다양하게 많이 촬영해주시고
사진인화 선택하시면 다른 사진파일들도 휴대폰에 다 옮겨주십니다.

사장님 내외(?) 두분만 운영하시다보니
손님이 몰리면 대기시간이 길어질수 있어서
가능하면 아침 일찍 가시기를 추천드립니다.

시간예약은 따로 안됩니다.

google_reviews_en.author: Jack Cao
google_reviews_en.text: This place is awesome! The horses are well fed and are well trained. The horses didn't need a walking guide, hence they can move freely and we even galloped on it. It is as though the horses understand human language. Amazing experience!

google_reviews_en.author: LOVE DUKJA (덕자아빠)
google_reviews_en.text:
Thanks to the very kind guidance from the owner, we had a truly enjoyable horseback riding experience.

I felt so proud after even making a pretty picture frame~~

200% satisfaction from the children

Highly recommended for Jeju travelers!!

google_reviews_en.author: marisophia Lee
google_reviews_en.text: It feels different from other horseback riding centers. My preschooler was so excited he wanted to go again. We went again during our stay. The next time, another child rode the same day, at a different time, and came back a second time. Unlike other reviews, it's not fake kindness. They're genuinely friendly and attentive. Even though my child was riding alone, they guided me comfortably. I could watch the horses while I waited. The horses were so adorable and cuddly. It's a really nice place. I'd love to ride them again before I leave. The prices aren't too high. If you want to experience horseback riding, this is the place to go. They take great photos, and they're not pushy at all. I even chose a photo and they even gave me the original, which was really nice. Unlike other nearby horseback riding centers, there's no fake, uncomfortable kindness or demanding cash. Wow~~~

google_reviews_en.author: Nobody Noone
google_reviews_en.text: My elementary and middle school nephews tried the experience. The staff were really kind, and the kids said they had so much fun. They mentioned that they originally booked the shorter course but I ended up signing up for the longer one, and they thanked me, saying they made the right choice. Haha. I also appreciated that they took such great photos. They said they definitely want to do it again the next time they visit Jeju. They told me it was the most fun part of this trip.

google_reviews_en.author: Eunkyoung Kim
google_reviews_en.text:
Hmm... I could enjoy a simple horseback riding experience.

They also take photos, but at the end, they charge a hefty price for everything, including the frame, so that wasn't great. They would make several times the profit just by selling the data. Why don't you make it a little cheaper so visitors can create memories and the more the merrier? Boss, give it a call???

fields.title: Joeun Horse Riding
fields.address: 265-14 Donggwang-ro, Andeok-myeon, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: sunhyo Hwang
google_reviews.text:
승마장 경치가 좋습니다.
저멀리 바다도 보이고, 옆에 있는 산정상에는 말이 풀 뜯어 먹는것도 볼수 있습니다.
말타는 모습 사진액자 만드실분은 미리 타기전에 말씀하셔야 준비가 됩니다.
다른곳 처럼 무조건 찍어놓고 선텩하는곳이 아닙니다.
말들이 모두 나이가 좀 있어서 80킬로 이상이신분들은 못타십니다.

google_reviews.author: 한소현
google_reviews.text: 소셜에서 저렴하게 구매해서 가서 탐 생각한 시간보단 빨리 끝났지만 재밋었음 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ 바로 얖에 어린이들 놀수맀는 토이파크도 있었음 그냥 저냥 승마체험하기 나쁘지 않았음

google_reviews.author: Gowoon Han
google_reviews.text:
조용하고 작은 승마장입니다.
어린아이들도 의사 거부가 없다면 타게 해주시나 약간의 안전에 대한 부분은 염려됩니다. 두바퀴 정도에 12천원이고 말 먹이주는 체험은 500원입니다.
말을 타보고 싶은 어른도 간편하게 들러 타볼 수 있어요. 풍광은 사진대로 멋집니다.

google_reviews.author: Min Jun
google_reviews.text: 소셜에서 저렴하게 구매 가능하고 초등학교 저학년이나 유치원생같은 어린 자녀들 체험용으로 구매하기 좋아요. 제대로 탈려면 승마 전문으로 하는 곳을 가셔야하고 여기는 말타기 체험하고 사진찍는 곳입니다. 일단 저렴해서 가격대비 만족합니다.

google_reviews.author: 엄피디
google_reviews.text:
애들 승마하기 나름 괜찮은 곳.
친절하심.

google_reviews_en.author: Hamdan Khamis
google_reviews_en.text: Expensive. Can get cheaper rides elsewhere

google_reviews_en.author: sunhyo Hwang
google_reviews_en.text:
The scenery at the riding stable is beautiful.

You can see the sea in the distance, and horses grazing on the mountaintop nearby.

If you would like to have a framed photo of yourself riding, please let us know beforehand so we can prepare it.

Unlike other places, we do not simply take photos and let you choose.

Since the horses are all a bit old, those weighing over 80 kilograms cannot ride them.

google_reviews_en.author: Maram
google_reviews_en.text: The place is nice, but the service isn't great; it costs 50,000 won for a quarter of an hour.

google_reviews_en.author: 한소현
google_reviews_en.text: I bought tickets cheaply on social media and went. It finished faster than I expected, but it was fun hahaha. There was also a toy park right next to it where children could play. It wasn't a bad horseback riding experience overall.

google_reviews_en.author: Gowoon Han
google_reviews_en.text:
It's a quiet, small riding center.
Children are allowed to ride unless they object, but there are some safety concerns. Two laps cost 12,000 won, and feeding the horses costs 500 won.
Adults who want to try horseback riding can also stop by and try it out. The scenery is as beautiful as the photos.

fields.title: Jeju Horse Park
fields.address: 381-15 Noksan-ro, Pyoseon-myeon, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Happy Jeong's Moment
google_reviews.text: 광활한 유채꽃밭이 있고 무료입니다. 입구에 승마체험용 말들이 있구요. 유채꽃밭 중간쯤에 말똥이 여기저기 있어서 그 이상은 들어가지는 않았는데 치웠으면 좋겠더라구요. 녹산로 유채꽃길 중간쯤에 진입로가 있어요.

google_reviews.author: 요르
google_reviews.text:
멋진 풍광을 배경으로 말타는 사진을 찍고싶을때 좋아요.
제주 승마체험은 푸른초원을 배경으로 결국 멋진 사진을 찍으려는 거니까
좋은날씨에 말타고 풍력발전기 배경으로 사진찍기 좋아요.

google_reviews.author: 제임스
google_reviews.text: 제주도에서 가본 유채꽃밭중에 가장 크고 풍성한 꽃밭. 한라산을 배경으로 한 경치도 좋고요. 참 멋있어요

google_reviews.author: 박종현
google_reviews.text: 유채꽃과 벚꽃이 아릅답게 조화를 이루는 곳입니다. 봄에 꽃구경을 한다면 꼭 방문해야 할 곳입니다. 풍차 유채꽃 벚꽃이 너무나 아릅답습니다. 유채꽃 축제기간에는 도로를 통제하여 여유롭게 산책 할 수 있습니다. 주차장도 크고 안전요원 분들께서 통제를 해주셔서 너무 편리했습니다.

google_reviews.author: 명성
google_reviews.text: 큰 기대 없이 방문했는데 아이와 말타고 가는 코스가 그림이네요

google_reviews_en.author: L Y
google_reviews_en.text:
The long course (B) felt kind of underwhelming, so the short course (A) probably would have suffice if you are looking for the horse riding experience.

As of writing, they shifted the horse riding to the canola fields, so you shouldn't go to the "ticket office" building.

The field was super pretty though, the horse takes you through the field of flowers and you get close to the massive windmills. The staff will guide the front horse, and the horses behind will follow the horses infront.

Lots of horse poop on the trail 💩 so don't be too surprised~ the horse might also poop while you're riding it

google_reviews_en.author: Sebestian Tan
google_reviews_en.text: Nice place to walk around, have a coffee, feed the horse or take a horse ride. There's windmill and a beautiful canola flower field next to the park. The owner of the cafe is very friendly and he makes a great waffle 🧇!

google_reviews_en.author: steven kemsley
google_reviews_en.text: In spring time it is very pretty with the canola flowers. I find the wind turbines  very interesting too. In winter or autumn it might not be as pretty.

google_reviews_en.author: K t
google_reviews_en.text: Good experience with the horses for B+ route. Two playful foals came along for the walk. Scenic walk through the lalang and bush plus fields next to the impressive windmills. The ajumma and ajusshi were very kind, with uncle taking photos for us with our mobile phones on the whole walk. we also got to feed the horses with carrots at the end.

google_reviews_en.author: Bgm Kyr
google_reviews_en.text: You cannot even touch horses even if you give them foods the place is bad even dont have tissues in toilet horses was cute but we pay for feeding but cannot even touch also she was checking us so we couldnt even feel their breath

fields.title: Raon The Ma Park
fields.address: 산8 Wolrim-ri, Hallim-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 제주시 한림읍 월림리 산8

google_reviews.author: NAMTAEK KIM
google_reviews.text:
체험프로그램으로 방문, 오랜만인 15년만에 방문해보니 주제가 바뀌었네요.
황산벌전투, 재밌고 볼만하게 뮤지컬화 했네요.

더(馬)파크는 세계 최초의 말 전문 테마공원이다.
승마와 기마공연 등 말의 고장 제주도에서 말에 관한 모든 것을 즐길 수 있다.

2008년 첫 공연작 '칭기스칸의 검은 깃발'을 시작으로 2013년 두 번째 공연작인 '천년의 제국 아! 고구려'까지 약 700만명의 관광객들이 관람을 했으며, 이후＂위대한 정복자 광개토태왕" 공연이 진행되었다.

공연단은 2008년 2월 라온랜드의 더마파크와 몽골 울란바타르 마사협회가 공동으로 구성한 전문 기마공연단이다.

단원들은 몽골 최대의 축제이자 전통행사인 나담축제를 중심으로 전국을 순회하며 기마공연을 해온 최고의 기마공연단원들 가운데 오디션을 거쳐 선발하였으며, 많은 사람들에게 재미와 감동을 선사하고 있다.
(대한민국 구석구석, 한국관광공사)

google_reviews.author: 이득준
google_reviews.text: 황산벌 전투를 테마로 말 공연과 전투장면을 보여 주는 곳인데 한 50여분 공연하는데 시간가는 줄 모르고 봤어요 공연하시는분들이나 말들이 굉장히 수련을 많이 했는지 너무 잘 하셔서 꼭 추천하고 싶은 곳이에요 승마체엄과 카트체험도 있어요

google_reviews.author: jun jun
google_reviews.text:
황산벌전투를 재현한 말공연입니다

말을 자유자재로 다루는 배우분들의 퍼포먼스가
대중의 시선을 사로잡습니다.

태어나서 말을 이렇게 많이 본건 처음이라서

정말좋았어요. 지인들에게 추천합니다.

google_reviews.author: 자몽호텔
google_reviews.text:
다시 봐도 좋아요.
재미 요소가 곳곳에.
넓은 야외 공연장에 답답하지도 않고.
남녀노소 즐거운 곳.

google_reviews.author: SeonGi Choi (STARKOR)
google_reviews.text: 공연을 가까이 볼수있고 백제.신라 황산벌전투를 재연연기해주는 연기자들과 말들이 정말 생동감있음

google_reviews_en.author: CT Ang
google_reviews_en.text: Wonderful place with horse show where they do stunts and we enjoyed it very much, although we were slightly late twice in the day. The show times are at 10.30-11.20, 2.30-3.20pm, and 5 pm-5.50pm. We went in afternoon, missed timing and went to check in hotel and came back for night show. The staff was skillful, doing flipping over their horses, jumping horses through hurdles, and performing horseback archery shooting while riding horseback (although not all hit the bullseye, no mean feat), and getting horses to play dead lying on ground. Only thing i am slightly disappointed, is that they did not use real spears and weapons fighting each other. However overrall the horse show was entertaining from start to finish although it was done in korean. The grounds also have horseback riding which was short circuit around a circle for beginner and horses seem docile pulled by an experienced staff. The path was although going through mud and my nephew who first time was on horseback was so scared that he would fall in dirt..hehe but did not as his horse was somehow no one hold on to. and horse was allowed to walk by itself eating the side grasses as it went along with the pack. There is also go kart on grounds, but however as we came out after the night show, the rest of staff had already closed for the day. Well worth the time to travel down and enjoy this unique show by funny and skillful horsemen and women

google_reviews_en.author: Noelle Myers
google_reviews_en.text: Show was spectacular.  Serious talent and entertaining to watch.  Even if you don't understand Korean, the show is still fun.  You can also purchase carrots to feed the horses.

google_reviews_en.author: Deane Saifuddin
google_reviews_en.text:
Not understanding the language didn't stop us from enjoying the show.

The acrobatic moves of the performers on the horses were a sight to behold.

Our child definitely enjoyed herself just watching the horses and performers.

google_reviews_en.author: Collin Ng
google_reviews_en.text:
Had fun riding horse and playing go kart here.
Horse riding here allows kids on the big horse instead of only ponies else where. Kids were thrilled!

google_reviews_en.author: 오동원 (Oh, DongWon)
google_reviews_en.text: Nice to see but not must. Performance was fairly good and exotic (maybe). Personally, Cart riding in the park is extremely enjoyable to a family to feel the speed and acceptable level of high during driving. Highly recommend to give it a chance.

fields.title: Otgwima Theme Town-Equestrian Center
fields.address: 1631 Hannam-ri, Namwon-eup, 특별자치도, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 서귀포시 특별자치도, 남원읍 한남리 1631

google_reviews.author: shnk
google_reviews.text: 제주도 최고의 승마장. 전국 어딜가도 이만한 곳 흔치않음.  직원들도 친절하고 유소년승마단이 유명함. 90분짜리 외승코스가 있는데 45분레슨 45분외승 하는데 안장 손잡이가 있는 말을 타고 마부 도움없이 본인이 직접 말을 타고 감. 제주 관광의 최고 액티비티임. 가격은  1인당  8만원이었던걸로 기억함

google_reviews.author: Kyuha Lee
google_reviews.text:
체험승마도 저렴하고 좋음!!
1만원에 10~15분인데 산속을 다녀요~
단순히 승마장 몇바퀴 도는게 아니라

그리고 시설도 제가 4군데정도 승마장 가봤는데, 그 중에서는 제일 좋은 편

google_reviews.author: Jh P
google_reviews.text:
제6회 의귀리 말축제행사가 10/7(토) 1일간 치뤄짐.
한국마사회에서 후원했다고 하니 지원을 받은 마을행사로 요즘 제주도가 우왕좌왕..
10월 첫주는 어디든 축제한다고 난리임
아침 일찍 방문했는데 어제 임시로 깔아놓은 듯한 마사토... 먼지가 풀~풀~
황당한 것은 행사장인 옷뒤마테마타운 입구에 마련한 임시주차장에 차를 주차한 후 500m 정도 도로를 걸어가는 도중 수많은 차량들이 왔다갔다하는데 무슨 행사차량이 방문하는 관광객보다 많은지... 기가차서 쌍X이 나오려함.
또한 지나가는 차들이 마사토 위를 지나가면서 일으키는 먼지는 최악...
맨 끝에 허술하게 차려진 무대하고 몽골텐트만 쭈욱 설치되고 썰렁한 분위기...
승마장에는 이미 교육생들만 말타는 모습 보여주고, 승마체험 한다고 참가비 받음.
이건 축제도 아님.. 마을 경로잔치 수준.
축제라는 이름으로 단체로 부터 후원받고 치루면서 진짜 말과 관련된 뜻있는 프로그램을 준비하시길..

google_reviews.author: 냐하하
google_reviews.text:
밴드를 통해 가게된 외승전문 승마장.
사장님이 친절하고 서비스 마인드가 훌륭하다 하신다. 하지만, 오늘은 안나오시나보다. ㅠㅠ

직원분이 리딩해주심.
외승전 초보 원형마장에서 간단히 말 상태와 기승실력 체크하고, 평보와 속보만 하기로 결정.

숲 우거진 산길로 시작하여 확 트인 지역까지~~
더 가보고 싶었으나 아이가 싫다하여 한 시간 기승 후 복귀.

직원분께 사진찍기 좋은 장소가 어디냐고 물으니 바로 여기라 하고 어두운 숲속에소 여러장 찍어주심.

나중에 확트인 밝고 넓은 한 눈에도 사진 명소인 지역은 그냥 가심...ㅠㅠ

말 상태는 한라마가 주이고 내가 기승했던 인지상정은 고갯짓이 너무~ 심한데, 왼쪽입이 불편해서 그런것인듯하다. 고삐 놔줘도 소용없음.
마체가 바르게 1자로 잘 가지도 못하고 외승에만 특화된 잘 뛰는 말로 느껴진다.

외승 후 대마장에서 달려보니 일반적인 더러브렛을 강하게 밀어붙였을때 정도의 속도가 나온다. 잘 뛰는 더러브렛에는 부족~

google_reviews.author: dimple lee
google_reviews.text: 제대로 된 승마체험을 시켜주고 싶어 갔네요. 사전보험가입 필수고요. 스키니한 긴바지, 운동화, 목긴 양말 필요합니다. 숲속 트래킹하고 오니 애들이  좋아했어요.

google_reviews_en.author: KwangHui Hang
google_reviews_en.text:
As a foreigner trying horse riding for the first time, this was a really memorable experience. I came across this place through Google and Jeju’s official tourism page. Since Jeju is known as the “land of horses,” I’ve always wanted to try horse riding here and finally decided to give it a shot.

I had some difficulty booking a session online, and eventually had to trouble my Airbnb host to help me book the 90-minute riding session (45 minutes of training in the ring and 45 minutes riding through the forest) for 120,000 won per person. I only needed to provide proof of my travel insurance.

The staff were friendly, and although my instructor did not speak the best English, she was very attentive and constantly emphasized safety throughout the session. For safety reasons, they require you to leave your phone at the office to prevent phone usage during the ride, since beginners are not trained to ride while using a phone. I would recommend bringing a GoPro head or chest mount if you want to record the experience.

Our tutorial session was slightly shortened, possibly because the weather looked like it was going to rain, so the instructor brought us out to the forest trail earlier than expected.

My horse was quite temperamental and would insist on stopping to snack on grass before continuing, otherwise it would throw a little tantrum. It made me realize how important it is to observe and understand your horse’s behavior.

During the ride, the instructor would occasionally have the horses trot (a faster pace than walking). Be prepared — you will bounce around a lot, and your bottom will definitely feel it! I’d highly recommend watching some beginner horse riding videos beforehand to learn the proper posture during trotting, as it will improve your experience significantly.

One important tip: always hold onto the saddle handle and keep the reins short without too much slack. This is for your own safety. Since my horse was a little temperamental, it occasionally tried to speed off suddenly, and keeping the reins short helped maintain better control.

The forest ride itself was very enjoyable and peaceful. There was no one else on the trail, making the experience feel very private and immersive. The instructor would also occasionally bring us to open grass fields to take photos.

Overall, this was a unique and enjoyable experience, especially for first-timers. Stay safe and enjoy the ride!

google_reviews_en.author: sherlyn tan
google_reviews_en.text: I rarely leave reviews, but I felt compelled to share my wonderful experience. The instructor was incredibly kind and supportive, guiding me every step of the way. Despite the language barrier, I was able to understand what he was teaching. I’d love to come back for a full course for equestrian, as I truly enjoyed being around the horses—they have such a healing presence, most importantly this place made me feel comfortable. I also appreciate the instructor taking videos and photos for me; they turned out beautifully. Thank you!

google_reviews_en.author: C K
google_reviews_en.text: A lesson and a ride with the nicest guide. Not cheap but worth it for the professionalism and route. Great experience. We enjoyed the little museum at the entrance as well.

google_reviews_en.author: Maria Arena Yang
google_reviews_en.text: good for love riding horse

google_reviews_en.author: Tomato Lam
google_reviews_en.text:
Amazing experience!
The instructor was super friendly and even doubled as our photographer.

The horses were adorable and so well-behaved — riding through the forest was pure joy.

I’ll definitely be back next time!

fields.title: Jeju Horse Park
fields.address: Yonggang-dong, Jeju-si, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: Taola
google_reviews.text: 5.16도로 왔다 갔다 하면 볼수 있어요^^

google_reviews.author: T. Fanning
google_reviews.text:
5월 초인데도 아직 좀 쌀쌀하네요!

투어 중에 10분 정도 멈춰서 말들을 구경했어요. 토종 말들이었는데 식용도 가능하고, 목으로는 말기름을 만들고, 가죽으로는 가죽 제품을 만들 수 있다고 하더라고요!

방금 영국 기차를 타고, 이제 난타 쇼를 보러 갑니다.

google_reviews.author: 天使著迷Nardo
google_reviews.text:
이곳은 정말 편안해요.
그리고 말도 너무 귀엽네요.

google_reviews_en.author: 天使著迷Nardo
google_reviews_en.text:
The place is so relaxing
And the horse is too adorable

google_reviews_en.author: T. Fanning
google_reviews_en.text:
It's still a bit chilly in early May!

We stopped for 10 minutes on the tour to see the horses—native breeds, which are edible, their necks can be used to make horse oil, and their hides can be used for leather!

Just went on a ride on the British train, now going to see the Nanta Show.

google_reviews_en.author: Taola
google_reviews_en.text: You can see it if you go back and forth on the 5.16 road^^

fields.title: SC Horse Park
fields.address: 268 Gwangpyeong-ri, Andeok-myeon, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: J
google_reviews.text:
깨끗하게 잘 관리되고있음.
주인분인지 모르겠으나 여자관리자분이 매우 친절하시고 아이들에게 편히 잘 대해주심.
제주도있는동안 아이들이 좋아해서 2번 갔으며 말 먹이주이 체험이 좋았음

google_reviews.author: YJ chi
google_reviews.text: 동물농장이에요~ 개 고양이 말 등등 귀여워요. 말 타는 시간에 가격이 비싸긴 하지만 말 사료 먹이는 체험도 할 수 있어요

google_reviews.author: 홍날개
google_reviews.text: 제주에서 아이들 승마체험을 했어요. B코스에는 승마외에도 먹이주기가 포함되어 있어서 아이들이 특히나 좋아했어요. 말타기 전 안전조끼와 승마모자까지 챙겨주셨어요. 처음타는 아이들이라 무서워할까 걱정했는데 조곤조곤 말씀 잘해주셔서 무사히 체험했네요.

google_reviews.author: Hanaho MOON
google_reviews.text: 직원이 친절하고 설명도 잘해준다. 사십마리 넘는 말이 있으며 체계적이다

google_reviews.author: sunhee yang
google_reviews.text:
아이들 승마체험해주러 갔어요
정말체험만 딱... 밥한번주고 끝...20분만에 5만원 ㅎㄷㄷ
다른승마장보다 평이좋아서 갔는데...비교가 안되어 나쁘다할수없지만...솔직히 돈 조금 아까웠어요

google_reviews_en.author: Angela Scott
google_reviews_en.text: This place is beautiful and the people are so nice! The horses are so healthy and sooooo gorgeous! I could barely control my excitement!

google_reviews_en.author: SJ Lee
google_reviews_en.text: Nothing special and no point of tour.

google_reviews_en.author: J
google_reviews_en.text: It's clean and well-maintained. I'm not sure if it's the owner, but the female manager was very kind and made the kids feel comfortable. I went there twice while I was in Jeju because the kids loved it, and the horse feeding experience was great.

google_reviews_en.author: YJ chi
google_reviews_en.text: It's an animal farm~ The dogs, cats, horses, and more are cute. The price is a bit high for the horse ride, but you can also experience feeding the horses.

google_reviews_en.author: 홍날개
google_reviews_en.text: I took my kids on a horseback riding experience in Jeju. Course B included feeding in addition to the horseback riding, which the kids especially enjoyed. They even provided safety vests and riding hats before the ride. I was worried they might be scared since it was their first time riding, but they were very attentive and explained everything to me so they had a safe experience.

fields.title: Breeders Park
fields.address: 2462 Songdang-ri, Gujwa-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 김정아
google_reviews.text: 제주 최고의 승마장! 그 어느곳보다 규모와 시설 환경면에서 최고입니다. 저흰 제주 올 때 마다 와서 레슨받고 외승하고 가요. 코치님께서 영상과 사진도 많이 찍어주시고 숲속 외승 코스는 다른 곳에서는 경험할 수 없는 시간을 선물해준답니다. 소심한 백구와 냥이들 보는 재미도 있어요.

google_reviews.author: 이혜정
google_reviews.text: 체험승마 말고. 부대시설 없이. 말타기엔 부족함이 없습니다.

google_reviews.author: 임민택
google_reviews.text: 마로도 좋고 말이 좋아요

google_reviews.author: 정다음
google_reviews.text:
최강승마 잔디구장을 구보로뛰는기분!
최고였습니다!

google_reviews.author: 김윤아
google_reviews.text: 말관리 상태도 마장 시설도 너무 좋습니다

google_reviews_en.author: Younsu Lee
google_reviews_en.text: Can enjoy riding a horse & learning how to ride a horse

google_reviews_en.author: 김정아
google_reviews_en.text: The best riding stable in Jeju! It is the best in terms of scale, facilities, and environment compared to anywhere else. We come here for lessons and trail riding every time we visit Jeju. The coach takes lots of videos and photos for us, and the forest trail riding course offers a unique experience that you can't find anywhere else. It is also fun to watch the shy white dog and the cats.

google_reviews_en.author: 이혜정
google_reviews_en.text: Apart from the horseback riding experience, there are no auxiliary facilities, but it's still a great way to enjoy horseback riding.

google_reviews_en.author: 임민택
google_reviews_en.text: It's good to be honest and talkative

google_reviews_en.author: 정다음
google_reviews_en.text: The feeling of running on the strongest equestrian grass field! It was the best!

fields.title: Sinheung Sea Fishing Park
fields.address: 247-2 Johamhaean-ro, Jocheon-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 제주중고차특파원
google_reviews.text:
아들 낚시 체험하려고 갔는데 제가 다 했네여
동반인은₩4,000
손맛체험₩20,000
입니다

google_reviews.author: 푸른구름
google_reviews.text:
조천읍 신흥리에 있습니다. 요즘 무지개마을이라고 해서 유명해지고 있고 함덕이랑 가까워서 사람들이 많이 찾는 마을입니다. 낚고락고는 가두리 양식장 비슷하게 만들어놓은 곳에서 바다낚시어종을 잡는곳인데. 2가지 낚시방법이 있는데 잘 결정 하셔야 합니다.
1인 1시간에 2만원은 어종들을 잡으면 낚는 맛만 느끼고 바로 다시 방생하여야 합니다.
1인 40분에 5천원은 어종들을 잡으면 무조건 그 어종을 구입하여야 합니다. 그에 따른 포장,손질비가 또 추가로 듭니다. 자기가 잡은 고기를 바로 회로 떠주니 느낌은 식당과는 다르지만 어종 파는 가격이 비쌉니다. 그냥 식당서 사먹는 회값보다도. 회와 야채,쌈장뿐입니다.

1인 40분에 5천원 하고 고기어종을 좀 작은걸로 2~3마리 잡아서 2~4만원 사이 금액 나오고 하면 금액도 그렇게 크지않고 체험도 하고 맛도 보고는 괜찮습니다만.
큰 어종을 잡으면 8~10만원이 바로 나옵니다.
큰 고기 잡았다고 좋아했다간 지출이 큽니다.
우리 9살짜리 막내도 2마리 잡아서 애들도 좋아했고 회 맛도 좀 봐서 그런데로 괜찮았지만 정말 복불복이라 조금 조심해서 채험해야할 곳입니다.

google_reviews.author: 초이감자튀김
google_reviews.text:
초등학생 아이가 낚시를 너무 좋아해서 처음 갔는데 너무 좋았어요^^
우선 특별한 기술없이 물고기가 엄청엄청 잘 잡혀요
1시간동안 아이 혼자 참돔1마리,우럭4마리 잡았고
잡은 물고기로 회 먹고 싶다고 해서
아이가 잡은것중에 참돔 3마리+우럭3마리만 손질 부탁했고
고기값 6만5천원+손질비,야채5천원 결제해서 바다보며 테라스에 앉아 신선하고 맛있는 회를 맛보고 왔네요
저희는 제주 갈때마다 또 오고 싶을정도로 좋았어요
제주에서 소중한시간이 되었어요♡

google_reviews.author: 김재완
google_reviews.text:
직원분들 친절하시고 낚시 방법만 패턴을 찾으면
아이도 낚시를 할 수 있는곳입니다.

하지만 식사또는 회는 비추입니다

두마리를 회를 떠도 몇점 먹을 수가 없어요
같이 구매한 야채를 다 먹을 수 없을 정도로
양이 적습니다...

매운탕도 먹을 수 없고...
컵라면 먹고 왔습니다
회 보다는 아이들 낚시 하는 재미로 가세요

google_reviews.author: 코모니맘 (코코모모코니맘)
google_reviews.text:
어린자녀들에게 경험삼아 한번쯤 괜찮은곳
1시간타이머 목걸이를 주는데 60분후 알람맞춰있음 입구쪽에 아이들 구명조끼 무료대여해줌
선택은 두가지방식인데 잡힌물고기 주둥이에서 낚싯바늘 빼서 방생해주는구역(낚싯대1개당 만오천원)과 잡히는대로 가지고가서 즉석으로 회떠먹을수 있는구역 두가지중 선택이며 회떠먹는코스는 좀더 비싸다  잡은물고기 중량대로 추가요금발생함 재래시장보다 비싼감이 있어 방생하는쪽을 선택했는데 우리방문했을당시 (10월10일) 올라와있던 리뷰들과는 달리 1시간동안 다행이 여러번 여러종의 물고기가 잡혔었고 아쉬운데로 꼬맹이들과 손맛도 봤음 하지만 물고기 주둥이에서.낚싯바늘을 빼줄때 요령껏 돌려가며 빠르게 해야함 안그럼 피철철 입찢어져서 그런거 잘 만질만한 사람이 동행해주는게 좋을듯함 그리고 가장자리부분에서 낚시를 하는데 그 울타리? 가운데부분이 휑뚫려있고 밧줄로되어있어 움직이는부분이라 미취학 아이들은 키가 작아서 바로앞으로 손잡고 기대다가 정말 위험할수있을듯함

google_reviews_en.author: Steve Yoon
google_reviews_en.text:
There’s one place in Jeju you should absolutely avoid. Why? The staff are incredibly rude. People like this should never work in the service industry. They didn’t even bother to greet me.
Just skip this place and enjoy the beautiful beaches of Jeju instead!

google_reviews_en.author: MW Park (AXL)
google_reviews_en.text:
some fish are hidden 🧐🧐

The staff are friendly and considerate of children.

Of course, it is enough experience

google_reviews_en.author: th kim
google_reviews_en.text: Good

google_reviews_en.author: 제주중고차특파원
google_reviews_en.text:
I went for my son's fishing experience, but I ended up doing the whole thing.

Accompanying fee is ₩4,000.

Catch experience is ₩20,000.

google_reviews_en.author: Lily Hsu
google_reviews_en.text:
Purely for the experience, the fee is ₩₩ per adult per hour, and ₩₩ for an escort.

Four people fished for an hour and only caught one small fish. Were the fish already full and not wanting to bite?

The staff changed our bait after more than half an hour of fishing, but the fish still wouldn't bite.

We didn't catch any fish but instead sunbathed in the sweltering heat – not what we expected at all! 🤣

fields.title: Jeju Fishing Shop
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Cheju, 특별자치도, Tapdong-ro, 73 KR
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 제주시 특별자치도, 탑동로 73 KR

google_reviews.author: 김미영
google_reviews.text:
소품 구입하기 참 좋더군요.
ㅋㅇㅋ

google_reviews.author: 제주중고차해결사김유철
google_reviews.text: 낚시에 필요한 모든게 구비되어 있고 신제품들도 빠르게 입점되요~ 공항이나 인근 바다포인트도 가까워서 좋아요

google_reviews.author: 제주엔바람
google_reviews.text:
친절합니다. 물건없는게 좀  있네요.,.
전에는 온라인못지않게 구비 잘하셨는데..아쉽습니다.ㅠ에깅대도 시마노 다이와계열역시 시리즈가 없어 되돌아옵니다.  담에 또 들러보겠습니다.

google_reviews.author: 탑동바당
google_reviews.text:
제주시  대형 낚시 매장이네요. 수리도 가능하고,
낚시용품이 엄청나게 많아요.
탑동  바닷가근처라 이용하기 괜찮고,
직원분들  친절하고, 가격도  인터넷이랑 비슷합니다.
초보자분들  낚시 채비도  서비스로 해줍니다.

google_reviews.author: 최광철
google_reviews.text:
넓은 매장과 깨끗한 점 .가격면에서도 괜찮네요
다만 주차장이 없어서 잘못하다가는 주차위반 당할수도 있다라는점

google_reviews_en.author: 김미영
google_reviews_en.text:
It was really good for buying props.

LOL

google_reviews_en.author: 제주중고차해결사김유철
google_reviews_en.text: Everything you need for fishing is provided, and new products are quickly introduced. It's also close to the airport and nearby sea points, which is nice.

google_reviews_en.author: 제주엔바람
google_reviews_en.text: It's very kind. There are some items missing. It used to be as well-stocked as online... It's a shame. ㅠ The Shimano and Daiwa series of eging rods are also out of stock, so I'm returning. I'll stop by again next time.

google_reviews_en.author: 탑동바당
google_reviews_en.text:
This is a large fishing store in Jeju City. They also offer repairs,
and have a huge selection of fishing gear.
It's conveniently located near the beach in Tapdong,
and the staff are friendly, and the prices are comparable to online prices.
They also offer fishing gear for beginners.

google_reviews_en.author: 최광철
google_reviews_en.text: The store is spacious and clean. The prices are reasonable. However, there's no parking lot, so if you're not careful, you might get a parking ticket.

fields.title: Captain (Seogwipo Soesokkak boat fishing)
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Seogwipo, Soesokkak-ro, 151-8 하효동 제주특별자치도
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 서귀포시 쇠소깍로 151-8 하효동 제주특별자치도

google_reviews.author: 달려라곰도리
google_reviews.text: 가볍게 낚시 체험하기 좋아요! 잡은거 회떠먹고 싶으시면 선장님께 따로 말씀드려서 가게 추천해주신데로 가시면 상차림비 지불하고 드실수 있어요!

google_reviews.author: 내일은 낚시왕-로즈마리호
google_reviews.text:
제주도 도민이 운영하는 낚시배
금어기 철에는 잡히는  고기를 방생 해야하고
절대  꽝없는 낚시포인트로 모셔다 드림
못잡는건 본인몫

google_reviews.author: 빅터리
google_reviews.text:
일단 부부이신듯한 사무장님 엄청 친절하십니다
선장님은 무뚝뚝 ㅎ
그래도 채비 설명은 잘해주시고
물고기 잡을 포인트 잘 안내해 주세요
별1개 뺀건 먹을만한 물고기가 없다는거
말그대로 체험 낚시이니 더바라면 욕심일까요

google_reviews.author: 혜경
google_reviews.text:
저는 제주 올때마다 낚시를 꼭 해요
차귀도에서도 몇번을 했고 캡틴호에서도 낮 낚시 했었구요
하지만 밤 한치 낚시는 처음인데 신랑이 위미항에서 한치 낚시 했던 경험으로 이번엔 캡틴호로 예약해서 했는데
별로였습니다
한치 낚시는 불빛을 밝혀 한치를 잡는다는데 배 양쪽 끝 2개씩 전구 켜시고 가운데 2개 켜시고 끝이었어요
나름 인당 5만원 주고 채비비 인당 만원씩까지 주고 했는데 다 밝혀주시지도 않고... 배에 탄 사람이 적어서 그럴수도 있지만 그래도 너무 하시더라구요
6명 탔다고 6개 전구만 켜주신건지...
아쉬움이 많이 남는 낚시 였습니다
사무장님 친절하시지만 손이 작습니다
잡은거 만큼은 다 요리에 넣어주시던지 회로 주시던지 해주셨으면 좋았을텐데. 내장도 제거 안된 한치를 어떻게 가져가나요 ㅡㅡ

google_reviews.author: BEE RU
google_reviews.text:
테우탈수 있는 곳

민물과 바닷물이 조화를 이루는 곳

아름다워요

google_reviews_en.author: Connie P
google_reviews_en.text: Great experience with children. The captain and staff was very helpful and friendly. Recommend to anyone. Take motion sickness pill an hour before departure. Reserve your spot at least a day before.

google_reviews_en.author: Danny Shin
google_reviews_en.text: Was alright👌👌

google_reviews_en.author: L R
google_reviews_en.text: Fishing

google_reviews_en.author: 달려라곰도리
google_reviews_en.text: It's great for a light fishing experience! If you'd like to eat your catch as sashimi, just let the captain know and he'll recommend a restaurant for you to enjoy after paying the table fee!

google_reviews_en.author: 내일은 낚시왕-로즈마리호
google_reviews_en.text:
Fishing boat operated by Jeju residents

During the closed season, any fish caught must be released

We take you to fishing spots where you absolutely cannot go home empty-handed

Not catching anything is your own responsibility

fields.title: Square barge fishing experience
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Seogwipo, 특별자치도, Seogwi-dong, 673-5 KR
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 서귀포시 특별자치도, 서귀동 673-5 KR

google_reviews.author: Joonho Choi (Juno)
google_reviews.text:
초보자들은 절대 오시면 안된다고 생각합니다. 서비스가 전무한 낚시터 대여소에 가까워요
처음에 끼는방법만 5분정도 알려주고 담당자는 컨테이너에서 핸드폰하고 손님들은 그때부터 지렁이끼기 새우끼기 잡은 물고기 빼기 다 알아서 해야돼요
잡은거 뭔지도 몰라요 컨테이너에서 폰하시니까요.
지렁이는 징그러운데 새우는 살이 물러서 찌에서 자꾸 빠져요 어쩔수 없이 지렁이 써야되는데 너무 징그러워요 장갑도 수분흡수되는 장갑이라 지렁이 내장이 느껴지네여. 여성분들은 어케할까 싶어요.

어종이 다양하다하지만, 낚시못하는 사람들은 구경도 못해요. 미끼 끼다가 시간 다가거든요. 쪼매난 것들만 잡다가 시간낭비하고 가네요.

google_reviews.author: 한재빈
google_reviews.text: 화장실 빼고는 친절한 사장님이 초보한테 딱맞게 가르쳐 주시고 배도 오래 타고 들어가지 않아도 되서 멀미 걱정은 안하셔도 될듯요 ㅎㅎ 아 애견동반도 됩니다^^

google_reviews.author: 김우진
google_reviews.text:
시설이 깨끗하고 좋아요
아이들이 편하게 낚시할수있는 곳으로 추천합니다
물고기도 잘잡혀요~~

google_reviews.author: 정규형
google_reviews.text:
배타고 들어가는 전망  훌륭
낚시하는 동안 전망도 좋아요
아이들이랑 안전하게 낚시 가능해서 좋았고
씨알 작지만 소소한 입질 있고 작은고기 잘 잡힙니다.
새우.지렁이 직접 끼워야 하고
잡은 물고기도 직접 빼야합니다.
이런거 못하시는분은 좀 힘들 수 있어요^^
가족들 지렁이.새우 끼느라 힘들어서 별4개입니다.

google_reviews.author: coo hunny
google_reviews.text:
꼬맹이들과 함께 다녀왔습니다.
멀미하지 않을까 걱정했는데 괜한 걱정이었네요~^^
뛰어다니는 꼬맹이들 따라 다니느라 무척 힘든 하루였습니다.ㅋㅋ
생각보다 많이 넓어요~ 잼나게 낚시 하고 갑니다~ 다음에 또 뵈요~

google_reviews_en.author: Joonho Choi (Juno)
google_reviews_en.text:
I think beginners should never come here. It's close to a fishing rental shop with no service whatsoever.
They just give you a five-minute tutorial on how to put it on, then the staff member sits in the container with their phone, and from then on, you have to figure out how to put in worms, put in shrimp, and take out the fish you caught. You don't even know what you caught because you're on the phone in the container.
The worms are gross, but the shrimp are so soft they keep falling off the float. You have no choice but to use worms, but they're so gross. The gloves are also moisture-wicking, so you can feel the worms' guts. I wonder what women would do.

They say there's a wide variety of fish, but people who don't know how to fish can't even see them. They waste time trying to put in bait. They just waste time catching small fish.

google_reviews_en.author: 한재빈
google_reviews_en.text: Except for the bathroom, the friendly owner will teach you everything that's perfect for beginners, and since the boat ride isn't long, you don't have to worry about seasickness. Haha. And you can bring your dog too.^^

google_reviews_en.author: 김우진
google_reviews_en.text: The facilities are clean and nice. I recommend this place as a place where kids can fish comfortably. The fish are also good.

google_reviews_en.author: 정규형
google_reviews_en.text:
The view from the boat ride is excellent.

The view is also great while fishing.

It was nice being able to fish safely with the kids.

The fish are small, but there are subtle bites and small fish are caught well.

You have to put on the shrimp and worms yourself, and

You also have to remove the fish you catch yourself.

It might be a bit difficult for those who aren't good at this kind of thing. ^^

I gave it 4 stars because my family had a hard time putting on the worms and shrimp.

google_reviews_en.author: coo hunny
google_reviews_en.text:
I went with the kids.
I was worried they'd get seasick, but my worries were unfounded~^^
It was a very tiring day chasing the kids running around. Haha
It's a lot bigger than I thought~ We had a lot of fun fishing~ See you next time~

fields.title: Tamna fishing
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Cheju, 이도2동 413-1

google_reviews.author: 시크한그녀.
google_reviews.text:
제주도 한정 별5개임.
타지역 기준으론 별3개 정도.
급하게 갈치 텐빈 일정이 잡혀서 여기저기 몇군데 낚시점 다녀본 결과 제주도내에선 여기가 가장 제품들이 많고 친절 하였음.
대부분 낚시점도 골프샾처럼 오프라인이 조금 더 싼데 제주도는 전체적으로 비쌈.
여튼 제주도에서 낚시채비 필요한 분들은 다른곳 가지 마시고 여기로 가시면 될듯.

google_reviews.author: KK 3
google_reviews.text:
직원분들이 굉장히 친절하시며 지식이 매우 뛰어나십니다.
안전하고,좋은 낚시를 항상 최우선으로 생각을 하시는 분들이며 항상 출조시 마다 꾸준한 조언과 팁을 알려주시어 낚시 경험이 많지 않은 저희 일행이 많은 어종을 잡았습니다. 매장또한 크고 깔끔하여 찾으시는 분들은 후회가 없을 것이라 생각합니다.

google_reviews.author: 제주엔바람
google_reviews.text: 제주에서 그나마 다양하게 갖춘 낚시매장입니다. 단,장비값은 비교사이트보단 다소 비쌉니다..채비및 에기류 소품위주로 쇼핑하시길 추천합니다.

google_reviews.author: life jo
google_reviews.text: 친절해요.  모르면 걍 물어보세요

google_reviews.author: 유덕종
google_reviews.text:
제주가 더 저렴해요.
육지에서 없는 제품들이 주르르..
한가지 흠은 가면 돈을 많이 쓰게 된다는거.. ㅜㅜ
한번쯤 방문해보면..ㅎ
득템의 기회가 있습니다. *^^*

google_reviews_en.author: minki kim
google_reviews_en.text: Great customer service

google_reviews_en.author: 시크한그녀.
google_reviews_en.text:
This is a 5-star rating for Jeju Island.
For other regions, it's about 3 stars.
I had a last-minute plan to go fishing for hairtail, so I visited several fishing shops. Of all the shops in Jeju, this one had the most products and was the most friendly.
Most fishing shops, like golf shops, are a bit cheaper offline, but Jeju Island is generally more expensive.
Anyway, if you need fishing gear in Jeju Island, don't look anywhere else. Just go here.

google_reviews_en.author: KK 3
google_reviews_en.text: The staff are extremely friendly and knowledgeable. They always prioritize safe and quality fishing, and they consistently provide advice and tips on every fishing trip, allowing our group, even those without much experience, to catch numerous species. The store is also large and clean, so I'm sure you won't regret visiting.

google_reviews_en.author: 제주엔바람
google_reviews_en.text: This is one of the most comprehensive fishing stores in Jeju. However, equipment prices are slightly higher than those found on comparison sites. We recommend focusing on gear, lures, and accessories.

google_reviews_en.author: life jo
google_reviews_en.text: They are friendly. If you don't know, just ask.

fields.title: Iho Experience Boat Fishing
fields.address: 1667-1 Iho 1(il)-dong, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: DASIT
google_reviews.text:
제주에서 몇번 배낚시를 해 보았지만 공항에서 가까워 시간을 아낄 수 있고 또 여러 종류의 어종을 낚고 맛 보고 싶으면 이 곳을 추천한다.
약 20m 의 깊이의 바다에서 2시간 동안 낚시를 하면서 여러 종류의 물고기를 낚을 수 있는 배낚시 체험이 가능하다.
예전 이곳 말고 차귀도에서 낚시 채험을 한 적 있는데 그곳은 단일 어종 고등어 아니면 전갱이 만을 낚아서 그닥 재미를 못 느꼈는데 이곳은 여러 종류의 물고기를 낚을 수 있어서 매우 즐거운 시간을 보낼 수 있었다.
우리는 가족이 처음으로 배낚시 체험을 하였는데  잊지못할 추억을 가진 것 같아 너무너무 좋았다.
담당 선장님도 훌륭했고 운영하는 이곳도 친절하며 너무 좋았다.

google_reviews.author: 연떤
google_reviews.text:
사장님이 친절하셔서 불편하지않게 잘 즐기다가 갑니다
저뿐만 아니라 다른분들 미끼 끼워주기, 잡은 고기 빼주기 번거로운 일들 직접 다 해주시고 구명조끼와 장갑 등 구비 잘 되어있었어용

google_reviews.author: 망고빈 Mangovin
google_reviews.text: 바람도 많이 불고 비가 와서 심해 낚시 예약했지만, 아쉽게도 잡어 낚시함. 체험이지만 그럼에도 나름 많이 잡혀서 재밌었음. 선장님(?) 배 위에 직원분들이 매우 친절하심. 대신, 안내해주시는 아주머니가 반말하셔서 기분이 좋진 않았음.. ㅎ 나이도 많으신 편도 아닌 거 같고, 당사자들도 나이가 적지 않은 편이었음 ㅎ

google_reviews.author: Jun Yoon
google_reviews.text: 재밌는 체험이였음 물고기도 많이잡히고 밥도 괜춘 고양이도 귀여움

google_reviews.author: 제주사랑맘
google_reviews.text: 이호해변에서 몽돌해변 알작지까지 이어진 환상의 산책코스 바람솔솔 좋아요

google_reviews_en.author: Angela Scott
google_reviews_en.text: So much fun! Service is great. Very kind workers and delicious food. Have them cook up the fish you caught for just 10,000 won per person!

google_reviews_en.author: DASIT
google_reviews_en.text:
I have tried boat fishing in Jeju a few times, but I recommend this place if you want to save time by being close to the airport and catch and taste various types of fish.

You can experience boat fishing for two hours in waters about 20 meters deep, where you can catch a variety of fish.

I previously tried a fishing experience at Chagwido, but I didn't find it very enjoyable there because I only caught single species like mackerel or horse mackerel. However, here, being able to catch various types of fish made for a very enjoyable time.

It was our family's first time trying boat fishing, and we were so happy to have created unforgettable memories.

The captain in charge was excellent, and the staff running the place were friendly; it was a wonderful experience.

google_reviews_en.author: 연떤
google_reviews_en.text:
The owner was kind, so I had a great time without any inconvenience.

Not only did he take care of the hassle, but he also personally helped others with baiting and removing fish. Life vests and gloves were also well-equipped.

google_reviews_en.author: 망고빈 Mangovin
google_reviews_en.text: It was very windy and rainy, so I booked a deep-sea fishing trip, but unfortunately, I only caught a few fish. It was an experience, but I still caught a lot, so it was fun. The captain(?) and the staff on the boat were very friendly. However, the guide spoke informally to me, which was a bit unpleasant. Hehe. He didn't seem that old, and the people involved were not young either. Hehe.

google_reviews_en.author: Jun Yoon
google_reviews_en.text: It was a fun experience, we caught a lot of fish, the food was good, and the cats were cute.

fields.title: Experience boat fishing at Gwangmyeong Lake
fields.address: 151-8 Soesokkak-ro, 특별자치도, Seogwipo, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 김ᄋᄋ
google_reviews.text:
제주에서 색다른 체험 찾다가 이용한 갑오징어 낚시배입니다.
배 크기도 크고 내부에 쉴 공간, 음료와 컵라면까지 무료로 제공돼서 편하게 즐길 수 있었어요.
전동 낚시대라 초보도 쉽게 할 수 있고, 사무장님이 계속 돌아다니면서 친절하게 도와주셔서 처음이어도 부담 없었습니다.
저는 한 마리도 못 잡았지만 남편은 4마리 잡았고, 잡은 갑오징어는 바로 손질해줘서 신선하게 먹을 수 있었어요.
낚시뿐만 아니라 바다 풍경 보면서 힐링하기도 좋아서 제주 오면 한 번쯤 해볼 만한 체험입니다!

google_reviews.author: 오주연
google_reviews.text:
제주도 여행중 배낚시 체험 광명호
다음날 비 예정이라 걱정했는데 배는 다행히 떴고 같이 타신분들도 계셔서 재미있게 즐길 수 있었다 이날은 잘 잡히는 편은 아니였는데 잿방어 하나 잡아서 회떠 맛있게 먹었다 !! 선장님께서 한팀 1물고기는 꼭 잡도록 목표를 잡고 도와주시기도하고 해서 즐겁고 쉽게 체험할 수 있음 제주 배낚시로 추천👍🏻

google_reviews.author: 김민주
google_reviews.text:
제주 서귀포에서 체험배낚시 광명호 이용했어요!
첫 배낚시 너무 신기하고 재밌었는데… 이날 진짜 안 잡히는 날이라 한 마리도 못 잡음 😂

그래도 선장님이랑 사무장님 계속 봐주시고 엄청 친절하셔서 좋았어요 저는 갑오징어 낚시했어요!

배도 크고 흔들림 적어서 멀미 거의 없었고, 선실에 누워서 쉴 수 있는 공간도 있어서 편했어요.
초보도 쉽게 할 수 있는 느낌이라 경험으로 한 번쯤 해보기 좋은 듯!

못 잡으면 추가로 갑오징어 주는데, 회 진짜 신선하고 맛있었어요👍🏻 다음엔 물고기 낚시로 다시 도전해볼 예정입니다...🤍

google_reviews.author: 성미영
google_reviews.text:
제주도 여행을 와서 배낚시체험을 했는데
이색적인 제주도여행코스로 너무 좋았어요!!
배낚시 초보인데도 낚시대 사용법과 잡는 법을
자세히 알려주셔서
갑오징어도 잡고 정말 재밌었어요😊
직접 잡은 갑오징어 회도 먹고
즐거운 배낚시 체험을 했답니다
제주도 체험배낚 광명호 최고~!!

google_reviews.author: jinhee kim
google_reviews.text:
제주 서귀포 체험배낚시 광명호에서 인생 첫 지깅 낚시 도전했어요ㅎㅎ

하효항에서 출항하는 체험 배낚시로, 처음 배낚시를 하는 사람도 충분히 즐길 수 있게 선장님과 스태프분들이 낚시 방법을 하나하나 친절하게 알려주세요~ 설명도 쉽고, 잘 안 되면 바로 옆에서 개인적으로 도와주셔서 부담이 없었어요!!

배에는 실내 휴식 공간, 화장실, 컵라면이랑 호빵, 음료 등 간식도 준비돼 있어서 4시간 체험 동안 크게 불편함 없었어요!!날씨 좋은 날에는 바다 풍경이 정말 예뻐서
낚시뿐 아니라 유람선 타는 기분으로 힐링하기도 좋아요◡̈

대어가 걸리면 선장님이 바로 와서 도와주시고 길이 측정이랑 인증샷까지 챙겨주셔서 분위기가 정말 좋았습니다. 저는 아쉽게도 큰 고기는 못 잡았지만, 낚싯대가 끌려갈 정도의 손맛은 확실히 느꼈어요ㅎㅎ 직접 잡은 고기는 회나 구이용으로 손질 예약까지 연계해주셔서
마무리까지 깔끔한 체험이었습니다. 제주에서 색다른 액티비티 찾으신다면 광명호 체험 배낚시 강력 추천해요!

google_reviews_en.author: 김ᄋᄋ
google_reviews_en.text:
This is a cuttlefish fishing boat trip I took while looking for a unique experience in Jeju.

The boat was spacious, and with a resting area inside and free drinks and cup noodles provided, I was able to enjoy the trip comfortably.

Since it uses electric fishing rods, even beginners can fish easily, and the boat manager walked around continuously offering friendly assistance, so I felt at ease despite it being my first time.

I didn't catch a single one, but my husband caught four. The cuttlefish were cleaned right away, so we were able to eat them fresh.

It's great for relaxing while enjoying the ocean scenery as well as fishing, so it is an experience worth trying at least once when visiting Jeju!

google_reviews_en.author: 오주연
google_reviews_en.text:
Boat Fishing Experience on Gwangmyeongho During a Trip to Jeju Island

I was worried because rain was forecast for the next day, but fortunately the boat sailed out, and since there were other people on board, I was able to enjoy it. The fishing wasn't particularly good that day, but I caught one amberjack, prepared it as sashimi, and enjoyed it! The captain helped us by setting a goal to catch at least one fish per team, making the experience fun and easy. I highly recommend boat fishing in Jeju 👍🏻

google_reviews_en.author: 김민주
google_reviews_en.text:
I took the Gwangmyeongho for a fishing experience in Seogwipo, Jeju!

It was my first time boat fishing, and it was so fascinating and fun... but it was just one of those days where nothing bit, so I didn't catch a single fish 😂

Still, the captain and purser kept an eye on us and were incredibly kind, which was great. I went cuttlefish fishing!

The boat was large and didn't rock much, so I barely got seasick. It was also comfortable because there was a space in the cabin where I could lie down and rest.

It felt easy enough for a beginner to do, so I think it's a good experience to try at least once!

If you don't catch anything, they give you extra cuttlefish, and the sashimi was really fresh and delicious 👍🏻 I plan to try fishing for fish next time... 🤍

google_reviews_en.author: 성미영
google_reviews_en.text:
I went on a boat fishing trip during my visit to Jeju Island, and it was such a great and unique travel itinerary!!

Even though I'm a beginner at boat fishing, they taught me in detail how to use the rod and how to catch fish, so I even caught a cuttlefish and had so much fun 😊

I also ate the cuttlefish sashimi I caught myself, and had a really enjoyable boat fishing experience.

Gwangmyeongho, the Jeju Island experience boat fishing tour, is the best~!!

google_reviews_en.author: jinhee kim
google_reviews_en.text:
I tried my first jigging fishing experience on the Gwangmyeongho Experience Boat Fishing in Seogwipo, Jeju.

This boat fishing experience departs from Hahyo Port. The captain and staff kindly explained fishing techniques step by step, ensuring even first-timers could fully enjoy it. The explanations were easy to understand, and if I had any difficulties, they were there to help me personally, which made it a breeze!

The boat has an indoor lounge, restroom, and snacks like cup ramen, steamed buns, and drinks, so I didn't feel any inconveniences during the four-hour experience. On a clear day, the ocean views are truly beautiful,
so it's not just about fishing, it's also a relaxing experience, like a cruise. ◡̈

When I caught a big fish, the captain came right away to help me, measuring its length and taking a commemorative photo. The atmosphere was great. I didn't catch a large fish, but I definitely felt the pull of my fishing rod. They even arranged for me to prepare the fish I caught for sashimi or grilling,
making it a truly enjoyable experience. If you're looking for a unique activity in Jeju, I highly recommend the Gwangmyeongho Experience Boat Fishing!

fields.title: Road Gun Fishing
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Seogwipo, 특별자치도, Daejeong-eup, Sangmo-ro 273beon-gil, 40 건영빌 1층 KR 로드건낚시
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 서귀포시 특별자치도, 대정읍 상모로273번길 40 건영빌 1층 KR 로드건낚시

google_reviews.author: HJ Kim
google_reviews.text:
낚시점에 대한
편견을 깨주는 곳
젊은 사장님 내외가
너무 친절하게 안내해주시고
채비도 다 해주셔서
초보도 쉽게 낚시하러
떠날 수 있게 해주시네요~~
감사합니다

google_reviews.author: Romano kim
google_reviews.text:
제주낚시관련 나름 유명한 유튜버가 운영하는곳, 낚시도 정말 잘하시고(잘 잡으시고), 영상에서는 얼굴이 나오지않고 멋진음성만 들려주셨는데, 실물은 목소리와같이 훈남이셨네요...이분이 포인트라고 한곳들 몇군데 가서 낚시해봤지만...포인트는 장소보다는 실력이 더 중요하다는 사실을 갈때마다 느끼고 있습니다.(뭔뜻인지 아시겠지요?)
그냥 쉽게 말하면 이곳 대표님이 낚시를 잘 하시는 분 이라는 뜻 입니다. 업장은 깔끔하게 정리정돈 잘되어있습니다. 재방문 의사 있습니다.

google_reviews.author: WAG S
google_reviews.text: 여기 낚시포인트 추천 잘해주고 설명도 기깔나는곳

google_reviews.author: 사오정
google_reviews.text: 사장님분들이 친절하시고, 다양한 낚시용품과 가격표들이 부착되어 있어, 필요한 물품은 살수있어  좋습니다.

google_reviews.author: 이갓파
google_reviews.text:
구독자 성지순례 하고갑니다.
로드건님 못뵈고 갔지만 로드걸님께서 친절하게
라인 다 감아주셨네요~
다음에 또 볼락낚시 조언받으러 고고싱~!!!

google_reviews_en.author: HJ Kim
google_reviews_en.text: A place that breaks down prejudices about fishing spots. The young owners and their wife are incredibly kind and provide all the gear, making it easy for even beginners to go fishing. Thank you.

google_reviews_en.author: Romano kim
google_reviews_en.text:
This place is run by a fairly famous YouTuber specializing in Jeju fishing. He is really good at fishing (and catches a lot of fish). In his videos, his face isn't shown, only his cool voice is, but in person, he was just as handsome as his voice... I've tried fishing at a few of the spots he recommended as "points," but every time I go, I realize that skill is more important than the location itself. (You know what I mean, right?)

Simply put, it means the owner of this place is a skilled angler. The establishment is neatly organized. I intend to visit again.

google_reviews_en.author: WAG S
google_reviews_en.text: This is a place that recommends fishing spots and provides clear explanations.

google_reviews_en.author: 사오정
google_reviews_en.text: The owners are friendly, and since there is a wide variety of fishing gear and price tags displayed, it is great to be able to buy the items you need.

google_reviews_en.author: 이갓파
google_reviews_en.text:
I'm off on a subscriber pilgrimage.

I didn't get to meet Road Gun, but Road Girl kindly spooled all the line for me~ I'm off again next time to get advice on rockfish fishing~!!!

fields.title: Chagwidojinseongpear fishing
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Cheju, 특별자치도, Noeulhaean-ro, 1164-4 1층

google_reviews.author: Gs G
google_reviews.text: 좋습니다.다만 이곳에서 추천하는 횟집은 가지 않는 걸 추천드립니다. 매운탕이 시원하지도 않은 밍밍함, 회도 무조건 세꼬시. 종업원은 중국분이시라 제대로 뭘 요청하기가 어렵네요. 다만 체험 낚시 선장님과 사모님은 정말 친절하셔서 담번에도 무조건 이용할 예정입니다

google_reviews.author: Younkwan Lee
google_reviews.text:
차귀도 체험낚시는 이곳! (21.10방문)

낚시 처음 경험을 여기서 했습니다.  고등어를 낚았고 무조건 누구나 낚습니다.

제 옆에 커플 여성분이 배에서 제일 잘 낚았고 어린아이들도 좋은 경험이 됩니다.
선장님 너무 친절하시구 어려워하지 않아도 된답니다. 처음엔 뭘까 싶지만 하다보면 별게 아니더군요 ㅎㅎ

고등어는 아무리 못해도 한사람앞에 적게는 서너마리 많게는 10마리 이상 들어올렸습니다.
한반에 두서마리씩 물리면 손맛이 더 좋았답니다.

고등어를 잡아야할때 좀 불쌍했지만 어쩌겠습니까 ㅎㅎ

앞으로도 여기 추천할거랍니다. 사장님 감사합니다!

google_reviews.author: 한혜진
google_reviews.text: 제주 배낚시 하기 좋은곳. 어른1만2천원 애들1만원 가성비 좋다. 1시간45분 정도 배타고 낚시 하기 딱이다. 고기도 잘 잡혀 애들도 좋아한다. 굳이 멀미약은 안 먹어도 될듯.

google_reviews.author: Juhyeon Park
google_reviews.text:
배낚시 한 배를 대절해서 고등어 잡이 다녀왔습니다. 6인 이상이면 사진에 보이는 배 하나 전체를 빌려서 다녀올 수 있어요! 정시에 출발해서 80분 정도 다녀옵니다.

고등어가 많은 곳 위에 배를 올려놓기에 못잡고 오는 상황은 없는 것 같아요. 고기를 기다리는 시간보다 새우 미끼를 끼우는 시간이 더 오래 걸려요. 낚시대 하나에 3개씩 미끼를 끼우고 던지는데, 한번에 2-3마리 걸릴 때도 있어요. 고등어 큰 것은 나름 힘도 느껴져서 재밌었습니다.

다 잡고 인근 식당에서 튀기거나 회를 떠준다고 들었어요. 저녁 일정이 따로 있어서 잡은 (죽은) 고등어 다 풀어줬습니다. 여러 배낚시 업체들이 있지만 여기 정말 추천드려요!

google_reviews.author: 윤보람
google_reviews.text: 단골집!! 매우 친절하시고 좋아용 ㅎㅎ 다음에도 계속 이용 예정입니당!:) (그리고 추가로 옆에 대물식당 인당 7000원에 잡은 고기로 매운탕,회,튀김이 아주 존맛탱임다--이제 식당만 운영하시고 물고기는 손질 못해주신대요...ㅠㅠ) 여전히 친절하시고 고도리(가게 강아지)는 귀염댕이임다

google_reviews_en.author: Gs G
google_reviews_en.text: It is good. However, I recommend avoiding the sashimi restaurant recommended here. The spicy fish stew was bland and not refreshing at all, and the sashimi was exclusively thinly sliced. Since the staff are Chinese, it is difficult to make proper requests. However, the fishing experience captain and his wife were incredibly kind, so I definitely plan to stay here again next time.

google_reviews_en.author: Younkwan Lee
google_reviews_en.text:
This is the place for Chagwido fishing experiences! (Visited on October 21)

I had my first fishing experience here. I caught a mackerel, and anyone can definitely catch one.

The woman in the couple next to me caught the most fish on the boat, and it is a great experience for young children as well.

The captain is very kind, and you don't need to feel intimidated. At first, you might wonder what it is, but once you get the hang of it, it's not a big deal at all, haha.

Even the most unskilled anglers managed to land anywhere from three or four to over ten mackerel per person.

The thrill of the catch was even better when two or three bit at a time.

I felt a bit sorry for the mackerel when I had to catch them, but what could I do, haha.

I will definitely recommend this place again in the future. Thank you,사장님 (owner)!

google_reviews_en.author: 한혜진
google_reviews_en.text: A great place for boat fishing in Jeju. It's 12,000 won for adults and 10,000 won for kids, so it's great value for money. It's perfect for a fishing trip of about 1 hour and 45 minutes. Fish bite well, so the kids love it too. You probably don't need to take motion sickness medication.

google_reviews_en.author: Juhyeon Park
google_reviews_en.text:
I chartered a boat for a mackerel fishing trip. If you have 6 or more people, you can rent the entire boat shown in the photo! It departs on time and takes about 80 minutes.

Since the boat is positioned right over areas where mackerel are abundant, it seems impossible to return empty-handed. It actually takes longer to attach the shrimp bait than to wait for the fish to bite. We put three baits on each rod and cast, and sometimes we catch 2 or 3 at a time. It was fun because the larger mackerel put up quite a fight.

I heard that after catching them, nearby restaurants fry them or prepare sashimi for you. Since I had a separate dinner schedule, I released all the (dead) mackerel back into the water. There are many boat fishing companies, but I highly recommend this one!

google_reviews_en.author: 윤보람
google_reviews_en.text: A regular place!! Very friendly and nice ㅎㅎ I plan to continue using it next time!:) (And in addition, the spicy fish stew, raw fish, and fried fish made with fish caught at the large fish restaurant next door cost 7,000 won per person and are really delicious--They only run the restaurant now and can't prepare fish...ㅠㅠ) They are still friendly and the dog at the store is cute.

fields.title: Yongyeon fishing
fields.address: Jeju-si, South Korea

google_reviews.author: _ JEJU_han
google_reviews.text: 친절한 사장님이 계신곳

google_reviews.author: 전설의바다
google_reviews.text: 사장님께서친절하시고 용품도다양하게 구비되어있습니다.

google_reviews.author: 제주중고차해결사김유철
google_reviews.text: 역시 구제주낚시전문점하면 용연낚시

google_reviews.author: 김윤식
google_reviews.text: 다른곳에 비해 가격도 저렴하고 사장님이 친절하고 센스있고 너그러워 보였어요.

google_reviews.author: 노상술
google_reviews.text: 제주 지역 특성상 많은 장비을 구비 하기 힘들지만 여긴 많은 편이고 저렴하고 사장님이 친절했어 좋습니다

google_reviews_en.author: _ JEJU_han
google_reviews_en.text: A place with a friendly boss

google_reviews_en.author: 전설의바다
google_reviews_en.text: The owner is kind, and a wide variety of supplies are available.

google_reviews_en.author: 제주중고차해결사김유철
google_reviews_en.text: When it comes to specialty fishing shops, it's Yongyeon Fishing.

google_reviews_en.author: 김윤식
google_reviews_en.text: The prices were cheaper compared to other places, and the owner seemed kind, thoughtful, and generous.

google_reviews_en.author: 노상술
google_reviews_en.text: Due to the characteristics of the Jeju region, it is difficult to stock a wide variety of equipment, but this place has plenty, is affordable, and the owner is friendly, so it is good.

fields.title: Jeju Experience Boat Fishing Seungryongho
fields.address: 1624-9 Hagwi 1(il)-ri, Aewol-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 소현
google_reviews.text: 배낚시는 처음이었는데 너무 재미있었습니다. 초보자에게 아주 친절하게 알려주셔요. 낚시하며 줄이 엉키거나 끊어지는 사고도 종종 발생했는데 빨리빨리 해결해주셔서 든든했습니다. 중간에 따끈한 수제비도 챙겨주시고 원하면 언제든 음료와 과자 라면도 먹을 수 있어 당 떨어질 걱정은 없었습니다. 잡은 갈치는 바로 맡겨서 손질하고 택배도 보낼 수 있어 편리했어요. 물론 손질비와 택배비는 별도입니다. 다음에도 또 가고 싶은 낚시배체험이었어요. 완전 추천합니다.

google_reviews.author: 안미경
google_reviews.text:
신랑이  낚시를 넘넘 좋아해  거의 매일 바다로  가는데...
오늘은 나도 함께 따라 나섰네요~~
날씨도 좋고 선장님 넘 재미나고 유머도 좋으시고  사무장님도  친절하세요 ....
한치를 못잡아도 선상에서 먹는  한치회  비빔밥도  꿀맛.~~~~
담에 또 따라가야 겠어요~~~~~
고기를 꼭 잡아야 하는건 아닝께...,ㅋㅋ
좋은사람과  함께하는  시간이  힐링이 되네요~~~~♡♡

google_reviews.author: 이재현
google_reviews.text: 선장님,매니저님 엄청친절해요.승룡호 쵝오!!

google_reviews_en.author: 소현
google_reviews_en.text: It was my first time boat fishing, and it was so much fun. They were very kind and helpful to beginners. Accidents like tangled or broken lines happened frequently while fishing, but they resolved them quickly, which was very reassuring. They even provided warm sujebi (hand-pulled noodle soup) in the middle of the trip, and since drinks, snacks, and ramen were available whenever I wanted, I didn't have to worry about my blood sugar dropping. It was convenient that I could drop off the caught hairtail fish for cleaning right away and have them shipped via courier. Of course, cleaning and shipping fees are separate. It was a fishing boat experience I would love to go on again. I highly recommend it.

google_reviews_en.author: 안미경
google_reviews_en.text:
My husband loves fishing so much that he goes out to sea almost every day...

So today, I tagged along too~~

The weather was great, the captain was so fun and had a great sense of humor, and the purser was kind too....

Even if we didn't catch any squid, the squid sashimi bibimbap eaten on board was absolutely delicious.~~~~

I definitely have to go again next time~~~~~

It’s not like we have to catch a fish..., haha

Spending time with good people is so healing~~~~♡♡

google_reviews_en.author: 이재현
google_reviews_en.text: The captain and manager are super kind. Seungryongho is the best!!

fields.title: 78Fishing
fields.address: 112 Tapdong-ro, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: 최종용
google_reviews.text:
2주전부터 관탈도 포인트 예약까지 했습니다. 심지어 내려줄 포인트와 인원수확인까지 3번 전화 했습니다. 그런데 당일날 가니까 예약은 없다고 말을 바꾸네요. 심지어 다른 배가 내려줬을거라 자리 없다고 하더니 78에서 예약한 다른 사람 3명이 먼저 내리네요. 단골들 위주로 장사 너무 심합니다. 차라리 예약 됐다고 다른포인트 가야한다고 말했으면 억울하지도 않네요. 그리고 내려준 포인트는 이름도 없는 포인트....
장사 이런식으로 단골들 위주로 하니까 일반 손님들은 참고 하세요. 뉴탐라호가 더 친절합니다 더일찍 출발하고 참고하세요.

google_reviews.author: 박대호BIGTIGER
google_reviews.text:
육지에서 출발한 꾼들이 추자나 관탈, 그리고 칼치선상등을 이용할수 있겠네요...
오랜된 낚시점인 만큼 전문가들 도움을 받을수가 있겠네요...
사모님을 비롯하여 주변분들이 엄청 친절 하시네요...

google_reviews.author: Oj K (그땐그랬지)
google_reviews.text:
관탈권 출조와 갈치낚시배가 있는곳입니다.
제주에서 드물게 혼무시를 취급하는곳입니다.
돌돔꾼들이 다니는 낚시방.
근데 좀 비쌉니다.

google_reviews.author: 파주헌터신희범
google_reviews.text: 낚시 재료는 비싸네요 친절하시긴 합니다

google_reviews.author: 노상술
google_reviews.text: 제품이 구비가 제데루  안되었있고 오래된 제품은 할인했어 팔면 좋을듯 요

google_reviews_en.author: 최종용
google_reviews_en.text:
I even made a reservation for the Gwantaldo point two weeks in advance. I even called three times to confirm the drop-off point and the number of passengers. However, when I arrived on the day, they changed their story, saying there were no reservations. They even claimed there were no seats available because another boat had likely dropped us off, only for three other people who had reserved on the 78 to get off first. They are doing business too aggressively, prioritizing their regulars. I wouldn't have felt so wronged if they had just told me there was a reservation and we had to go to a different point. And the drop-off point they dropped us off at is a nameless spot...

Since they do business this way, prioritizing their regulars, regular customers should keep this in mind. The New Tamra ferry is friendlier; please note that it departs earlier.

google_reviews_en.author: 박대호BIGTIGER
google_reviews_en.text:
Fishing enthusiasts departing from land can use the Chuja, Gwantal, and Kalchi Lines...
As this is a long-established fishing shop, I'm sure I'll be able to get expert help...
The owner and everyone around are incredibly friendly...

google_reviews_en.author: Oj K (그땐그랬지)
google_reviews_en.text:
This is a place with boats for Gwantal-gwon fishing trips and hairtail fishing.

It is one of the few places in Jeju that handles Honmushi.

A fishing shop frequented by rockfish anglers.

However, it is a bit expensive.

google_reviews_en.author: 파주헌터신희범
google_reviews_en.text: Fishing supplies are expensive, but you are kind.

google_reviews_en.author: 노상술
google_reviews_en.text: The product is not in stock and it would be good to sell the old product at a discount.
