google_reviews.author: Woongyoung Park
google_reviews.text: 큰 고기는 안잡혀요. 자잘한 고기만 잡힙니다. 입질 많고 잘 잡혀 애들 데라고 낚시체험 하기 좋아요. 큰 횟감 잡고 싶다면 다른 지역으로 가세요  잡은 생선은 주변 식당 가면 탕과 회, 튀김 만들어 주는데 기대는 하지 마세요. 정말 맛 없어요.

google_reviews.author: 이상현
google_reviews.text: 십여분 정도 배를 타고 나가서 낚시 손맛을 느끼기 충분합니다. 손바닥만한 고등어가 주렁주렁 올라오고 간혹 재수좋으면 쥐치라던가 돔 종류도 올라옵니다. 1시간 반정도의 시간이 금방 지나고, 잡아온 고기들은 횟집에 가져가서 1인당 7천원만 계산하면 회,튀김,매운탕으로 상차려집니다. 훌륭한 상은 아니지만 직접 갓잡아온 고기로 차려진 싱싱하고 값진 밥상입니다. 가성비 굿~!

google_reviews.author: SkyFull S
google_reviews.text:
저렴한가격에 좋은 경험했음.
배가 작아 많이 흔들림.
멀미하는 사람은 권하지 않음.
도구준비되어있어 몸만 가면됨.
미끼를 잘 다루면 적당한크기의 고기는 많이 낚임.
재미 있음.

google_reviews.author: DASIT
google_reviews.text:
말 그대로 배를 타고 낚시를 체험하는 것으로 큰 욕심없이 경험해보기 바랍니다.
1인당 정해진 금액을 내고 예약하여 즐길 수 있고 어느정도 인원이 되면 배 한대를 전용 예약하여 즐길 수도 있습니다.
횟감용 큰 어종이나 고급 생선을 낚으려고 생각치 마시고 초보자들이 두시간 정도 같이 낚시하며 즐기며 즐거운 경험을 하는데 초점을 맞추시면 될 듯 싶습니다.
차귀도 앞 이곳은 여러 체험 낚싯배 상점들이 있고 이곳도 그중 한 곳입니다.
배를 타면 약 10분 정도 떨어진 앞 바다에서 닻을 내리고 낚시를 하며 장비 및 미끼가 모두 제공됩니다.
또한 낚시 방법에 대해 설명해 주신 후 낚시를 시작합니다.
잡으신 물고기는 선상이나 또는 하선 후 상차림에 대한 일정 금액을 내고 식당에서 맛볼 수 있습니다.
선장 되신지 십여일 되신 선장님의 친절한 서비스로 먹을만한 사이즈의 고등어와 전갱이를 많이 잡으며 즐거운 시간을 보낼 수 있었다.

google_reviews.author: 부용석
google_reviews.text:
낚시체험이라면 강추합니다.
무엇보다 자연경관이 빼어난
차귀도 주변에서 체험을 즐길수있는
장점과 가까이 수월봉과 가파도, 신창 해안도로풍차와 마라도까지 보이고 지질공원도 한 눈에 들어온다.

google_reviews_en.author: Cao Thi Thuy Ai
google_reviews_en.text: Love it here

google_reviews_en.author: Woongyoung Park
google_reviews_en.text: You won't catch any big fish. You'll only catch small ones. The bites are good and the catch is easy, so it's a great fishing experience for kids. If you want to catch a big sashimi, go somewhere else. If you take the fish you catch to a nearby restaurant, they'll make soup, sashimi, or fried fish, but don't expect much. It's really not tasty.

google_reviews_en.author: 이상현
google_reviews_en.text: A ten-minute boat ride is enough to get a taste of the fishing experience. Palm-sized mackerel hang in abundance, and if you're lucky, you might even catch a cutlassfish or a sea bream. An hour and a half quickly passes, and the catch is taken to a sushi restaurant, where it's served as sashimi, fried fish, or spicy fish stew for just 7,000 won per person. It's not a fancy meal, but it's a fresh and valuable meal made with freshly caught fish. Great value!

google_reviews_en.author: SkyFull S
google_reviews_en.text:
It was a great experience for the low price.
The boat is small and rocks a lot.
Not recommended for those prone to seasickness.
The gear is provided, so all you need to do is move.
If you handle the bait well, you'll catch plenty of fish of a decent size.
It was fun.

google_reviews_en.author: DASIT
google_reviews_en.text:
As the name suggests, this is a fishing experience on a boat, so I hope you enjoy it without being too ambitious.

You can enjoy it by making a reservation and paying a fixed fee per person, or if you have a sufficient group, you can reserve an entire boat exclusively.

Please do not expect to catch large sashimi-grade fish or high-end seafood; instead, focus on having a fun experience fishing with beginners for about two hours.

There are several experience fishing boat shops located in front of Chagwido, and this is one of them.

Once you board, the boat drops anchor in the open sea about 10 minutes away, and all equipment and bait are provided.

You will also be given an explanation of the fishing method before you begin.

You can enjoy the fish you catch on board or at the restaurant after disembarking, by paying a certain fee for the meal.

Thanks to the kind service of the captain, who has been in the position for only about ten days, we were able to catch plenty of edible mackerel and horse mackerel and had a great time.

The owner is so kind!!

It was my first time fishing, but he explained everything step by step, and he found the perfect fishing spots, so fish are coming up every time I cast!!

google_reviews_en.author: 장누리

Let's embark on a long journey to #Jigwido Island#, rich in fishing grounds, on the #Namjinho# departing from #Wimi Port#.

Major Species: #Yellowtail #Greater Yellowtail #Yellowtail #Triggerfish #Rockfish #Snowfish #Red Snapper #Spiny Snapper #Rockfish #Wrasse #Rockfish #Stonefish #Goldfish #Seagull #Tuna #Mackerel #Squid #Hairtail #Striped Spanish Mackerel #Spanish Mackerel

google_reviews_en.author: 전안수
google_reviews_en.text: A fishing experience you can't miss on your trip to Jeju Island. I searched and chose Namjin Lake. It was a great experience and a pleasant healing experience. The two-hour trip seemed a bit short, so I went for the three-hour trip.

google_reviews_en.author: 장서연
google_reviews_en.text: It was a great place for kids to play. My 8-year-old son was really good at fishing. The owner was friendly, and we got tickets in advance from Naver, so we had a cheap time. It's also a 10-minute walk from Sonobel, which is really nice.

google_reviews_en.author: lee sewon

google_reviews_en.author: Jonghee Cho

google_reviews_en.author: 강영민

google_reviews_en.author: 임춘기

google_reviews.author: kang
google_reviews.text: 맨 처음에 설명이 좀 불친절하세요. 그래도, 돌고래도 계속 보여주시려고 노력하시고 낚시 방법도 처음에 설명해 주십니다.

google_reviews.text:
돌고래 먼저보여주셨어요~ 아니 육지에서는 그렇게 안보이던 돌고래를 이렇게 바다에서 보니깐 얼마나 신기하던지요 ㅠ ㅠ

google_reviews.author: 젤포도
google_reviews.text: 선장님이 친절하시고 가르쳐 주시는대로만 하면 아주 잘 잡힙니다. 1시간30분짜리했는데 둘이서 8마리 잡았어요.

google_reviews.author: 이석현
google_reviews.text: 지난번 낚시체험 성공으로 다시한번 도전 이번에는 우영우 에서 나왔던 남방큰돌고래 를 볼수있는 돌핀뷰 낚시에 도전. . .결과는 대성공 ㅋㅋ 우영우 도 실패했던 돌고래 나는봤음. . .돌고래도 보고 낚시체험도 성공하고 날씨도 장마라고 했는데 맑은 하늘보며 돌고래 보고 체험낚시 했음. . .다음에는 노을타임 도전

google_reviews.author: SH H
google_reviews.text: 제주패스에 있어서 했는데 문의할게 있어 물어보니 슈퍼할머니 짜증인 말투에 표정 썩어있고 불친절 확 느껴짐. 물어보는데 건성에 띡띡거려서 시작부터 기분 잡치고 시작. 배로 낚시하러나가 위치잡은 후, 배 좌우 그늘 위치가 고정인데 땡볕에 있으라고 해서 바꿔달라고 하니 다른 팀 일행한테 알아서 말하라고 하는데 황당. 돈내고 하는데 1시간 내내 누구는 그늘에서 하고 누구는 땡볕에서 하라는데 어이없음. 어쩔 수 없다는데 일사병걸려 쓰러지면 책임지나? 낚시법 설명할 때, 30분씩 위치바꾸라고 안내하는게 상식아닌지. 제주패스 외에 추가 인당 7000원씩 현금계좌이체받고 체험하면서. 낚시는 둘째치고 오늘 일정 첫코스로 여기왔다 오늘 종일 화나서 여행망침. 네이버 리뷰, 블로거들은 칭찬일색이던 네이버 광고댓글 믿는건...제주패스에 배낚시 여기 하나 뜨지만, 굳이 여기 오지 말고 친절한 다른 업체에서 즐겁게 하기바라는 마음에 구글리뷰남김

google_reviews_en.author: kang
google_reviews_en.text: The explanations are a bit unfriendly at first. Still, they try to show you the dolphins and even explain fishing methods from the beginning.

google_reviews_en.author: Made in jeju
google_reviews_en.text:
They showed me the dolphins first~ No, it was so amazing to see dolphins in the ocean, which are hard to see on land. ㅠ ㅠ
Thanks to the captain, I saw such an amazing sight!!! 😍
It was great to see plenty of dolphins, and the fishing was so good that there was no time to get bored.
As I write this, I only have the good points, but I really admit it.
My girlfriend said it was the most fun she'd had in Jeju Island. 😊
I'll definitely go again👍

google_reviews_en.author: 젤포도
google_reviews_en.text: The captain is kind, and if you follow his instructions, you'll catch a lot of fish. We fished for an hour and a half, and the two of us caught eight fish.

google_reviews_en.author: Chiawei
google_reviews_en.text:
Last time we went to the island, we hadn't even finished exploring it before they told us to wait for the boat. They said boarding time was 40 minutes, and even if we went early, it was 30 minutes, but they told us we only had 10 minutes. It was a waste of money, and we didn't even get to the lighthouse. They were totally lying!

Never choose this company if you want to go to the island.

google_reviews_en.author: 이석현
google_reviews_en.text: After the success of the last fishing experience, I tried again this time, and this time I tried dolphin view fishing where I could see the southern right whale that came out of Wooyoungwoo. . . The result was a great success ㅋㅋ I saw the dolphin that Wooyoungwoo failed to see. . . I saw the dolphin and the fishing experience was successful, and although the weather was supposed to be rainy season, I saw the dolphin under a clear sky and experienced fishing. . . Next time I'll try at sunset time.

google_reviews.text:
네이버 검색하고 다녀왔습니다
한시간이라 좀 짧았지만
고기를 잡아보고 마지막엔 놓아주는 시간까지!
아이들이 무척 즐거워 했어요
구글 평점이 없다는게 안타까워
후기 올려요!
어린아이가 있다면 꼭 체험해보시길
추천합니다*^

google_reviews.author: 안향미
google_reviews.text: 낚시 체험할겸 신청했는데 물고기가 많아서 아이도 쉽게 잡고 처음해봤는데 잘 알려주셔서 재밌었어요 ㅎ 아이가 너무 좋아하네요^^ 강추~!!! 즐거운 시간이었어요^^

google_reviews.author: 권기상
google_reviews.text: 아이들 낚시체험으로 좋은 장소입니다. 선장님 설명도 유익하고, 안전하게 가족들과 시간을 보낼 수 있는 곳입니다.

google_reviews.author: sijun park
google_reviews.text:
애들한테 인기만점인 이유가있음
전통 대낚시로 유아부터 초등학생까진 최고의 코스임
테우란 해녀가 물질하러 들어갈때 타는전통배를 말한다고함

google_reviews.author: 마리오
google_reviews.text:
가족과 함께 어촌 체험가능한 곳이네요.
태우를타구 낚시 체험도 가능.
한림선착장 바로옆에 있네요~~

google_reviews_en.author: 당당이
google_reviews_en.text:
I searched on Naver and went.
It was a bit short at one hour, but
we caught the fish and even had time to release them at the end!
The kids had a blast.
It's a shame there aren't any Google ratings, so I'm posting a review!
If you have young children, this is a must-try.
I highly recommend it*^

google_reviews_en.author: 안향미
google_reviews_en.text: I signed up for a fishing experience, and there were so many fish that my child caught them easily. It was our first time, but the instructor taught us well, so it was fun. My child really loves it. Highly recommended! We had a great time.

google_reviews_en.author: 권기상
google_reviews_en.text: This is a great place for children to experience fishing. The captain's explanations are informative, and it's a safe place for families to spend time together.

google_reviews_en.author: sijun park
google_reviews_en.text:
There's a reason it's so popular with kids.
This traditional fishing experience is perfect for children from toddlers to elementary school students.
Teu refers to the traditional boats that female divers use when diving.

google_reviews_en.author: 마리오
google_reviews_en.text: This is a great place to experience a fishing village with your family. You can even try fishing on a boat. It's right next to Hallim Wharf.

지귀도에 낚시하러 가기전에는 항상 들리는 곳.
운영중이신 두분이 낚시인이자 낚시유튜버이기도 하고 실제 조황과 요즘 트렌드에 맞는 각종 채비와 집어제가 구비되어있는 준비된 곳이죠. 제주시에 있었다면 매일 출근도장을 찍었을 장소 ^^

google_reviews.author: EMPRE Choo (empre)
google_reviews.text:
외지(서울)사람으로써  거의 유일하게  눈탱이 안치고 조황 사실데로 알려주는 낚시점임
근처 부속섬  예약없이가도  유일하게 선주 연락해서 잡아주는곳
서귀포쪽 숙소잡고 낚시 한사람은 꼭 여기가라 횽이 추천한다
여기 밑밥 말고 섭섭하다는 섶섬가서 뱅어 기록 갱신했다 ㅡ 미친 반유동만 하다가 안경낀 남자 사장님 말고 미모의 여자사장님 추천 제로찌 전유동에 눈떳다

google_reviews.author: Broker Joo
google_reviews.text:
주인장님 낚시이해도 높음. 도움 많이됨.유튜버운용.
매장 무지 깔끔함. 친절함. 가게앞 주차공간 있어 편함.굿굿굿.

google_reviews.author: 허석
google_reviews.text: 처음한다고 하고 갔는데 두레박 된다했었는데 두레박 안되고 떡밥 주는거처럼 말해서 주나보다 했는데 두레박 말고 떡밥을 줘서 떡밥 구입함. 다음날 낚시 대여 하루 더한다고 갔는데 새우미끼 2만3천원에 팔아먹음 레전드 낚시대여소

google_reviews.author: 푸른바다
google_reviews.text:
오늘은 새로운 메뉴가 있어 먹어봄😀
"빅토리아Mini파운드"
산타를 닮은 파운드~~맛있네요

google_reviews_en.author: 제주중고차해결사김유철
google_reviews_en.text:
A place I always stop by before heading to Jiguido for fishing.

The two owners are avid anglers and fishing YouTubers, and it is a well-equipped spot stocked with real fishing reports, as well as various tackle and groundbait suitable for current trends. If I lived in Jeju City, I would be a regular here every day.

google_reviews_en.author: EMPRE Choo (empre)
google_reviews_en.text:
As someone from out of town (Seoul), this is the only fishing spot that provides accurate fishing information without having to set up a reservation.
It's the only place on a nearby island that will contact the owner and catch you a catch without a reservation.
Anyone who stays in Seogwipo and fishes here should definitely go here, my brother recommends.
I broke my record for catching black rockfish on Seopseom Island, which I'm not sure about, despite the lack of bait. After being a regular at semi-floating, I discovered Zerochi Jeonyudong, recommended by a beautiful female owner, not a bespectacled male owner.

google_reviews_en.author: Broker Joo
google_reviews_en.text: The owner has a keen understanding of fishing and is very helpful. He also runs a YouTube channel. The store is incredibly clean and friendly. There's convenient parking in front of the store. It's great.

google_reviews_en.author: 허석
google_reviews_en.text: I went there for the first time and they said they would give me a durebak but they didn't give me a durebak and instead gave me bait so I thought they would give me one but instead they gave me bait so I bought it. The next day I went to rent another day of fishing but they sold me shrimp bait for 23,000 won at Legend Fishing Rod Rental.

google_reviews_en.author: 푸른바다
google_reviews_en.text:
Today, I tried a new menu item. 😀
"Victoria Mini Pound"
A pound that looks like Santa. It's delicious.

google_reviews.author: wild guy
google_reviews.text: 쿠폰제가 있어서 어차피 낚시가는김에 받는 쿠폰으로 나중에 필요한 물건 살수 있어서 너무 좋음

google_reviews.author: 케이비

google_reviews.text: 바쁜것도 없는거 같은데 바쁜척하며 불친절함 뜨내기라 그런가

google_reviews.author: 이주호

google_reviews_en.author: wild guy
google_reviews_en.text: It's great that there's a coupon system so I can use the coupons I get while fishing to buy things I need later.

google_reviews_en.author: 케이비
google_reviews_en.text: I visit Yeosi often because it's the biggest fishing shop near Hamdeok and has the widest variety. It's really good haha.

google_reviews_en.author: 고기랑
google_reviews_en.text: You might find the landlady a bit unfriendly, perhaps because that is just her personality.

google_reviews_en.author: No숙자
google_reviews_en.text: They don't seem busy, but they act like they are and are unfriendly. Is it because I'm a newbie?

google_reviews.author: 어떠노 (어떠노)
google_reviews.text:
장마철 한치와 오징어 잡이로 유명한곳.
우리나라에서 가장긴 방패제인것 같아요.
수온이 따듯해서 많이 잡히는 한치와 오징어.
제주에서 가장 인기 많은 곳.
낚시는 즐기시는 분들이라면 제주에서 꼭 한번 찾게 되는 명소 입니다. 오징어와 한치잡이는 찌의 깊이를 잘 맞추는게 포인트 인것 같아요.
그리고 화장실이 없어 여성분들은 꼭 명심하세요.
큰 볼일은 미리 하시고 낚시를 즐기시면 좋을 듯 합니다.

google_reviews.author: 임미정
google_reviews.text: 냄새가 ٩( ◣ω◢ )و

google_reviews.author: 鈴木翔
google_reviews.text: 몰라

google_reviews_en.author: 어떠노 (어떠노)
google_reviews_en.text:
This is a place famous for catching squid and cuttlefish during the rainy season.
It seems to be the longest squid dam in Korea.
The warm waters produce abundant cuttlefish and squid.
It's the most popular spot in Jeju.
For those who enjoy fishing, this is a must-visit spot in Jeju. The key to catching squid and cuttlefish is to properly adjust the depth of your float.
There are no restrooms, so women should keep this in mind.
It's best to take care of any errands beforehand and enjoy your fishing adventure.

fields.title: Experience Primer Fishing Village
fields.address: 22-10 Hado-ri, Gujwa-eup, Cheju, Jeju-do, South Korea

google_reviews.author: MARI LEE
google_reviews.text:
어촌 체험마을은 운영하지않고,그냥 모래사장만 있어요.
오래된 체험관이 관리 되지않고,고양이들과 쓰레기만 돌아다녔어요~
모래사장은
모래가 화산재처럼 고운 모래가 좋았어요.
사람이 없어, 조용히 거닐기는 좋아요.

google_reviews.author: 전기윤
google_reviews.text:
해녀분께서 금방 잡은 해산물도 살수 있고 바닷길도 들어가볼수 있어서 제주도를 더 느낄수가 있었어요.
자주가는 제주여행이지만 색다른 경험이였어요.

google_reviews.author: 김준혁
google_reviews.text:
혼자 제주도 여행을 하는중에 뭘할까 고민하던차 아는 지인이 제주도에서 해녀체험을 해봤다고해서
급히 알아봤는데 혼자서도 물질이 가능하다고 했었다 오전 11시 오후 3시 2회 실시하고 그날 날씨 멤버상황에 따라 가능여부 정해지는가보다
당일예약도 간혹 된다하니 전화해서 가능여부 문의해보는것도.
시설은 고퀄을 기대하긴 어렵다. 해녀삼촌과함께하는 하도리 물질체험
좋은 시간이었고 끝나고해주시는 소라찜과 컵라면 또 먹으러 가고싶다
물질 하러 또 해녀삼촌 뵈러가고싶은 하도해녀체험마을이었다

google_reviews.author: NAMTAEK KIM
google_reviews.text: 하도마을은 아직 개발의 손이 닿지 않아 대중들에게는 많이 알려지지 않은 마을이지만 천연기념물 토끼섬 문주란 자생지, 세계적 희귀조류인 노랑부리저어새황새, 백로, 가마우지류 등 수십종의 철새가 날아드는 하도철새도래지, 왜구침입을 막기위해 조선시대 축조된 제주특별자치도 기념물 별방진과 해녀들의 삶과 애환,풍습들을 한 눈에 볼수 있도록 전시된 해녀박물관, 눈부시게 아름답고 깨끗한 푸른바다의 하얀백사장 하도해수욕장, 우도를 벗삼아 정면에 정면에 자리하고 있어 가장 제주적인 바다문화와 바다풍경을 체험하고 만끽할수 있는 전형적인 어촌마을이다. (두산백과)

google_reviews.author: 이택수
google_reviews.text: 해녀분들도 관계자 분들도 다들 친절하시고 장비관리상태도 좋습니다. 그냥 몸만 오시면 되요. 바다에 물고기가 많으나 물속 바위도 많아 입출수시 조심해야 합니다. 스노쿨링이나 해녀체험을 추천드립니다.

google_reviews_en.author: Jadyn Kuah
google_reviews_en.text: So much fun! We don’t speak any Korean but hoped in and had lots of pointing guidance from the experienced haenyeo. I didn’t catch much but they sure did! It was like having a personal show below the water. w40,000 each was worth it to me!

google_reviews_en.author: se SG
google_reviews_en.text: So much fun with 13 years old daughter. She and I both had unforgettable memories.they are very nice!

google_reviews_en.author: Mark
google_reviews_en.text:
We showed up for the diving experience without a booking as we couldn’t speak Korean and make a phone reservation; they accommodated us happily.

The area we dove was calm and shallow enough to be comfortable in the water, and the haenyeo were constantly pointing out various shells to pick.

Wetsuits, fins, masks, gloves and socks were provided, so no need to bring your own gear. There were male and female showers to wash up after diving.

Overall, I loved the experience. If you love the water or want to try something unique, I would recommend this.

google_reviews_en.author: Ray Talbot
google_reviews_en.text: Hidden beach that doesn't get crowded. Car park has recently been upgraded. Small cafe for refreshments. Tide comes right up to edge so don't get caught out. Beach is smooth sand with some volcanic rock outcrops to explore. Sadly quite a lot of rubbish washed up. Local village has some 650 women divers however, this occupation is not so popular with younger women. Not easy to get to without a car.

google_reviews_en.author: Matthew Ambrosia
google_reviews_en.text: The fishing wasn't good but catching sea creatures in the tide pool was fun for the kids

google_reviews.author: jungrae jo
google_reviews.text:
아무런 준비 없이도 체험해볼 수 있는 선상낚시
선장님이 시키시는대로만 하면 누구나 낚을 수 있음
잡은 고기는 바로 옆 식당에서 먹을 수도 있고, 회로 떠서 포장도 가능(유료)

google_reviews.author: WOOHO CHANG
google_reviews.text: 갯지렁이를 미끼로 사용하고, 쏨뱅이가 주로 잡힙니다. 제주시와 가까워서 차귀도배낚시보다는 시간적인 잇점이 있고, 연계된 식당에서 잡은 고기로 인당1만원에 식사도 가능합니다.

google_reviews.author: Hank Lim
google_reviews.text: 예약받는분 불친절. 똑같이 미끼 쓰는데 1인예약은 곤란하다고 5천원 더 받으시네요. 5천원 더 냈다고 미끼를 더 주시진 않았아요. 그래도 조과는 괜찮네요.

google_reviews.author: 강창호
google_reviews.text: 처음에  예약할때에는  잡아온생선 맛도보여준다고하고 아무것도 준비할것 없다더니  당일배타고나서  미끼값 더달라고 하고  배낚시하고나서 생선을 맛도 못보고 그냥 왔어요  세상에  이런데가 다있구나  맛보기로 저희가 낚아온생선으로 회  조금 만 떠달라고하니 1인당 6천원이래요  내가잡은생선 그냥 조금 맛 보고싶은것인데 해도 해도 너무하네요

google_reviews.author: wijun lee
google_reviews.text: 아이들이랑 즐거운 시간 보낼 수 있었습니다 그리고 다랑어도 많이 잡게 해 주시고

google_reviews_en.author: Christine Lee
google_reviews_en.text:
Very disappointing experience – not recommended.
The Korean man who operated the boat was extremely impatient and unfriendly. I went with my child, and when my child got seasick and threw up, he showed no concern or willingness to help. Instead, he made a disgusted noise about the life jacket being dirty.

His cold and dismissive attitude made me feel like I had paid just to be treated poorly. We cleaned up everything ourselves, including the mess, but the overall experience was terrible. I definitely do not recommend this place, especially if you're going with children.

Families with kids – be cautious. This is not a child-friendly service.

google_reviews_en.author: jungrae jo
google_reviews_en.text:
Experience boat fishing without any preparation.
Anyone can fish by following the captain's instructions.
You can eat your catch at the restaurant next door, or have it sliced ​​into sashimi and packaged for a fee.

google_reviews_en.author: WOOHO CHANG
google_reviews_en.text: Lugworms are used as bait, and rockfish are mainly caught. Since it is close to Jeju City, it offers a time advantage over boat fishing at Chagwido, and you can also enjoy a meal with the fish you caught at affiliated restaurants for 10,000 won per person.

google_reviews_en.author: Hank Lim
google_reviews_en.text: The person taking the reservation was unfriendly. Even though we use the same bait, they charged an extra 5,000 won, saying it was difficult for a single person. They didn't give me any extra bait just because I paid the extra 5,000 won. Still, the catch is decent.

google_reviews_en.author: 강창호
google_reviews_en.text: When I first made the reservation, they said they would let me taste the fish they caught and that I didn't have to prepare anything, but after getting on the boat that day, they asked me to pay more for bait, and after fishing on the boat, I just came back without even tasting the fish. I wonder if there are places like this in the world. When I asked them to make a little sashimi with the fish we caught to taste it, they said it was 6,000 won per person. I just wanted to taste a little of the fish I caught, but no matter how much I tried, it was too much.

They say there are about 120 of them roaming the Jeju coast. When we went out on the dolphin research boat(?), they were just peeking out from a distance. Perhaps because of the strong winds, there was a lot of water splashing around. If the company hadn't thoughtfully provided raincoats, we could have been in trouble. There are also various activities available, such as painting horned conch, fishing, and tasting horned conch. (Children 29,500 won/Adults 34,500 won) (Provided by: Dr. Sko, Science Communicator)

google_reviews.author: KEUN SU PARK
google_reviews.text:
방파제 낚시야 늘 재미있죠. 바로 도두항 이 위치한 곳이라서 화장실부터 식당 기타등등등 걸어서 이동하면서
부담없이 아무때나 낚시할 수 있는 곳 입니다.

도두항 걸어가서 몸국 드시면 배 고프고 출출할 때 몸이 편안해 집니다.

주변에 함께 낚시하는 분들도 많아서 재미있구요. 무료하지 않습니다.
토박이 고양이도 있어서...
고양이랑 친해지면 언제든지 고양이 물고기 주면서 즐낚할 수 있습니다.

물 맑고요ㅡ ^^

사진에 나오는 방파제는 배와 모터보트가 들낙거리는 장소라 파도가 치고 조금 시끄러울 수 있습니다.

찌 낚시로 만조 때 입질이 많은 곳 입니다.
주종은 참돔, 벵에돔, 돌돔등등 숭어, 고등어, 갈치 등 다양하게 올라옵니다.

원투낚시로 붕장어 우럭 쏨뱅, 서대, 뽈락등

루어로 여름~가을 방어 부시리 삼치등 회유성 어종들 들락합니다. 무늬오징어도 나옵니다.

한치 낚시하다가 추락사가 많이 발생한 곳이라 안전에는 꼭 유의하셔야 합니다.
한치는 5월에서 9월 입니다.

흰 등대 외편으로는 잡히는 어종이 다릅니다.

google_reviews.author: 윤성현
google_reviews.text: 멍청한 물고기의 대명사 각재기가 자주 잡히던 스팟

google_reviews_en.author: KEUN SU PARK
google_reviews_en.text:
Breakwater fishing is always fun. Since Doduhang Port is located right here, you can walk to restrooms, restaurants, and other amenities, making it a place where you can fish anytime without any hassle.

If you walk to Doduhang Port and have some Momguk, it will soothe your body when you're feeling hungry.

There are many other people fishing nearby, so it's fun and never boring.

There are also local cats...

If you become friendly with the cats, you can enjoy fishing while feeding them fish whenever you want.

The water is clear, too. ^^

The breakwater shown in the photo is a place where boats and motorboats come and go, so the waves can be crashing and it can be a bit noisy.

It is a spot where you get a lot of bites during high tide with float fishing.

The main catches include red sea bream, black sea bream, rock sea bream, as well as various other species such as mullet, mackerel, and cutlassfish.

Surf fishing yields conger eels, rockfish, scorpionfish, sole, and black rockfish.

From summer to autumn, migratory species such as yellowtail amberjack, amberjack, and Spanish mackerel come and go using lures. Spotted squid also appear.

Since there have been many fatal falls while squid fishing in this area, you must exercise extreme caution regarding safety.

Squid are available from May to September.

The species caught on the left side of the white lighthouse are different.

google_reviews_en.author: 윤성현
google_reviews_en.text: The spot where the Japanese amberjack, the epitome of a stupid fish, was frequently caught

감사드립니다.

google_reviews_en.author: Tristan Tang
google_reviews_en.text:
Rented Elfama Epoca Gen 2 in September 2025, the bike is in good condition with excellent service. Bike shop offers to come to your assistance as long you are willing to wait. Bikes can be delivered to your hotel, just need to arrange in advance .

The bike comes with aero bar, so if you want to bring a mount for your bike comp, please take note.

You may want to pay attention to the brakes. Less effective if you tab the brakes when hand is on the hood. Most effective way is to pull the brake level from dropbar position.

Bike groupset was Shimano Claris (2x8) rather than 105 (mentioned in the review below), resulting in a heavy rear.

Overall, very good experience with hassle-free communication with bike shop.Rental fee is also reasonable at 20,000 KRW per day. Recommended.

google_reviews_en.author: Lucas B
google_reviews_en.text:
The owner is very nice. I rented a road bike Elfama Epoca 105 size L, bike weight 9kg, wheels 700x25. I'm 185cm tall and it was barely large enough but no issue for me.

I paid 60,000 for 3 days. The bike was in good condition. I got everything I needed like helmet, mini pump, spare tube, and lights. The shop offers pick ups from the airport as well since it's pretty near.

I rode the bike around Jeju 228km and had no issues at all.

google_reviews_en.author: J Chan
google_reviews_en.text: The bicycles are in high quality.   We had a small accident on our first day, the boss is very helpful and nice, he provided advise to us through ig immidately.   We enjoy the bike trip in Jeju.

google_reviews_en.author: store me
google_reviews_en.text: Very good shop, conveniently located near the airport. Bikes in a good condition, maintained regularly, prices are very reasonable. Have E Bikes, Road Bikes, MTB. Highly recommended 🙌

google_reviews_en.author: CHOONG
google_reviews_en.text:
Perfectly good rental service. I was able to cycle around Jeju's coastline.

You get to choose between a Mountain bike (hybrid) or a road bike. I went for the MTB because I rode more on the pavement/bike paths. Same reasonable price for each.

1 day rental was 20,000₩, return the next day, which took pressure off me.

I didn't have a reservation, but please make sure you do, as the owner isn't always in the store. I just waited at the door for a few minutes.

단, 보유된 자전거는 좀 오래된듯함.
22년, 24년 두번 렌트했는데, 주인뷴이 친절하게 대해주심.

google_reviews.text:
전기자전거 대여로 80km를 주행해본결과 대만족이다...
다만 스로틀 기능이 없고 pas기능(페달로 굴리면 모터에서 힘을 보조)만 장착되있어 첨부터 끝까지 쉴수는 없다...자전거에 서스펜션(쇼바)장착이 안되있어서 조그마한 보도블럭 턱에도 크게 넘어져
다칠수 있으니 조심 또 조심을 해야하겠다...
메인 배터리로 100km 주행이 가능하고 보조 배터리로 60km까지 주행이 가능하다하니 하루 대여로 100km주행하실게 아니라면 딱 안성맞춤이다...
야간주행시엔 꼭 라이트를 켜고 주행하시고 라이트켜는 법은 전원을 켠후 +,-버튼중 -버튼을 꾹 3초정도 눌러주면 점등이되니 안전 라이딩에 참고하세요~

google_reviews_en.author: Ben Arthur
google_reviews_en.text:
I rented a non e-bike in early November to ride around the island.

The owner gave such a great introduction on where to go, and what kind of bike I needed.

I had him on WhatsApp and he gave me great words of encouragement as I struggled through the course, and was able to quickly give directions when I got lost at one point.

It's also useful to know, that a more well known competitor has 90kg limits on their bikes because of certain bike frames, while this rental doesn't have this restriction. I recommend going here first.

Thank you so much 😁 you really helped me complete this trip

google_reviews_en.author: Roger Chavarria
google_reviews_en.text: Excellent bike shop. I rented a bike for a week in order to do Jeju Fantasy Trail and all was perfect, great service and good price. Bikes were well maintained and good for the trail.

google_reviews_en.author: Olga Roj
google_reviews_en.text: I got a very good bike from this place - light, in great condition, good gears and breaks, I cycled 160 km around the island without any problems. Also the owner speaks good English.

google_reviews_en.author: audrey cheong
google_reviews_en.text:
Only one Staff tending the shop n he speaks very limited English with three customers waiting to rent n struggling to communicate with him in English.
Rent the bike nearing closing time and it is counted as one day, not based on 24 hrs.

google_reviews_en.author: 슨녀
google_reviews_en.text: Just a week after walking 300km around Jeju Island, I came here to rent a bike for a 240km, 3-night, 4-day bike ride. The owner was very friendly. I visit Jeju Island often, and I rent bikes here. It's the best. They explained everything thoroughly, and I successfully completed the 3-night, 4-day ride. I'll be back again. Good. Good.

fields.title: 박스앤자전거(box and bicycle)
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Cheju, 특별자치도, Yonghwa-ro 4-gil, 3-14 KR
fields.address_ko: 대한민국 제주특별자치도 제주시 특별자치도, 용화로4길 3-14 KR

google_reviews.author: jun93 ch
google_reviews.text: 25년 1월 24일~1월 26일 설연휴 전 3일간 자전거 대여하였습니다. 사장님 정말 정말 친절하십니다. 귤 하나 사비스로 주셨는데, 정말 맛있게 먹었습니다. 제주도의 잊지 못할 추억 만들어줘서 감사합니다. 날씨 좋을 때 한번 더 이용하고 싶은 곳 입니다. 많은 분들에게 추천합니다!

google_reviews.author: 불꽃남자
google_reviews.text: 갑작스러운 자전거 변경요청에도 친절하게 응대해주셨고 가져온 클릿도 잘 부착해주셔서 트러블 없이 1박 2일동안 잘탔습니다. 감사합니다. 2~3개 업체 이용해봤지만 박스앤자전거 강추드립니다.

google_reviews.author: 정유지
google_reviews.text:
사장님ㅠㅠ 너무 감사합니다😭💗
저희가 애월까지 자전거 타고 가려 했었는데 이호테우 해수욕장에서 뻗어서 도저히 내일 반납하러 못 가겠더라구요,,
그래서 사장님께 저녁에 연락드렸더니 내일 직접 픽업하러 오시겠다고 하시면서 픽업비도 안 받으셨어요ㅠㅠ 자전거 대여도 정말 싸게 해주셨는뎅ㅜㅜ

시간도 넉넉히 주시구 혹시 늦을 것 같으면 연락만 달라고 하시고,, 저희가 백팩이랑 짐이 많으니까 가방에 묶을 끈이랑 핸드폰 거치대랑 하나하나 신경 정말 많이 써주세요🥰❤️
안장 높이도 조절해주시구!! 평소에 자전거를 잘 안 탄다고 하니까 직접 한 바퀴 타보라고 하시면서 더 편한 자전거를 고를 수 있게 해주셔용ㅠㅎㅎ 헬멧이랑 잠금장치까지 다 대여해주세요!!

사장님 정말 천사예요🤍 여러분 제주도 오시면 꼬옥!! “박스앤자전거”에서 대여하세요‼️ 가격도 착한데 자전거 종류도 다양하고, 무엇보다 사장님이 너무 친절하세요ㅠ😉💗 주변 사람들한테 꼭 소문낼게용!! 사장님 너무 감사합니다❤️❤️❤️❤️

google_reviews.author: 이맛있는귤
google_reviews.text:
인터넷으로 홍보를 많이 안 하셔서 다른 곳들보다 덜 알려진 것 같은데, 간간이 보이는 후기에 하나같이 좋은 말밖에 없더라고요!
직접 이용해보니 왜인지 알겠어요 덕분에 제주도 첫 자전거여행 너무 잘 하고 왔어요! 우선 자전거 상태도 굉장히 좋고, 몸에 맞게 피팅해주신 뒤 한바퀴 돌고 불편한 곳이 있는지 다시 확인해주셔서 3일동안 안심하고 자전거 탈 수 있었어요^^
헬멧도 깨끗하고 잘 맞아서 넘 좋았어요ㅎㅎ집에 돌아와서 같은 종류로 구매하려고 합니다ㅎㅎ

다시 자전거 타러 돌아가고 싶네요~~ 다음 자전거여행때는 고민하지 않고 박스앤자전거 방문하려 합니다
감사합니다~~^^

google_reviews.author: 박수진
google_reviews.text:
3일동안 여기서 자전거를 빌려서 제주도 자전거 종주를 했는데요, 결론부터 말하자면 여기서 렌트를 한 게 정말 최고의 선택이었습니다!!!🥹
제주 도착일 공항 픽업부터, 돌아가는 날 드롭까지 해주셔서 너무 편안했구요 자전거 본체 뿐만 아니라 다른 자전거 용품까지 너무 잘 챙겨주셨어요! 너무너무 친절하십니다 ㅠㅠㅠㅠ 그리고 사장님과 대화를 나눠보면서 느낀거지만 정말 본인의 일에 충실하시고 현재 뿐만이 아닌 앞으로의 비전까지도 생각하고 계시는 포부가 아주 크신 분이라는 걸 느꼈어요. 사장님 하시는 일 모두 잘되길 바랍니다!! 국내에선 홍보를 잘 안하셔서 아시는 분이 많지 않아 아쉽지만, 국내인 분이든 외국인 분이든 모두 여기서 자전거 렌트 하시면 정말 좋은 추억 남기실 수 있을 것 같아요!!!!

google_reviews_en.author: cheam lc
google_reviews_en.text:
An, the owner, is kind and helpful. He is responsive and even though we only had last minute planning, he managed to give us excellent bikes and support.
This is one of the best bike rentals I have made.
We had a most lovely time cycling around the beautiful island of Jeju.
Thank you,  An and your team!

google_reviews_en.author: Mitchell Smith
google_reviews_en.text:
Had a great experience renting from here! The shop is run by such a kind family that got us all setup for a 3 day ride around the island. We were able to store our stuff which made the whole thing possible! Very easy to communicate before and during on Whatsapp. We were unfortunately running a bit behind on the last day due to a headwind slowing us down, but they were very accommodating, and they would not let us feel bad about keeping them a bit later which was so nice of them!

The bikes were in great shape and the island was beautiful. I'd recommend taking as much time as you can for the ride, as we would have loved to spend more time at all the beaches and cafes along the way. If I am ever lucky enough to make it back to Jeju I will definitely use box and bicycle again!

google_reviews_en.author: S C
google_reviews_en.text:
This is the best cycling rental place we’ve been to after cycling in Taiwan and Okinawa. The bikes are in really good conditions and the owner is the most hospitable one we have ever encountered, he is very nice and easy to communicate via WhatsApp to confirm bookings. He is also very helpful to introduce us to all the things we should be aware of and sightseeing spots worth visiting before we headed out. Everything is managed perfectly and he also assured us that he would be reachable if there are issues with the bikes like flat tire.

We had some accidents on our way that were entirely our fault and broke the equipment and paid a very reasonable maintenance fee and we are terribly terribly sorry for the inconvenience caused!! And thank you once again for the great services and bikes that accompanied us for the round jeju trip

google_reviews_en.author: S
google_reviews_en.text:
What an amazing experience! Mr. 안 is such an adorable and kind man! He is the store owner and he communicated really well. He will tell you his English is not good, but I had no issue communicating with him whatsoever. My trip to Jeju was last minute, I wasn’t sure if I was able to get a bike. He was so kind and took me in without a reservation. He thought I was crazy when I told him I wanted to bike the whole island in two days (I thought I was crazy too). He offered a helmet, seat cushion and an attachment piece for the phone. The bike was in great condition, with some of the pieces being brand new.

I ended up stopping after the second course due to not being prepared haha. I had no bike shorts, or wind proof glasses ( I started tearing up after 5km and my butt hurt like hell). I cut my journey short and returned the bike the next day. Mr. 안 was kind enough to offer me his travel plan to safely finish the jeju bike trail. I will for sure return to finish this fantasy path. I highly recommend this place to anyone who wants to rent a bike to explore jeju Island!

google_reviews_en.author: Rachel Yan
google_reviews_en.text: Super friendly owners and good quality bikes! I had the best time cycling in Jeju!

fields.title: Biketrip
fields.address: South Korea, Jeju-do, Cheju, Yongmun-ro, 26-3 제주특별자치도

google_reviews.author: 이상건
google_reviews.text:
사장님은 무척 친절하셨으나

내가 날씨와 궁합이 좋치못해
이용은 안했다

원래는 다른 전기자전거 렌트업체를 당일 택시까지타고 가서 빌릴려다가 당일날 렌트 안된다고 해서
돈 날리고 시간 날렸는데

여기는 첫번째업체 근처라 전화해본곳이었다

친절하셨고. 가격은 비슷한거 같다

다음번에 또 렌트를 하게 된다면 사장님때문에 이 집을 들릴거 같다

google_reviews.author: JaeSeong Jeong
google_reviews.text:
두번째 이용이다. 올해 3월 로드 중급 서귀포에서 받아서 제주 반납로 2일 이용했었고 처음 타본 카본 로드가 너무나 맘에 들고, 원격지에서 받았음에도 불구하고 다행이 몸에 꼭 맞아서 맘에 들어서 이번에 다시 이용했다.
3일일정으로 종주를 계획하고 같은 기종을 빌렸다. 출발시부터 왠지 느낌이 자전거 상태가 예전 것보다 못한 불길한 느낌이 들었다. 시내 구간을 벗어나서 앞드레일러 변속을 시도하였으나 변속 불가. 샾에 전화를 해서 문의를 했서 어찌 어찌 장력을 조절했으나 반납시까지 앞드의 문제는 나를 괴롭혔다. 성산인증센터 15km전. 김영갑 갤러리갔다가 오는 길에 펑크가 났다. 길 한편에 차를 세우고 휠을 빼서 튜브를 보니 다행이 쉽게 펑크난 곳을 찾았다. 펑크를 수리하기 위해 펑크패치 키트를 여는 순간 불행중 다행이 절망으로 바뀌었다. 사포는 여러번 쓴 듯 한 닳아 빠진 녀석이었고, 무엇보다 본드 튜브가 홀쭉하다. 아무리 짜도 안나온다. 어쩔수없이 중간부분을 찢어서 짜봤으나 말라붙어 나오지가 않는다. 어쩔수없이 마른 본드를 펑크난 부위에 붙이고 패치를 붙여 다시 조립을 해서 바람을 넣어봤으나 .....바람이 샌다. 조금씩 펌프로 바람을  보충하고 갈 수 있으면 좋으련만 채 1km도 못가서 다시 주행불가상태로... 성산에 있는 자전거점에 전화해서 튜브교체가 가능한지 확인해보니 가능하시다고 해서 어찌 끌고타고 가보려했으나 도중에 포기. 다시 전화를 드려 혹시 픽업이 가능한지 확인해보니 고맙게도 가능하시다고 한다. 구세주를 만난듯...성산라이딩 사장님. 파파야 사모님 감사합니다.

반납시 상기 내용을 바이크트립에 어필했으나 "죄송합니다"로 끝난다.즐겁게 종주하는 도중의 잠깐의 에피소드여서 그대로 반납하고 공항으로...
갈수록 자전거 상태는 안 좋아질 것이고..고로 다시는 이용할 일이 없을 것 같다.

google_reviews.author: 스맥
google_reviews.text:
I rented a bike near Gohang in Jeju and it was terrible. The chain came off, brakes didn’t work, and my clothes got torn. Staff were rude and didn’t even apologize. So disappointing — ruined my trip. Never coming back or recommending this place.

제주 공항 근처에서 자전거를 대여했는데 정말 최악의 경험이었습니다. 타자마자 체인이 빠지고 브레이크도 제대로 안 잡혀서 위험할 뻔했어요. 결국 옷까지 찢어졌는데, 직원분은 사과 한마디 없이 “그럴 수도 있죠”라는 식으로 불친절하게 대응했습니다. 최소한 미안하다는 말이라도 해주면 기분이 덜 나빴을 텐데, 오히려 고객 탓하듯 말하는 태도에 너무 실망했습니다. 여행의 좋은 추억이 될 줄 알았는데, 기분만 상하고 하루를 망쳤어요. 정비도 제대로 안 된 자전거를 빌려주면서 이런 태도라면 다시는 이용하고 싶지 않습니다.

google_reviews.author: 이종국
google_reviews.text:
제주도를 지인추천으로 바이크 트립에서 랜탈을 하였읍니다
자전거 상태는 최악 기어도 걷넘고  소리도 삐그덕 거리고
안장은 자꾸 내려가고 이런잔차로 238km를 간다는것은
거의 생명을 건 모험입니다. 중도 포기도 못하고 최소한 정비가된 자전거를 랜탈 하는것을 바랬건만  이건 아닌거 같아요

google_reviews.author: 림준영
google_reviews.text: 제주도 종주에 필요한 자전거를 대여해주는 장소로써 좋은스펙들의 자전거를 저렴한 가격에 대여하실수있습니다. 제주도 종주를 할때 기상악화로 배가뜨지 못해 비행기로 급히 날아와 자전거를 빌려 종주를 했던기억이 나네요 ㅎㅎ 제주도 종주하시는 분들께서 이용하시거나 제주도를 놀러와 자전거를 타고 다양한 사진을 찍어보시는등 재미있는 추억을 만들수있으니 이용하시면 좋을거같습니다~

google_reviews_en.author: Laurent Mathieu
google_reviews_en.text: This rental company is a complete rip-off due to their dangerously terrible and poorly maintained bikes. We had multiple breakdowns on our multipleday trip on the island: a broken wheel, a completely broken bike, a chain issue, and a derailleur falling off. Each time we called for help, the company took forever to arrive, wasting our precious vacation time. The staff who came to assist were incredibly rude and blamed us for their faulty equipment. The final surprise? When the derailleur broke again on our way back just 10km from their agency, they refused to help and demanded we pay for a taxi. The owner then screamed at us upon our return. Their service is appalling, their bikes are junk, and their prices are outrageous. This is a scam. Avoid this company at all costs!

google_reviews_en.author: Carla Castle
google_reviews_en.text:
Owner literally uses super glue for his repairs. Partner’s bike’s break is extremely loud and rusty. Tried calling the owner for a repair, noting the dangerousness of such a rusty brake, his response was that they can’t do a free replacement if it hasn’t broke YET.

Doesn’t matter if it’s actually dangerous. Very dangerous bikes. Can’t believe this man really thinks superglue, some duct tape, and luck is enough to charge us so much in rent

google_reviews_en.author: Beatrice Liu
google_reviews_en.text:
Very dangerous bikes and badddddd service.

1) I called out I couldn't feel the brakes and he adjusted it and said supposed to feel like that. I had problems stopping going down slopes without stopping until someone in my team changed bikes with me and the other bike had so much better brakes
2) all our tyres were under pressure.. We only realized on day 2 when we pumped in morning. Shouldn't have trusted what he said. Prob because it was so deflated, another team mate Tyre punctured shortly after we left the shop
3) bag Handles broke, the meter that controls power of E bike fell apart.. I had to duct tape it back, even the water holder broke. Really really bad maintenance.
4) person running shop is down right rude especially to females. I ask questions and he basically barks at me. Only talking to husband and other guys in my team then he gives more details.

If I could turn back time, I would hunt harder for another bike rental that would have made our ride and time more pleasant. Hope this review helps you all looking for rental to watch out!!

google_reviews_en.author: Anni
google_reviews_en.text:
This was by far the worst bike rental experience I have ever had. The shop was dirty, and the service was shockingly rude. When I asked basic questions, the staff member got visibly angry and shouted answers to me. His English communication was very poor, and he showed no willingness to help.

The bike itself was in terrible condition: the front gear barely worked, the brakes were extremely weak, and the shifters were stiff and hard to use. When I pointed out that the bike was unsafe, the staff simply replied “it’s okay.” I even asked directly if he understood that the brakes didn’t work and the bikes were dangerous, and he said “yes.”

I tried to get some kind of compensation for these issues, but that was refused. On top of everything, I was charged for a half-day rental because I returned the bike two hours after 48h/2 days rental.

I really regret not reading reviews before renting here. Unsafe bikes, dishonest service, and a terrible attitude - avoid this place at all costs

google_reviews_en.author: Carolyne Wong
google_reviews_en.text:
We rented road bikes for a few days for a round island ride. We had to call short the ride as the road bikes were not in good condition - brakes were not reliable and gears did not work well.
After 2 days of riding, we informed the male owner that one of the 2 bikes are not road worthy. He offered a replacement - however on meeting us at mid day he shoved a replacement road bike that was one size up which i declined. He was not negotiable and shouted at us. As we decided not to risk it, we cut our round island ride short from what was intended to be a 4 day round island ride. There was no refund.

The 50+ man was rude and unfriendly. I will not recommend rental from this provider. Their bikes are not road worthy and if u do rent from them do so at yr own risk. Accessories and helmets were old and dirty.

google_reviews.author: Damo Y An
google_reviews.text: 사장님 정말 친절하시고 배려심 넘치십니다. 감사합니다.

google_reviews.author: 문성환
google_reviews.text: 자전거타기 위험한 도로.

google_reviews.author: Jan Mauersberger
google_reviews.text: 저는 보통 식당 리뷰만 쓰는데, 이번에는 예외로 해야겠어요. 제주도도, 서귀포도, 한국에서 자전거도 처음 빌려봤는데 정말 행운이었어요! 원래는 내일 서쪽으로 갈 계획이었는데, 사장님께서 동쪽으로 가보라고 권유해 주셔서 즉흥적으로 그렇게 했답니다. 자전거도 정말 편했고, 배터리도 오래가서 시간 가는 줄도 모르고 거의 반납 시간 직전에 돌아왔어요. 강력 추천합니다! 다시 한번 감사드려요.

google_reviews.author: Eva
google_reviews.text: 정말 멋진 경험이었어요! 사장님께서 너무 친절하시고 사용법을 차근차근 설명해주셔서 좋았습니다. 전기자전거는 타기 정말 편하고 제주도를 여행하기에 더할 나위 없이 좋은 방법이에요!

google_reviews_en.author: Wiktoria T
google_reviews_en.text: If you’re thinking about exploring the island on a bike - you should rent it here! Really good bikes in beautiful colors! Everything went smoothly and we’ve got a whole instruction before using it :) the owner is really kind and it’s definitely an amazing experience!

google_reviews_en.author: David Parker
google_reviews_en.text: The owner Jesse was very nice, helpful, and had a good selection of e-bikes. The ride along the coast of Jeju Island was very pleasant, with some nice hills, so the electric assist was much appreciated. The views were exceptional.

google_reviews_en.author: Austin Bennett
google_reviews_en.text: Easily the best way to explore the south of Jeju, super friendly and helpful staff. Probably one of the best decisions/purchases I made on Jeju, it made my one day in Seogwipo so much more than it otherwise would have been. Really opens up the city and surrounding area, with no complaints. 10/10

google_reviews_en.author: Paris Montgomery
google_reviews_en.text: Excellent quality bikes and Jess was friendly and great to work with! He explained all the features of the bikes and gave us some recommendations on where to ride. My husband and I really enjoyed biking around Jeju. Highly recommend this shop!

google_reviews_en.author: Nelson Dechant
google_reviews_en.text: This place was great and Jess was a pleasure to work with.  We rented bikes early and headed east.     If you are a more serious biker bring your own pedal / cleats but the bikes were high quality and very inexpensive to rent.   I'd highly recommend this place!

google_reviews.text:
고산리와 신창풍차해안도로 달리기 딱 좋은위치에 있고 자전거종류도 여러가지라 너무 좋은곳.

2년전에 오고 너무좋은 기억이있어서
이번에 또 방문했어요.^^

해안코스 1시간 30분 코스 추천하구
해질때 타면 정말 환상입니다..
사장님도 친절하신것 같아요ㅎ
2년전에 방문한걸 알아보심 ㅋㅋ

덕분에 차귀도의 아름다움을  알게됐네요 ^^
다음에는 지질코스로 도전할거에요 🚴‍♀️🚴‍♂️

google_reviews.author: Daniel Lim
google_reviews.text: 직원분들이 아주 친절하셨고 건물도 깨끗했습니다. 풍력발전기가 많은 해안도로를 따라 안쉬고 가면 15~20분 정도 가면 해안도로 끝이 나와서 자전거를 잔 타는분들은 40분 대여하면 충분히 다녀올 수 있는 거리이고, 여유롭게 가자면 1시간 이상 대여해도 될것 같아요. 간간히 자전거 전용도로가 좁아지는  구간이 있어서 자전거는 어느정도 탈 줄 알아야 하고, 출발전에 충분히 연습해보고 출발할 수 있어요. 오르막 내리막이 약간 있지만 힘들이지 않고 다녀올 수 있어요. 전동 바이크도 대여할 수 있고, 2인승도 대여할 수 있어서 자전거나 바이크를 타지 못하는 분들도 이용할 수 있어요.

google_reviews.author: Now
google_reviews.text: 관광객이 덜 붐비고, 해안도로가 자전거로 운전하기 나쁘지 않다. 스쿠터 또는 자전거 대여가 가능한데, 대기가 길지 않아 금방 이용 가능하며, 사장님이 매우 친절하셔서 좋은 기억으로 남았다.

google_reviews.author: kyunga cho
google_reviews.text: 너무 재미있는 경험이었습니다. 자전거의 신세계를 경험했어요 ㅎㅎ 사장님 엄청 친절하시, 수월봉까지 가는길 죽여줍니다^^

google_reviews_en.author: Doraemon
google_reviews_en.text:
Kitty and I were on a round-island cycling adventure in Jeju, aiming to complete our round-island mission. As we passed by the Sinchang Windmills, we decided to rent electric bikes to explore the black sand beach.  We found 제주환상전기자전거, a charming shop with a wide selection of well-maintained bikes. We were greeted by a very sweet middle-aged lady, who I believe is the owner.  She was very sincere and helpful, even using a translation app to communicate with us. We rented an electric bike for an hour and received simple, clear instructions on how to use it.

The owner's kindness and attentiveness truly impressed us. When I returned the bike, she noticed I had a bleeding ankle and immediately provided first aid.  She even gave us two cups of hot tea and a tangerine to keep us warm and refreshed.

While the shop does not provide personal insurance, the bikes are in excellent condition.  The shop itself is very well-decorated and neat. Even the restrooms are exceptionally clean, with thoughtful details like heated toilet seats. We were impressed by the overall quality and attention to detail.

The rental price of 20,000 won for an hour is reasonable, considering the condition of the bikes and the quality of service.  We would definitely recommend this shop to anyone looking to rent electric bikes to explore Jeju.

google_reviews_en.text:

• Ambiance: 4.5/5 (Charming and well-decorated shop, with exceptionally clean restrooms)

Overall: 5/5

As we passed by the Sinchang Windmills, we decided to rent electric bikes to explore the black sand beach. We found 제주환상전기자전거, a charming shop with a wide selection of well-maintained bikes. We were greeted by a very sweet middle-aged lady, who I believe is the owner.  She was very sincere and helpful, even using a translation app to communicate with us. We rented an electric bike for an hour and received simple, clear instructions on how to use it.

The owner's kindness and attentiveness truly impressed us. When I returned the bike, she noticed donkey had a bleeding ankle and immediately provided first aid. She even gave us two cups of hot tea and a tangerine to keep us warm and refreshed.

While the shop does not provide personal insurance, the bikes are in excellent condition. The shop itself is very well-decorated and neat. Even the restrooms are exceptionally clean, with thoughtful details like heated toilet seats. We were impressed by the overall quality and attention to detail.

The rental price of 20,000 won for an hour is reasonable, considering the condition of the bikes and the quality of service. We would definitely recommend this shop to anyone looking to rent electric bikes to explore Jeju.

ahjumma was friendly too :) highly recommend

Don’t miss this place on your visit to Jeju!

google_reviews.text: 주인분은 매우 친절하시고 영어를 유창하게 구사하며 중국어도 기초적인 수준으로 할 줄 아십니다. 물 한 병도 제공해 주십니다. 자전거는 상태가 매우 좋고 배터리로 50km까지 주행 가능합니다. 바구니, 휴대폰 거치대, 물병 가방도 함께 제공됩니다. 4시간 또는 하루 종일 대여할 수 있습니다. 참고로, 가게에서 좌회전하여 큰길을 따라가면 세토코케까지 약 30분 정도 걸립니다.

(자전거 상태 좋다는 리뷰 다 구라일 것이라고 장담합니다, 그리고 아저씨들에게는 친절할 수 있으나 어린 사람들에게는 불친절합니다)

google_reviews_en.author: 김민준
google_reviews_en.text:
Bike quality is good.
Little bit expensive, but it worth it.

Aluminum & Carborn is 30,000 KRW
Aluminum is 25,000 KRW

google_reviews_en.author: J V (HaJiMa Teacher)
google_reviews_en.text:
The Tourist Information Center suggested this bicycle shop to me.  After finding it, I was happy that the staff were helpful in getting me set up with a bicycle, helmet and bike lock for my ride. It cost $18000 KRW for 6 hours.

Upon returning early due to the hot weather, I was not given any discount or refund for returning the bike two hours early. I showed the staff how the bicycle chain had gotten my new jeans greasy and they did not really care about it. They told me to go ask my hotel about it. Being that it was Korean Independence Day, most basic businesses were closed.

The bikes were okay, as they are old bikes in fair condition, however, it would have be nice if they just told me if I soak my jean in either liquid laundry detergent, shampoo, or dish-washing soap, and wash in cold water, the grease will come out.

I would not recommend this bike shop for foreigners, nor would I recommend wearing nice jeans or pants if you are using their bikes. The staff was nice, but could have been more helpful.

google_reviews_en.author: Jenny Lee
google_reviews_en.text: The owner was very friendly and the bikes were managed very well. They also provide airport pick-up service which was very convenient!! :) Highly recommend this place if you plan to ride in Jeju!!

google_reviews_en.author: Kalem Banks
google_reviews_en.text:
FYI this venue was under construction and closed (31 July 2019). Maybe check it is opened before you spend your morning finding it haha.

I took the bus in the end to seongsan - gutted it would be a fantastic (biggish) day to ride fromJeju around the beautiful coast. The man was very friendly and apologetic for the shop being closed. Best regards.

google_reviews_en.author: Harry
google_reviews_en.text: Although the staff couldn’t speak English, they were very helpful! The hire price was fairly expensive as I soon discovered later on, 2,500 WON for a day hire.

google_reviews.author: 곽영훈
google_reviews.text:

google_reviews_en.author: Nurjannah Banu
google_reviews_en.text:
My friends and I rented 3 MTBs and 2 e-bikes for 5 days from this shop and I totally recommend it. Though the boss tried his best to speak English, it was easier to talk through WeChat. I don’t see much issue as a non-Korean speaking person. Appreciate his quick assistance when my friend suddenly had a punctured tire 1 hour after cycling. He will drive over to fix the bike if it encounters any issue along the way. All in all, it was a good experience going around Jeju island on bicycle.

강창영 사장님, 우리한테 잘해주셔서, 너무 감사합니다. 다음에 또 올게요.

google_reviews_en.author: Hailey Lin XN
google_reviews_en.text: Really really great service from the shop owner! He will give very clear instructions on how to use the electric bicycles and gave us safety instructions and trial before we set off. He also will provide lock, charger and bag for us. The rental charges are also very reasonable. Despite us not being able to meet the deadline to return the bicycles, he still kept his professionalism and waited for us to come back. (Deeply sorry for our lateness). We will better plan our time to return the bicycles by the deadline the next time we are back in Jeju. Please support this shop if you want to cycle and explore Jeju. Really 5 stars services!

google_reviews_en.author: Mauricio Gameros Arzate
google_reviews_en.text:
It's a good place to rent bikes. It even allowed us to leave our luggage there. The owner is nice and makes and effort to communicate with foreigners. He gave us his contact in case something were to happen ( which it did). We got a flat tire and he call for aid.
I would come here again to rent :).
Even though there's no picture of it. There's a building with where the store is.
Quick advice always ask for a repair kit

google_reviews_en.author: Fedor Bobylkov
google_reviews_en.text: Highly recommend this bike rental! Good prices and awesome service: got a tire puncture 15 km away from the shop - but the owner quickly delivered me another bike (!) in his car for the cost of 2/3 of a daily rent.

google_reviews_en.author: Aylin Zhou
google_reviews_en.text: We had a great experience using electric bikes to bike to Aewol and back. We never used electric bikes before but the owner gave us detailed instructions with a lock and charger. We easily biked the whole route. Thank you very much to the friendly owner, Mr. Kang. Definitely choose this shop if you want an affordable way to explore the Island by yourself!

google_reviews_en.author: Courtney J. Kim
google_reviews_en.text:
I landed at Jeju Airport only to realize I needed my IDP (International Driving Permit) with my name on it—classic travel panic moment 😅
Luckily, I had a hard copy with me, so the crisis was averted.

I had booked through their website, and even though I don’t speak a word of Korean, the staff at GoGo Scooter somehow managed to guide me from the airport all the way to their shop with a lot of patience and kindness. What could have been a total disaster turned into a smooth start to my trip.

A huge thank-you to Mr. Yoon, the owner, who checked us in and set us up with an awesome scooter. Thanks to him, we enjoyed an unforgettable ride to Woljeong-ri and Seongsan—with plenty of smiles along the way. His warm service really made this trip special. Highly recommended!

Tips for future riders:
✔️ You must have a valid IDP
✔️ Make sure your IDP covers the type of vehicle you plan to rent (it shows what categories you’re allowed to drive)

google_reviews_en.author: Donghoé Heo
google_reviews_en.text: The owner here is very friendly. It was my first time riding a motorcycle, and he kindly taught me how to ride and what to watch out for. Thanks to the motorcycle, my short trip was a memorable one.

google_reviews_en.author: 서명빈
google_reviews_en.text:
I didn't get a separate receipt, so I'm writing this on Google,사장님 (boss) haha...

I'm the person who returned the car today. I got scraped while distracted with 30 minutes left before the return time...

I'm writing this because I'm so grateful.

I rented it recklessly without even getting comprehensive insurance to save money,

and I had a major reality check after falling, but after talking to the owner,

all my worries disappeared, and thanks to you, I had a really fun time.

You worried about my health first, and even though it was a single-vehicle accident and personal injury claims are difficult to process,

you taught me how to handle it, so it seems like it ended without any major expenses.

Regarding the damage, you mentioned there were already a lot of scratches and only quoted the parts that absolutely needed replacing.

Thank you so much!

If I come to Jeju again next year, I will definitely come back!

May your business prosper!!!!!!

google_reviews_en.author: 김강민
google_reviews_en.text: The owner is so kind. They personally picked me up and dropped me off at the airport, and I had such a comfortable and enjoyable trip. They explained the motorbike ride very kindly as well; thanks to them, I had a great time!! Thank you.

google_reviews_en.author: 돌멩이
google_reviews_en.text: I didn't like the fact that I had to wait about 30 minutes for someone else to make a reservation, but I had to rush to the meeting place right after renting, and the motorcycle was broken, so I had to prepare myself to die every time I shifted gears. The newly rented motorcycle didn't have any oil, so it was in a state of shock... I don't know why the reviews are so good. Please help.
